body:
Catch up on our latest events!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=1)

### **December 13, 2021**
In our newest roundup, check out the latest updates from the Republican Party of Wisconsin on local events happening throughout the state! **Upcoming Events:**
* 12/14: [Shawano Area Republican Women Christmas Party](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uy4z0a8Qu63ahVWdg-PX2P-7rZcQQpFh7SO33j58C_j&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=2)
* 12/14: [Wisconsin Conservative Digest Conservative Christmas Party](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWQTPUMYcPkVy8GXlJR8t9CzS6u2S_ucAj2fqccydVs4TrU58pO6WjB3xYwTg1Ytdi2stCYLCk_DUASXEj9H0eCs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=3)
* 12/16: [Young Republicans Holly Jolly Republican Christmas Party](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWZpcl-9Z-tQJhTE9XQVFo0J67AfvZkJgsmzRN2SufuqpzV7U-D7TkABllpiBMWw-c2DF_L2X0oKNBxSY96R9-LJI-drFaeg-C5tXSzrV_ZFXNkK2Zb5Aaw0hJT9IUot08Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=4)
* 12/16: [Menomonie Listening Session with Chairman Paul Farrow](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0SsIN05Kq52csGqnQtqVEFs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=5)
* 1/6: [Walworth County Christmas Party](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0YML_X-72sedswlw9l36d3JhlAjMlFSRDpm4XEs5aNawctj0lpdYc53vP4yZjbxd3jde4MRqNyWTt6EM5TsTROsOsCf6_CDaB4POiooMNwIO&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=6)
* **1/8:[ Rock County Community Outreach](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6vC6zQQ3OSekvb5GjQnzbYzECWIp433gaGTi4dWMEuG0&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=7)**********

| [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=8 "FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU") [FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=8)
---
* * *
**Rock County Merry Politics Event**
Rock County Republicans heard from speakers, including WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow, as they gathered for their Merry Politics celebration!
**Washington County Women's Breakfast**
Washington County women gathered to hear updates from elected officials and report on official poll workers.
**Washington County Pints and Politics**
Washington County Republicans held a Local Candidates Night to hear from area conservatives running for office at the local level.
**Tri-County Christmas Party**
Grant, Iowa, and Lafayette County Republicans joined together for a Tri-County Christmas Party!
**Brown County Lunch and Learn**
Tom Petri, Policy Director for Senator Ron Johnson, joined Brown County Republicans for a Lunch and Learn. Turnout surpassed expectations and enthusiasm for Senator Johnson and conservative policies was clear!
**Brown County Christmas Event**
Santa Claus visited the Republican Party of Brown County Headquarters to join activists for an event filled with hot chocolate, candy canes, and Christmas cheer!
**Christmas Donation Drives**
County parties have been hard at work collecting toys and food to donate to causes in their communities during the holiday season! Check out some donations gathered by the La Crosse and Milwaukee County Parties.
* * *
### Don’t miss the next big event in your community! Visit our website [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=9) to stay up-to-date on the newest opportunities, or sign up to volunteer [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_12_13_2021_v3&n=10).

Washington County Women's Breakfast Washington County women gathered to hear updates from elected officials and report on official poll workers. Washington County Pints and Politics Washington County Republicans held a Local Candidates Night to hear from area conservatives running for office at the local level. Tri-County Christmas Party Grant, Iowa, and Lafayette County Republicans joined together for a Tri-County Christmas Party! Brown County Lunch and Learn Tom Petri, Policy Director for Senator Ron Johnson, joined Brown County Republicans for a Lunch and Learn. Turnout surpassed expectations and enthusiasm for Senator Johnson and conservative policies was clear! Brown County Christmas Event Santa Claus visited the Republican Party of Brown County Headquarters to join activists for an event filled with hot chocolate, candy canes, and Christmas cheer! Christmas Donation Drives County parties have been hard at work collecting toys and food to donate to causes in their communities during the holiday season! Check out some donations gathered by the La Crosse and Milwaukee County Parties. * Don’t miss the next big event in your community! Visit our website to stay up-to-date on the newest opportunities, or sign up to volunteer .

name: Mo Brooks
subject: Happy 385th Birthday to the National Guard!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=national_guard_birthday_email&n=1)
---

| Peter, Today marks the 385th anniversary of the birth of our National Guard. Founded in 1636, the Army National Guard is the oldest branch of our military and a building block of our nation’s foundation. Whether it’s out on the front lines of a battle, disaster or pandemic, these brave men and women put themselves in harm’s way to keep us safe. They are vital to the safety and well-being of our country and should never be taken for granted. __ We wish the entire National Guard a very happy birthday and we thank you for your selfless service to our country. Always Ready, Always There!__ For Alabama, Mo Brooks
---

---

---

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Donate to the Western Kentucky Relief Fund →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Kentucky needs our help,
Peter.

Two days ago, a series of tornadoes and severe storms left a devastating
impact in western Kentucky. Thousands have lost their homes, the death
toll continues to increase, and many are still searching for lost loves.

It’s urgent we all come together to rush relief and support for
Kentuckians who need our help. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13942?t=1020&akid=1332%2E346206%2Ex7la9F ]Will you please donate
$5 or anything you can to the Team Western Kentucky Tornado
Relief Fund? Every dollar you give goes directly toward relief efforts.

Contribute $5

In the face of such tremendous tragedy, it moves us to see the outpouring
of love on the ground right now.

This was the line to donate supplies today in Bowling Green:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13942?t=1021&akid=1332%2E346206%2Ex7la9F ][IMG]

One man even drove half an hour with a grill and a truckload of food and
parked right in the middle of Mayfield, Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13942?t=1022&akid=1332%2E346206%2Ex7la9F ][IMG]

The love that the people of Kentucky have for one another will never stop
inspiring us. Ever since the storm hit, our campaign team has been working
on helping to provide food and supplies in western Kentucky and all around
us are powerful examples of neighborly love.

It’s a powerful reminder that at the core of our movement, we want to make
sure everyone’s family has what they need to feel safe and secure. For the
next couple of days, this is our focus as we help those impacted by the
storm.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13942?t=1023&akid=1332%2E346206%2Ex7la9F ]Will you also show some love for Kentucky today and donate even just
$5 for the Team Western Kentucky Tornado Relief Fund?
Peter, we
can’t emphasize enough how grateful we’d be if you can support our
neighbors in Kentucky.

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211213-1332-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1332_346206_x7la9F&akid=1332%2E346206%2Ex7la9F

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1332%2E346206%2Ex7la9F

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Mike Gallagher
subject: Xi Jinping isn’t intimidated by this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
America should completely boycott the Beijing Winter Olympics [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=8ab42a3339a4454aab0e715244b765ee&_e=S1yGQfF1cDx3PsHj74T67DbEMEhVJhiTifMnC11PdB7Dbw8LIz9m9PpT2N_lU6cyTE87iqlIiPXM77qBHL9wKUNKXNLCJjDCEqdFc8lGQQHr1JchFQWMHl7B0U1vPsLN_YVNBGCYmHFCQ9_lIbzidTriSs9O5M3K-89gVWXje7P9XgCphv338ASLYto3eEYMzufmr35x4oYFx5WrHUzw6zaQ9L8IglhCRQB8NlqH08qHMUpvQvdGs-j5ajuUXniTcAsYiKce6BYI5h-kNddI9cLVqZ5a7Rz2uIWTapTNTQ2mV-_PKr4mn1372aKvqo7GdspzreBO5nOuJlqVU1-nyXS_Oz3ZM3YZupr3Hdn40gH3DztoJUc0m7mMyCB_gnR0ajslTCVDj1jyMQIgIXZE0Zst4Rj2W-sioxgRfsasFm4jh-rja0djMMlDWwj9RiM2) Peter, **Believe me –– Xi Jinping isn’t intimidated by Biden’s diplomatic boycott.**

It’s the equivalent of writing a strongly worded letter that instantly gets thrown in the trash. Like Sochi in 2014, Beijing in 2008, and Berlin in 1936, the Chinese Communist Party plans to turn these games into the Propaganda Games and whitewash their ongoing human rights violations.

**America should completely boycott the Beijing Winter Olympics to show the rest of the world that[ _China’s abuses will not be tolerated._](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=8ab42a3339a4454aab0e715244b765ee&_e=S1yGQfF1cDx3PsHj74T67DbEMEhVJhiTifMnC11PdB7Dbw8LIz9m9PpT2N_lU6cyTE87iqlIiPXM77qBHL9wKUNKXNLCJjDCEqdFc8lGQQHr1JchFQWMHl7B0U1vPsLN_YVNBGCYmHFCQ9_lIbzidTriSs9O5M3K-89gVWXje7P9XgCphv338ASLYto3eEYMzufmr35x4oYFx5WrHUzw6zaQ9L8IglhCRQB8NlqH08p0FL7uIpAO8H9KhcpNd4x637uacBSOmqCxZmOhUYnIX112YkskxqfG_81zYB3kiYFvYRFz5ZAOS3qiMC0CNZLGmdr6c9mJdpXDWagK8AwkJdAYEunBlyV4AkIPCXUMSRgo9uYj6mN7cND9GSNy7Suh1lSWwUkh1NVGSMraDw5mfAX25d85uq5L7KPEq6jRhb7CGEw0jza9Q4yB12JsvKW7)**

Chinese tennis star Peng Shuai is being held against her will right now for publicly criticizing the CCP.

By sending Americans to Beijing, we will endorse a genocidal regime and put our athletes in the hands of the International Olympic Committee –– which has lost all credibility to guarantee their safety.

That’s not a risk we should take.

Our best option is to fully boycott the games, and I’m counting on Americans like you to speak up so that can happen._
_ [**Sign the petition if you support a FULL boycott of the Beijing Olympics >>>**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=8ab42a3339a4454aab0e715244b765ee&_e=S1yGQfF1cDx3PsHj74T67DbEMEhVJhiTifMnC11PdB7Dbw8LIz9m9PpT2N_lU6cyTE87iqlIiPXM77qBHL9wKUNKXNLCJjDCEqdFc8lGQQHr1JchFQWMHl7B0U1vPsLN_YVNBGCYmHFCQ9_lIbzidTriSs9O5M3K-89gVWXje7P9XgCphv338ASLYto3eEYMzufmr35x4oYFx5WrHUzw6zaQ9L8IglhCRQB8NlqH08p8I22Zas9IGmrE-MC4DTzHV_gf46Sx1ZRq9clhMPO435bYfCe2dcohkFOJad9Kx8QG1v3Yolan6J8OrENl888yPqac3pOP7dpuzILXVHclmY0oTWIj59h0QsqEc1ldQIHT5aRyvwVBY7imAowd5PsZMxXjfrskKjZY2wT73hDv_AQH7dsdw9C3lus1XrJboeP_qqHm0RDvws4036q0pwLv) Thank you, Mike Gallagher | |

subject: We have organized all 159 counties in Georgia!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1c77489c4798/we-have-organized-all-159-counties-in-georgia?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
#
Dear friend,
I am proud to announce that our campaign is organized in all 159 counties in Georgia. Not only are we organized statewide, but we’ve made more than 250 public appearances and I’ve personally visited all 159 counties.
---
|
---
| We are determined to be the hardest-working and most accessible campaign in this race. But we can’t do it without your help. [Would you consider joining our team?](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=e0e970518f&e=7bbb93570f)

>From the beginning, our mission has been simple. We want to share our message with as many voters as possible because we know Georgia deserves better than Raphael Warnock’s divisive, far-left representation. This election, we will have the opportunity to end one-party control, say no to the failed Biden agenda, and retire Warnock. As Republicans, it’s critical that we choose a qualified, conservative leader who will represent our Georgia values, actively work to preserve the American Dream, and win in November.

I am ready to take back our country, are you? [Please consider making a donation to our campaign so we can continue our mission.](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=592b1dc4ae&e=7bbb93570f)
We are grateful for the friendships and connections we have made along the campaign trail, and we would like to thank each and every individual who has contributed to our success thus far. While we have already accomplished a lot, we can confidently say that we are just getting started. Team King looks forward to continuing our travels around the state to earn votes, one Georgian at a time.
Together, we can win for America.
Very Respectfully,
---
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Barr?=
subject: CONGRESSMAN ANDREW CLYDE ENDORSES TIMOTHY BARR IN GEORGIA'S 10TH DISTRICT
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/29be29a134c5/congressman-andrew-clyde-endorses-timothy-barr-in-georgias-10th-district?e=061a1ea0d5)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: team@votebarr.com
**CONGRESSMAN ANDREW CLYDE ENDORSES TIMOTHY BARR IN GEORGIA'S 10TH DISTRICT**
Today, Congressman Andrew Clyde joined fellow Freedom Caucus member, Congressman Jody Hice, in endorsing Timothy Barr in Georgia's 10th District. Clyde released the following statement compelling voters to send conservative reinforcements to Washington by electing Barr in the Republican primary.

_"Recently, a handful of establishment politicians in Atlanta decided to draw my home county of Jackson out of the 9th District. This means my family, my business, my church, and much of my personal community now reside in Georgia's 10th District. As he is my constituent, maybe Speaker Ralston thought I was too conservative, but I've never caved to career politicians and I won't start now. Not only am I running for re-election in Georgia's 9th District but I am going to work tirelessly to ensure the 10th District retains a Freedom Caucus member.

**Thus, I am joining Congressman Hice in endorsing Timothy Barr for Congress.** There are over a dozen candidates in that race, so there are many choices, but I want someone who has a proven conservative record. Timothy Barr does. In the State House, he withstood the pressure of establishment politicians including threats to take his office and remove him from his committees. I've been on the frontlines in Washington and I can tell you we desperately need conservative fighters like Jody Hice, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Lauren Boebert. **I need the 10th District to send us reinforcements, and I'm confident Timothy will join the Freedom Caucus and stand in the gap with us.**

My endorsement of Timothy has undoubtedly placed another target on his back, but I am certain he can stand the heat. So, please join me and Jody Hice in supporting Timothy Barr!

FIGHT AND WIN,
Andrew Clyde
9th District Congressman & Now 10th District Voter"_

Barr had the following to say about the announcement.

"This endorsement is huge for our campaign. Congressman Andrew Clyde is the epitome of a conservative fighter and I am honored to have his support. Our country owes him our sincerest gratitude for what he has done to protect our freedom both in the U.S. Navy and in Congress. I look forward to standing alongside him and the Freedom Caucus as we reclaim this country from Big Government Socialists in Washington." ###
---
| | | | | | | [](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=e11601deda&e=061a1ea0d5)
---

---
|

|

Athens, GA 30605

You can [update your preferences](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=cfa662e05a&e=061a1ea0d5&c=d04f5f1251) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=cfa662e05a&e=061a1ea0d5&c=d04f5f1251).
---

name: Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island
subject: McKee is listening, let’s ramp up the pressure!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Team —

Cynthia and Matt are about to start night thirteen of their sleep out at
the State House, and more than 100 activists are joining #SleepOutRI
tonight — their calls for housing justice are only getting louder!

Governor McKee, Speaker Shekarchi, and Senate President Ruggerio’s
business-as-usual response to Rhode Island’s affordable housing crisis is
wholly inadequate, and their “plan” does nothing to immediately address
what’s going on here.

There are hundreds of Rhode Islanders, including children, sleeping out on
the street TONIGHT. Thousands more are housing insecure, unsure if they’ll
have a place to stay warm this winter. We need our elected leaders to act
NOW.

So let’s ramp up the pressure!

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/sleep-out-petition-202112/?t=1003&akid=320%2E43343%2EcCEMNB ]Tell Governor McKee: your plan doesn’t even come close to addressing
Rhode Island’s houselessness crisis. End this crisis NOW by immediately
spending emergency COVID relief funds, and ensure no one freezes to death
this winter!

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/sleep-out-petition-202112/?t=1004&akid=320%2E43343%2EcCEMNB ]SIGN ON

Cynthia and Matt, along with case workers, advocates, teachers, and
medical service providers will continue to sleep out until this crisis is
addressed with the dignity and respect that our unhoused neighbors
deserve.

And the louder we get, the more difficult it will be for Governor McKee
and the rest of the conservative Democratic establishment to ignore our
demands — which is why we need you to join our fight.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/sleep-out-petition-202112/?t=1005&akid=320%2E43343%2EcCEMNB ]Can you sign on to this petition telling Governor McKee that his
response to this crisis doesn’t go nearly far enough to ensure safe and
dignified housing for all?

Thank you for your support. We’ll keep you posted on
our progress, so stay on the lookout for more updates from our team!

Team Matt and Cynthia

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/445?t=1001&akid=320%2E43343%2EcCEMNB ]www.mattandcynthiaforri.com | [ mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com ]info@mattandcynthiaforri.com |

clean_body: Team — Cynthia and Matt are about to start night thirteen of their sleep out at the State House, and more than 100 activists are joining #SleepOutRI tonight — their calls for housing justice are only getting louder! Governor McKee, Speaker Shekarchi, and Senate President Ruggerio’s business-as-usual response to Rhode Island’s affordable housing crisis is wholly inadequate, and their “plan” does nothing to immediately address what’s going on here. There are hundreds of Rhode Islanders, including children, sleeping out on the street TONIGHT. Thousands more are housing insecure, unsure if they’ll have a place to stay warm this winter. We need our elected leaders to act NOW. So let’s ramp up the pressure! [ ]Tell Governor McKee: your plan doesn’t even come close to addressing Rhode Island’s houselessness crisis. End this crisis NOW by immediately spending emergency COVID relief funds, and ensure no one freezes to death this winter! [ ]SIGN ON Cynthia and Matt, along with case workers, advocates, teachers, and medical service providers will continue to sleep out until this crisis is addressed with the dignity and respect that our unhoused neighbors deserve. And the louder we get, the more difficult it will be for Governor McKee and the rest of the conservative Democratic establishment to ignore our demands — which is why we need you to join our fight. [ ]Can you sign on to this petition telling Governor McKee that his response to this crisis doesn’t go nearly far enough to ensure safe and dignified housing for all? Thank you for your support. We’ll keep you posted on our progress, so stay on the lookout for more updates from our team! name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: the problem is…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We hate to place the weight of holding this seat on your shoulders...
#

Friends -
If everyone who received this email made their first $3 contribution today, we would blow past our mid-month fundraising goals and have the resources we need to push back against all three of the National Republican groups running attack ads against Mark right now.
But the problem is, not everyone contributes. That makes it especially important that YOU contribute before our deadline ends in less than 48 hours.
Whether or not Mark has the resources to withstand these attacks is up to people like you chipping in.

name: Dr. Roger Marshall
subject: Your vaccine appointment is coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow patriot, My name is Dr. Roger Marshall and I’m one of only four doctors in the U.S. Senate.

Like millions of other Americans, my family and I made the highly personal choice to get vaccinated. Having practiced medicine for nearly 30 years, medical decisions are between you, your family, and your doctor. Period.

But let me be clear, **nobody should force you to get the vaccine if you don’t want it**. Vaccines should NEVER be mandatory — and I’m leading the fight to block ALL of Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates.

Last week, **I attempted to block funding of the federal government** until Democrats stopped enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandates. And I’m not going to stop fighting against the destructive mandates Biden is attempting to enforce.
**_
[I’d like to know if you would support another attempt to defund the government if it meant blocking the enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandate.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d83c6a7e1ed547ed9326489e19498749&_e=iFc3WnpXdZq6yoSyETIX9gh6hC51TczvgMJfzPpVEJT4R79d1TxSQlLr1PZfIsKTS0yMjAeh98l32pZdbeed4fJfVic5qgN1q3wwcWo4TJY6kr5kp-S9hIIJT8axH1yGJTy1ruQ-ARpavSf4KZg7ET17Pn2Xwfkmh-QxWsdCP3SF07oOLPIkWNm5tDva3m_sPNDcpyJtZr2SzYGEan4Xucvfv2hWt-w3p_vOMZlvvFvr71GoWFlmPmX9Kq_thlwYOGSCCTNYy7Z_6Nc-I0fgnvk9Fam4HsvGN11fOZp-kv04oqhoMw4bwO8jViNZhm0MA8LlBgdzSASUJiHP377rBbBTdOBTsSWuk1xBgu4ZtLVQLxE_TlK066AOcNWTBSHtlajzcD9L6F4NN-SnB96CnXNmyCJEhATnlIzEgDb4AswtjGuDsBGJ1Gf9RfV6osIxBBPgHtW2o83sFNOY4n4SaSvnKAYs3HvfPOyZPz6n73HkPU1CIMWo217SbqQgoHq7)_

Biden’s unconstitutional mandate is a threat to our entire economy, and it’s up to each of us to stand together to stop its enforcement.

**[Please do me a favor and let me know if you would support another move by Senate Republicans to block enforcement of Biden’s onerous vaccine mandates by any means necessary](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d83c6a7e1ed547ed9326489e19498749&_e=iFc3WnpXdZq6yoSyETIX9gh6hC51TczvgMJfzPpVEJT4R79d1TxSQlLr1PZfIsKTS0yMjAeh98l32pZdbeed4fJfVic5qgN1q3wwcWo4TJY6kr5kp-S9hIIJT8axH1yGJTy1ruQ-ARpavSf4KZg7ET17Pn2Xwfkmh-QxWsdCP3SF07oOLPIkWNm5tDva3m_sPNDcpyJtZr2SzYGEan4Xucvfv2hWt-w3p_vOMZlvvFvr71GoWFlmPmX9Kq_thlwYOGSCCTNYy7Z_6Nc-I0fgnvk9Fam4HsvGN11fOZp-kv3VJBaPTDHVjXHiAu_5oDlFPzXyoGPI-Jovf7HdNB_I8pyXJhIW1dsR0fS3mDmOc3Mkz7Lx2NjTzDlDS6QJps1JUFyUkKJelA0I8XPap1ycogbGX2-vODVuUKgz6K5afubFgRYkLtWvPOzZInqKKBwCm8Yxo7H6N90ABevHC6shM2Ci3tytW7MwZ4aj3fPPQxIG7V7hsxZ2pmzrLvejeas9)**.

subject: [OFFICIAL POLL] Thoughts on Washington spending?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
I want to hear what YOU think. Peter, Right now, Washington politicians are spending OUR money like it’s Monopoly money, with no care or concern about how their irresponsible actions are hurting the very people they were elected to serve. **They’re spending recklessly, racking up historic amounts of debt, then sticking YOU – and future generations – with the bill.** You and I have to balance our checkbooks. We have to live within our means. We can’t write checks we can’t cash. | [OFFICIAL POLL](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=c1a56d85d79d4b11a37729d6c85d5b31&_e=2R9AyMKNrAZcsoBodDR5p1vOWDdWcnUexVyzW5YBt4wiACMaziTb8tikn164s-7-TBrt6JjTxvHUz2AgATmwAUM-opUlm_RPaFkFv_JrSciXI3-oiStewYr2b4LsSJWh8YSfDg-sE_CuLEHtnHf0-yHoLQX4BFh3Y-JoSMkG3hH8V1DSTgJ8PbnW1c8ncwWkNWQZ30KRaoVrjAmRFmCctbRcapXreijjRiShHa0Igdk8qMhnoXvUdKy6Ci0d1XWwcFfuKCdzLq-jTr5cAsqrRDoVhmUjm4vaDoU-mavB_65HOiC0c8K3mjNvrGT65cClLDWKgTTDm8_jri_BtdtebhbNpw8Vy_XjngjKKMZPldIsALQ6qa7IkPFKl5ildgJRCKBmXaFdbjjhWsxh60QmBxk3PtVTXYoqZBVK8dMrJGIIcAfyzpjc7URpMJcPs_bwqSSqRAEVowmJUfnYs9fqwjsOTLvL-P_h55rHe8P8Jps%3D)

name: Travis Bull Johnson for Congress
subject: December Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Travis "Bull" Johnson for Congress Committee_
body:
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | |
---
******We continue to drive the train!** You know you are doing something right when, as an Independent, the incumbent reacts to what _you_ are doing, as opposed to the other way around. Last month, I told you about Congresswoman Fischbach trying to rebrand herself as a hobby farmer in her Thanksgiving email. Then, last week I made a post on Facebook highlighting the fact that our Facebook following was about to pass hers, and that we were quickly gaining ground. I find it ironic that, in the last couple of days, her office has started a paid Facebook campaign with the intent of increasing her followers. Coincidence? I'll let you decide. **We have a real need to reduce our debt, and to stop printing money.** This week the Department of Labor released its latest numbers. The consumer price index rose 6.8% this year, through November – the largest jump in 40 years. I would love to call this the Biden Bump the left talks about but, unfortunately, we probably haven't seen that increase due to the Biden presidency yet. This 6.8 is likely the result of the 5 trillion in debt that was added under the last administration. I often wonder if the difference between the left and right parties is simply where the money ends up – big corporations or big government. **Some things do not change.** This week I posted a cartoon on Facebook that I had originally posted 9 years ago (image below). That post now has over 3K likes and over 600 shares. Based on analytics alone, it's the most popular post I've done to date. Considering we have under 3000 followers, that's huge! (Lets hit 3k by the end of the year shall we?) The fact is, since I originally posted that cartoon 9 years ago, nothing has changed. And, it's time we finally did something about it. Who's with me? **It is up to us.** We have a huge opportunity in front of us. We can literally change the way America sees our political system by putting a true independent voice in congress. Remember... Minnesota put a third party in the Governor’s house. We did it before, we can do it again. **I**** need you help.** If you're ready to make a change, please share my message and donate to the campaign. I will happily put in the leg work and talk to anyone who will listen, but we still need money to get the word out. It's the old, dirty story of politics. The BIG SECRET... It doesn't take as much as they want you to believe. We do not need to raise millions of dollars to be competitive, we do not even need 1 million, but realistically, we need to be in the hundreds of thousands range. Any amount you can give will help us get there. Some of the more successful campaigns in history were driven by small-dollar donors. And, more than the money, it demonstrates that there is a strong belief and support behind our campaign. That validity, in the eyes of the media and political watchers, will get us more free publicity than we could ever buy. If we are taken seriously, we will be the big story across the nation. The David vs. Goliath story. So, please help if you are able. Thank you,
Travis "Bull" Johnson

name: Team Gail
subject: ICYMI, Gail responded to Jussie Smollett verdict, non citizen voting and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Gail Huff Brown for Congress
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODQwMjA2NzIyNTY4ODIwODIxJmM9YzVrMiZlPTAmYj04MzMzMTQ3MDkmZD1iNWE4ajN4.k3NkPREbETU6VsyNFmEsjwMwzQJAl7RJy6sRKIoQwUg)
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Friend, In case you missed it, last week Gail was back at work and busy to win your vote!
---
| |
---
| |
---
|

The week started strong when Derry voters said, 'enough is enough,' and sent Republican Jodi Nelson to Concord as their new Representative. Following Jodi's victory, the week only got better.

---
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Gail had a jam-packed day on Wednesday, attending several events including the 'Save our Paychecks' event with keynote speaker, Vice President Mike Pence. Her last event of the day was a meet and greet at Lino's in Sanbornville with lots of new and friendly faces.
---
---
| | | [](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODQwMjA2NzIyNTY4ODIwODIxJmM9YzVrMiZlPTAmYj04MzMzMTQ3MTUmZD1mOHQybTVu.ijlKAGJZMlIy507OIQKwQDRH8NiYXxAKj1jd3MaKL1Y)
---
| BREAKING: Jussie Smollett found guilty on 5 of 6 charges
---
On Thursday, Gail joined her husband, Scott Brown, Sean Spicer, and Lyndsay Keith to comment on the hot topics of the day, including non-citizen voting, Latinos joining the Republican Party, and the Jussie Smollett case which broke moments before Gail's live appearance!
---
| |
---
| |
---
|

Gail was also a star on the Christmas Party scene, attending Republican Christmas Parties in Rye, Hampton, Londonderry, and Auburn.

---
| |
---
| Over the weekend Gail participated in a wreath-laying with Matt Mayberry and Wreaths Across New Hampshire in Epping to honor our veterans and the sacrifices they made for our country.
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODQwMjA2NzIyNTY4ODIwODIxJmM9YzVrMiZlPTAmYj04MzMzMTQ3MjcmZD13NmM1dTV0.cu1Jjs91403il7qOi1DSE2diNgt-KtnaLsR9nDqEQsQ)
---
| |
---
| Team Gail is fired up and moving full speed ahead into another busy week as we rapidly approach Christmas. We look forward to seeing you on the trail soon! \- Team Gail

name: Dr. Roger Marshall
subject: Your termination notice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow patriot, My name is Dr. Roger Marshall and I’m one of only four doctors in the U.S. Senate.

Like millions of other Americans, my family and I made the highly personal choice to get vaccinated. Having practiced medicine for nearly 30 years, medical decisions are between you, your family, and your doctor. Period.

But let me be clear, **nobody should force you to get the vaccine if you don’t want it**. Vaccines should NEVER be mandatory — and I’m leading the fight to block ALL of Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates.

Last week, **I attempted to block funding of the federal government** until Democrats stopped enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandates. And I’m not going to stop fighting against the destructive mandates Biden is attempting to enforce.
**_
[I’d like to know if you would support another attempt to defund the government if it meant blocking the enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandate.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8c52dc341b1b4359b63caa07f3eb31f1&_e=HHpm9iaJmHJRPeR1c_emY7oM11Jn1qREiv2uApYMN7pnZPk-4nNABfkEEmINroJIsOXe4wQbqmDmEMqEIK490aWNXbhJaFAtmIOqwHpikWRHWr_C0vyHYmvphzbmvmdfz-Kst2coAKDkOEkaxD8ZhCRfJsWfgeCrXoR2fMFif7h2f0M0_lSff_u6-usMiVGan3GHAUbzPXL-u4n5ULC091KE8xUki0Tf8tdgTkEAwyXVaH0vBWYLZu-2Ds2to-MsHtrcG7sTSkst7pFlAxzwMbDhxrs4SWXhljlU89k7ccxLimnAS4EZDN8Z6jgyZIyd2NRDlUyDMxa3DSsgEyjqiZuNsLME5rmc4c-0cqCCflTEb2E9riY6Kl73cLGuUzJk9LPCmcxQkuZTfvce5A7cVEJzVgNFxdjqspeMzg-j1LHWiXjNIYh9hrIMF6p8UquXos7fK3jpu-QAtRoUP1vBRaAinxdhOv4sF5f8Aa6nO_oo6O9F_1lIGFLo8rSfcA8j)_

** [** BLOCK THE MANDATE BY SHUTTING DOWN THE GOVERNMENT?

clean_body: | Fellow patriot, My name is Dr. Roger Marshall and I’m one of only four doctors in the U.S. Senate. Like millions of other Americans, my family and I made the highly personal choice to get vaccinated. Having practiced medicine for nearly 30 years, medical decisions are between you, your family, and your doctor. Period. But let me be clear, nobody should force you to get the vaccine if you don’t want it. Vaccines should NEVER be mandatory — and I’m leading the fight to block ALL of Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates. Last week, I attempted to block funding of the federal government until Democrats stopped enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandates. And I’m not going to stop fighting against the destructive mandates Biden is attempting to enforce. Biden’s unconstitutional mandate is a threat to our entire economy, and it’s up to each of us to stand together to stop its enforcement. . name: John Fetterman
subject: Kellogg’s is grrrrreedy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
These workers need our help.
#
Derek,
In the name of solidarity, my email to you today is a *little* different than usual.
Instead of asking for your campaign support, **I’m humbly asking you to join me in supporting two unions on strike right now in PA: Kellogg’s workers in Lancaster, PA and Erie-Strayer ironworkers in Erie, PA.** Here’s the deal:
In Lancaster, BCTGM Local 374G workers have been on the picket line since October. In fact, more than 1,400 Kellogg’s workers across the country are on strike for a fair contract.
Look, Tony the Tiger and Kellogg’s cereals are among the most recognizable figures in American consumerism. But you know what? They’re _grrrrreedy_.
Not only did Kellogg’s posted massive earnings + authorized 1.5 billion in stock buybacks to line their shareholders’ pockets in the past two year. **Now, they’re trying to hire permanent replacements instead of delivering striking workers a fair contract.**
These corporate executives want to cry poor while the next generation of union workers break their backs feeding America? That’s just bullsh*t.
[**_Stand with me + striking Kellogg’s workers by making a donation to the BCTGM Local 374G strike fund today._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38240?t=1&akid=3819%2E434096%2ELrZVu_) 👇
**[Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38240?t=2&akid=3819%2E434096%2ELrZVu_)**
Meanwhile, over in Erie, they legit offered Erie-Strayer Ironworkers Regional Shop Local 851 membership a shitty nickel raise in the third year of a five year contract.
This kind of greed harms workers, families, and communities like Erie. These workers have been walking the picket line for months demanding a better contract + fair wages.
Erie-Strayer needs to take care of the workers who get the job done every day. It's literally that simple.
[**_If you're able to, these striking ironworkers absolutely deserve your support in their fight for a fair contract. Donate to their strike fund today._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38241?t=3&akid=3819%2E434096%2ELrZVu_) 👇
**[Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38241?t=4&akid=3819%2E434096%2ELrZVu_)**
**Bottom line, the Union Way of Life is sacred to me, and protecting workers' rights and organized labor is one of my highest priorities.**
I will always stand in solidarity with workers. And today, I hope you will, too.
In solidarity,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211213-3819-footer&t=5&refcode2=3819_434096_LrZVu_&akid=3819%2E434096%2ELrZVu_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=3819%2E434096%2ELrZVu_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=3819%2E434096%2ELrZVu_)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| | | [**Donate now to keep our momentum going. Our year-end fundraising deadline is under 3 weeks away and we want to start off 2022 strong.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1Opcvfo_ADjBxYG-DZSyKOqLRBy4UQbsJTmeaB0T_NG_AwkeRPyNl4aNprCNFtNm21-0pWNDGekoCzloHeF1MDghZy4LtcH0lfIhM8yVuFB_Cw_ivcG0X9eBF8Q2qg0X9PfvooOaDUtVVw9IqWR-NZOc_yxI9LAjSArpNO7pM6iKkxVAEtqvoc_sN2sYVq_izYHXrfT7RWauc6wGrY05cis_dKO0FQifohweYCuuJUToLcqHIGqaF4MonMAdYq54hKHaUKto9NyldL4q2DTqP8gfEu8-aofAe7E5VJ-SBJPjr893YpkXEOsc8xzDOzcBfg-ZtEbc6cM55OELx6hI-REPiRbNzRyvZpMX-wXLPinm/3hu/ftX7SCzhSZ6Msmzud-o_wg/h0/WvD0PYnt6PihCJOFh3U-yrkaa8R-WQminxpJlIR7yKo)
We now have an opponent in our Democratic primary, and he’s not even a Democrat.
A few months ago I protested and testified at a Nassau County legislative hearing to speak out against an unconstitutional, right-wing bill that would have allowed active-duty and retired police officers to sue citizens for $25,000 and protestors for $50,000 if they felt threatened, discriminated against or harassed—with irrebuttable presumption, meaning a court would take their accusation as truth.
**The author of that right-wing bill registered as a Democrat on December 1st and today, entered the Democratic primary as my new opponent.**
****[**Please chip in today to keep this seat blue and in the hands of actual Democrats.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1Opcvfo_ADjBxYG-DZSyKOrypx60e9ZGKyrj-9O0Yhf-LHzc6_DOklX4GwQRvdsGOG_jHm6iUXtOwHpRm0sikjxFQ0eY9xXToYvL79Rt8KUyyoaXSTz5kLGaSUUk4_zds9n-3q_2SKXcNrdNEK5jnGl1QM6BoWCB5FuoQ9DrT80pIxECfj8s-8cs4UPwc0Zcny6_URblKECwwrAiC6JXuB-2rjXS-drLyr6GzMJQS6xWe6leIjF61EffeceQQgdvulr4QuoVv5EHvYR9SMEH82AtkttBuZxeHhwU30cUyKbYXJvSSf3Sez4yvCREB9hnIf0lcziIdwpXIV3aStNtxMpy-QCGgt_P8CYKZcq_7AVm/3hu/ftX7SCzhSZ6Msmzud-o_wg/h1/6b6m1FOrMyG4USq8A4PqQs_OW4QPTpL9OvlSRsAu8UE)
The families of Queens and Long Island deserve someone in Congress who is fighting unapologetically for their best interests — not lobbyist interests. We’ve been there. We’ve done that. It hasn’t worked out well for any of us.
I’m rejecting corporate lobbyist money because my policies aren’t for sale. Because I’m not owned by lobbyists, I can fight for actual solutions that put our families, communities and future first.
[**Our year-end fundraising deadline is under 3 weeks away and we want to start off 2022 strong. Please chip in today.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1Opcvfo_ADjBxYG-DZSyKOp7OjKeX7WFEwxG4onwG3usOVE4pi5zJOJGtKzb7B2DpufcLqQaCja6RcKFOx_I2mZFG0Ct2Hpao5OF3w0_KRSGfEehZVGlik6oRQbY8j2YQ-SPgnU2HdQEfmiocJV7uQncNRbZjyVoHAi2_X0RnC0KYsSC_6lIEjjpnrICM0A1DDnUDZAyJcLM6MiomCLWyFfAKcPesTb7hpCvuuSlDT9j2q4J8X7h1v18NHWVsjxY4IDL26NnkL_X7P81FlIYRh_A59XE2Q_HWMDBfikvXrx3la8XIn1hVLGzFRoWp-1fDEgndDfWJercI3qzuq0XONwLCkLT3hhs8vo3ZwfbLWpm/3hu/ftX7SCzhSZ6Msmzud-o_wg/h2/EJnAbsqLCHXgk00R1dSNmaCTndYTqBYb8NqYhDWCDBg)

clean_body: | | | We now have an opponent in our Democratic primary, and he’s not even a Democrat. A few months ago I protested and testified at a Nassau County legislative hearing to speak out against an unconstitutional, right-wing bill that would have allowed active-duty and retired police officers to sue citizens for $25,000 and protestors for $50,000 if they felt threatened, discriminated against or harassed—with irrebuttable presumption, meaning a court would take their accusation as truth. The author of that right-wing bill registered as a Democrat on December 1st and today, entered the Democratic primary as my new opponent. **** The families of Queens and Long Island deserve someone in Congress who is fighting unapologetically for their best interests — not lobbyist interests. We’ve been there. We’ve done that. It hasn’t worked out well for any of us. I’m rejecting corporate lobbyist money because my policies aren’t for sale. Because I’m not owned by lobbyists, I can fight for actual solutions that put our families, communities and future first. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | We are running out of time to protect our democracy, codify our rights and protect our planet. We must ensure that every step we take is a step forward and together. Thank you for building with me. — Melanie is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. subject: Join Amanda This Saturday For Wreaths Across America @ Bay Pines National Cemetery
body:
Join us this Saturday to lay Wreaths for our Veterans with Amanda |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=af68e4fe78&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Please join Team Makki for National Wreaths Across America Day. This event takes place this Saturday, December 18th across the U.S. and internationally.

Locally, you can join Amanda Makki at **Bay Pines National Cemetery in St. Petersburg** where she and other volunteers will lay over 8,000 wreaths to honor our veterans.

**When** : Saturday, 12/18 @1030am
**Where** : Bay Pines National Cemetery Parking lot
10000 Bay Pines Blvd Saint Petersburg, FL 33708
We will meet next to Bay Pines Credit Union.
_Look for the Team Makki signs! _
**Sign up! info@amandamakki.com**

Directly afterwards, volunteers are invited to join Amanda for lunch at **Village Inn** across the street!

Find a Wreaths Across America location close to you: [https://www.wreathsacrossamerica.org/pages/150000/locations/?relatedIds=0&back=true](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=2ad46d7492&e=c2296cffff)

| _**Email: info@amandamakki.com to register!**_

“Thank you for remembering our fallen U.S. veterans, honoring those who serve, and teaching your children the value of freedom.” -_Wreaths Across America _

_Thank you!
Team Makki_

Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. | Fellow American, We were just reviewing a campaign update that our finance team sent over, and we wanted to personally follow up with you. Our Democrat opponent in the Georgia Senate race is off to a record-breaking fundraising pace, and he already has $17 MILLION in his war chest. If 450 new grassroots supporters will chip in just $3 right now, it will give our conservative campaign the boost it needs to WIN! I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction. The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing. We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers. Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country. And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice. We've got to get this country back on the right track. The Democrats are determined to defeat our campaign because they know if Republicans WIN in Georgia - we'll WIN BACK the Senate majority and STOP the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda. So how about it? body:

**In much more serious news** , the 1/6 Committee voted unanimously this evening to hold Mark Meadows, former Trump White House Chief of Staff, in criminal contempt for failure to comply with our subpoena. It's truly regrettable that he left us with no other choice.
Make no mistake: No one, much less those who helped to plan and incite an insurrection, is above the law. And anyone standing in the way of the truth will come to regret it.
Country First,

Adam

## 1/6 Committee Weekly Digest
Country First presents the next edition of The Weekly Digest to highlight the important work of the January 6th Select Committee. Each week that the committee makes news, we’ll provide a recap on the its work to make sure you’re up to date. **In Case You Missed It:**
* Rep. Kinzinger on MSNBC [speaking](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZox40OepiYbeyTe8YLX3_D&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=3) about the recent work of the 1/6 Committee.
* Rep. Kinzinger [speaking](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=B-xMNSNcDpdY3m1jne-HGWJe1CIu5Lyr37SIvxs5Wi4CPDeJng-ruWTZboc32q0eSYHPVrMDTHJqE2qnRT8P_UUCgGfwfKWH66sKV32Be5noSw8BOhWXM-qP5pkj07yu&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=4) to reporters prior to the 1/6 Committee’s unanimous vote to hold Jeffery Clark in criminal contempt.

Here are the major developments from this past week: **1/6 Committee votes to hold former Trump Chief of Staff Mark Meadows in criminal contempt** The 1/6 Committee voted unanimously this evening to hold Mark Meadows in contempt. The matter is expected to be referred to the full House of Representatives for a contempt vote tomorrow. In recent weeks, former Trump administration chief of staff, Mark Meadows, allowed key information surrounding the insurrection to be shared with the 1/6 Committee. [Information retrieved](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GUadKUZbNtXpoQtrN7XiLlDAp0T1nvsEvUIUmB084zGOr7c64IaqJA_2wJK3RRxutCV7AOBqGpfc_vrGtqLgi3HcKU_dg26XSjGZfBy1zQiGibfvJl7e1MoHDMwMJdsdHnMY5JMUf9TtyJhE7m9o579p3yka12T4LT6kyNHyzgI&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=5) from his personal email and cell phone revealed that, as early as November of 2020, Meadows was sending emails outlining a “plot for Republican-controlled states to send slates of presidential electors to Congress on January 6” and texted another member of Congress about that idea, exclaiming “I love it.” In addition, it was [reported](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GUadKUZbNtXpoQtrN7XiLlDAp0T1nvsEvUIUmB084zHop_tX3tC7ofnzD3-lDPkeVa8DZwmcsZv7sqHgeOFL1IdCgNpElI00rdYO3iXox-Qg7Yuhn6Qfn5a8ueb7L_Dmk61FVaKtdzpthG9Dcv3kZg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=6) that a PowerPoint detailing a comprehensive list of plans to overturn the 2020 elections was handed over to the 1/6 Committee by Meadows. Following the release of all of this information, however, Meadows ultimately failed to appear before the 1/6 Committee for his deposition and, in doing so, did not comply with the subpoena. In response, the 1/6 Committee released a [report](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=3vdbk25hXCP0GfU7BGOj4xWszHP5tgw5E0pvkP0u2KwWVORnaG53sGhY8W8xlUvDx_swBGSsM4bPgeivCoizwj0ABzcr0lJjTignRJDqxgE&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=7) this morning detailing the case for holding Meadows in criminal contempt. **A Federal Court has rejected the Former President’s bid to block the 1/6 Committee from obtaining records.** On Thursday, December 9th, a federal appeals court [rejected](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GUadKUZbNtXpoQtrN7XiLlDAp0T1nvsEvUIUmB084zGR6S96irzyio548wSPO9ONKIo5Z4VYAwavWRhNDvGnhobkCSYZX-lAB7VbxTOG8X-NMJ9LaCZzLC4GhDS_2FeWfLHQuJvXyLzgYeNHgLsiCA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=8) former President Donald Trump’s bid to block the 1/6 Committee from obtaining documents they deemed relevant and crucial to its investigation. Hoping to block the documents’ release to Congress, Trump had initially attempted to assert executive privilege. However, the White House denied his request to invoke executive privilege. In response, the former President filed a lawsuit \- yet another attempt to block the Committee from obtaining information from the day of the insurrection. Last month, a federal judge took the first step in rejecting Trump’s request, citing that President Biden is not required to honor the former President’s assertion of executive privilege. This ruling was just [affirmed](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=iKkL4-_VWuG7QABM_BxsnYeBz7fgpRIbGyXh7IQUmCg1w4Rl8_48CMZdag7nJ8Hw8mCXAU_lIJq_7bMykJ7Ylfpp98wI8AqhpLTD37dcG36FLozj7IDXkZ8587vKcSvsOX_fMmVFjCVml0ESo4RFzBwFe-Y5RAt_AA73-DXjdEU&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=9) by the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals. Judge Patricia Millett, who authored the opinion, wrote the following: “Benjamin Franklin said, at the founding, that we have “[a] Republic”—“if [we] can keep it.” The events of January 6th exposed the fragility of those democratic institutions and traditions that we had perhaps come to take for granted. In response, the President of the United States and Congress have each made the judgment that access to this subset of presidential communication records is necessary to address a matter of great constitutional moment for the Republic. Former President Trump has given this court no legal reason to cast aside President Biden’s assessment of the Executive Branch interests at stake, or to create a separation of powers conflict that the Political Branches have avoided.” **Other news that may be of interest:**
* On December 10, the 1/6 Committee [announced](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5DCywXuOJZs_3NnWx24FmU33AEP8Vv26ugKHkm-9E1n6dpsDbCyqpvA-M-6KkpGuHfRAdPjXA_HQ3BegqokgMkunc4XB_Hw0wZU5kyiLDf7RqFx8ZaDiyGKT7lLEImfMu6qKZ60HcXFLoi4r2TgN2IVWZWqjHDCzemyljMS6JbNF&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=10) the subpoenaing of six individuals involved in the planning of the 1/6 rallies, including individuals who worked with the former President.
* [Ali Alexander](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv_LvNT2GR2_SyZc-xIS-QoIEstdVZQBJWNt7o_yO2WZb&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=11), an activist and organizer for the “Stop the Steal” rally, appeared before the Committee for his [deposition](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv3ulPtKu11eyk5pdbdPvJ6NCeJyCQ5t2CAt2BmWTHC9E4lM5r7WJehZqQ2NVbKjWtFYQUUnjWEETSkGN_EX0fFgjXB7imfYtd6h06H7dkHMT8C9UpwCyF5PkkoPUkHfulRkTwEU20LZhX1P6qmZoNU0&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=12) and received a lawsuit following the 8-hour meeting.
* Former Trump aide, Jason Miller, has cooperated with the Select Committee, leading to a [postponement](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv3ulPtKu11eyk5pdbdPvJ6NCeJyCQ5t2CAt2BmWTHC9EdEITKfxcVtelcmgiNGEB0vucgZqyuXt-TzyU4bY7vBtHvkX_ZEeBBOc0mj3hIloXR1LgQdiJUNU0SXOZv9toPlWNLsgeF_YY65XHa37IoPc&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=party_follow_up_3rd_digest_t&n=13) of his deposition

_Country First is proud to release The Weekly Digest with important updates on the 1/6 Committee's investigation of the Capitol attack. If you would like to help contribute content to this newsletter, please e-mail[volunteer@country1st.com](mailto:volunteer@country1st.com)._

clean_body: | Friend -- I hope the season has been merry and bright for you and yours, and am excited for Country First's big Holiday Party this Thursday! Join us to get an exclusive preview of our awesome strategy to defeat the most toxic partisans in 2022. You will not want to miss it! Plus we'll have a Q&A, giveaways, and more. Click below for details and to RSVP so you'll receive the Zoom link. | "Holiday Party Details!" In much more serious news , the 1/6 Committee voted unanimously this evening to hold Mark Meadows, former Trump White House Chief of Staff, in criminal contempt for failure to comply with our subpoena. It's truly regrettable that he left us with no other choice. Make no mistake: No one, much less those who helped to plan and incite an insurrection, is above the law. And anyone standing in the way of the truth will come to regret it. Country First, Adam 1/6 Committee Weekly Digest Country First presents the next edition of The Weekly Digest to highlight the important work of the January 6th Select Committee. Each week that the committee makes news, we’ll provide a recap on the its work to make sure you’re up to date. In Case You Missed It: Rep. Kinzinger on MSNBC about the recent work of the 1/6 Committee. Rep. Kinzinger to reporters prior to the 1/6 Committee’s unanimous vote to hold Jeffery Clark in criminal contempt. Here are the major developments from this past week: 1/6 Committee votes to hold former Trump Chief of Staff Mark Meadows in criminal contempt The 1/6 Committee voted unanimously this evening to hold Mark Meadows in contempt. The matter is expected to be referred to the full House of Representatives for a contempt vote tomorrow. In recent weeks, former Trump administration chief of staff, Mark Meadows, allowed key information surrounding the insurrection to be shared with the 1/6 Committee. from his personal email and cell phone revealed that, as early as November of 2020, Meadows was sending emails outlining a “plot for Republican-controlled states to send slates of presidential electors to Congress on January 6” and texted another member of Congress about that idea, exclaiming “I love it.” In addition, it was that a PowerPoint detailing a comprehensive list of plans to overturn the 2020 elections was handed over to the 1/6 Committee by Meadows. Following the release of all of this information, however, Meadows ultimately failed to appear before the 1/6 Committee for his deposition and, in doing so, did not comply with the subpoena. In response, the 1/6 Committee released a this morning detailing the case for holding Meadows in criminal contempt. A Federal Court has rejected the Former President’s bid to block the 1/6 Committee from obtaining records. On Thursday, December 9th, a federal appeals court former President Donald Trump’s bid to block the 1/6 Committee from obtaining documents they deemed relevant and crucial to its investigation. Hoping to block the documents’ release to Congress, Trump had initially attempted to assert executive privilege. However, the White House denied his request to invoke executive privilege. In response, the former President filed a lawsuit \- yet another attempt to block the Committee from obtaining information from the day of the insurrection. Last month, a federal judge took the first step in rejecting Trump’s request, citing that President Biden is not required to honor the former President’s assertion of executive privilege. This ruling was just by the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals. Judge Patricia Millett, who authored the opinion, wrote the following: “Benjamin Franklin said, at the founding, that we have “[a] Republic”—“if [we] can keep it.” The events of January 6th exposed the fragility of those democratic institutions and traditions that we had perhaps come to take for granted. In response, the President of the United States and Congress have each made the judgment that access to this subset of presidential communication records is necessary to address a matter of great constitutional moment for the Republic. Former President Trump has given this court no legal reason to cast aside President Biden’s assessment of the Executive Branch interests at stake, or to create a separation of powers conflict that the Political Branches have avoided.” Other news that may be of interest: On December 10, the 1/6 Committee the subpoenaing of six individuals involved in the planning of the 1/6 rallies, including individuals who worked with the former President. , an activist and organizer for the “Stop the Steal” rally, appeared before the Committee for his and received a lawsuit following the 8-hour meeting. Former Trump aide, Jason Miller, has cooperated with the Select Committee, leading to a of his deposition Country First is proud to release The Weekly Digest with important updates on the 1/6 Committee's investigation of the Capitol attack. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm5aqupr0jfmk3gnf7j7a4hmkklbbfp6eiei754g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5jm9or1cth2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjr4ieqt5pe38v128lc9agmt7tt6m7guijdjqflo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5jm9or1cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp8t03nq8rm27h4hi7uvkb4psnnp54dsu8i7fuqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5jm9or1cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8l9ek7ugq3t6ogpjb2k6elnrvrdfcl7inh7jllo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrbccjhmaor6o33mepjbd9lm9ob7d31ecp38phjmhhn9c5gclp66tjjmtg63cbgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661qbacj7mthmcd70mdj3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpie2o76c9h6coh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi1ntqqiblepkv4igck623oo7oba219moh7aj4h8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5gecoj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z83buvfacgmn6g2dpp897n6u9s6g8akim69p19oo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5gecoj2cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8b7q9f01fh57e1jv8vta4uutuk2hfdjhc4diang_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5gecoj2cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

---
## A Message From General Michael Flynn & Mike Lindell
---
I spent this weekend in Dallas, Texas at the Re-Awaken America Tour event and I had some incredible conversations with many great heroes like General Michael Flynn and Mike Lindell. General Michael Flynn & Mike Lindell wanted me to to let you know how grateful they are for the support that great Americans like you have shown them over the last year in this fight to #SaveAmerica. Right now, the Patriot movement is under attack, and we must stand UNITED! We have to recognize who are enemy is and fight the good fight. We must use our 3 T's to fight:
1\. Time - Attend events with other like-minded Patriots such as the Re-Awaken tour (Phoenix in January, Ohio in February, San Diego in March. Get more info at www.timetofreeamerica.com )
2\. Talent - Use the gifts and abilities that God has given you to contribute to saving of America. America needs you!
3\. Treasure - We must stop funding Deep State companies and start funing America First companies. Every dollar we spend is a bullet in this war. If we will fight, we win. It is very important though that we continue to support Mike Lindell in this battle. His business, MyPillow, has been cancelled by all the big box stores because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision this Christmas season not to FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies like MyPillow. I want to encourage you to visit www.MyPillow.com and look at all the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows). We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First. Use the Promo Code JACKSON at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at www.MyPillow.com Kendra and I love all of our MyPillow products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too... ▪ Jackson Lahmeyer

name: Team Palmer
subject: How to help those impacted by the devastating tornadoes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39648453/320797962/312490568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk2ZTBjNS1kZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xR0VqmsITOnYRa0mSheU99Msh-Y_IwF_3L5VqqMaHnQ=) | Peter, The news out of our area this weekend is heartbreaking. **Families, businesses, and communities have been left to rebuild after unprecedented tornadoes.** Right now, we must come together and respond to this tragedy with action. Let’s show our love of community and lift up those who have lost so much. **Beyond our prayers and love, there are so many ways we can help those impacted by these terrible storms.**
* [Give directly to the Edwardsville Community Foundation Relief Fund](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39648454/320797984/513064010?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk2ZTBjNS1kZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xR0VqmsITOnYRa0mSheU99Msh-Y_IwF_3L5VqqMaHnQ=&emci=0f65692e-865c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fe96e0c5-dd5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21852952)
* [Volunteer with the Heart of Illinois United Way](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39648464/320798007/1659692967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk2ZTBjNS1kZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xR0VqmsITOnYRa0mSheU99Msh-Y_IwF_3L5VqqMaHnQ=&emci=0f65692e-865c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fe96e0c5-dd5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21852952)
* [Give Blood through the Red Cross](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39648474/320798035/541637230?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk2ZTBjNS1kZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xR0VqmsITOnYRa0mSheU99Msh-Y_IwF_3L5VqqMaHnQ=&emci=0f65692e-865c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fe96e0c5-dd5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21852952)

We know here in the Midwest to expect tornadoes and extreme weather in the spring and summer, but events like those seen this weekend are becoming more common. **The climate crisis is real. And it is here.** Weather events like intense tornadoes in December, record temperatures in the summer, and “once in a lifetime” flooding seemingly happen every few years. **Once we rebuild and heal, we MUST fight to slow climate change by investing in green infrastructure and renewable energy that can make our environment healthier.** We can protect the next generation from the harshest effects of the climate crisis, if we invest in the future. Team Palmer
---
* * *
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39648486/320798063/312490568?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk2ZTBjNS1kZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xR0VqmsITOnYRa0mSheU99Msh-Y_IwF_3L5VqqMaHnQ=) Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39648487/320798082/1680627449?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk2ZTBjNS1kZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xR0VqmsITOnYRa0mSheU99Msh-Y_IwF_3L5VqqMaHnQ=&emci=0f65692e-865c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fe96e0c5-dd5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21852952), or you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0f65692e-865c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/fe96e0c5-dd5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk2ZTBjNS1kZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xR0VqmsITOnYRa0mSheU99Msh-Y_IwF_3L5VqqMaHnQ=&id=125088311). | Paid for by Palmer for Illinois

To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: For the 26 Families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
Today marks nine years since the shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown. On that Friday morning, I was serving jury duty. When the news broke, I immediately returned to my classroom. I knew my students would have questions – and even though I didn’t have answers, I wanted to be with them. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39649756/320802031/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWI5ODBmOC1lMTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXnk7FuzZmBat4yFCChI-A5H3grevr5b0anfO9OHDVA=&emci=387e25a5-225c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=21b980f8-e15c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15529135) | Today marks nine years since the shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown. On that Friday morning, I was serving jury duty. When the news broke, I immediately returned to my classroom. I knew my students would have questions – and even though I didn’t have answers, I wanted to be with them. I will never forget how helpless I felt on that day. It is a feeling that has returned over and over again. In response to tragedy after tragedy – from Sandy Hook to Las Vegas to Parkland – and in the wake of the tragedy in Michigan just a few weeks ago, we have taken no significant action to curb mass shootings. In 2012, we said Never Again – yet, we haven’t changed our federal laws. So today, as a lawmaker, I carry the knowledge that we have not done everything we can to prevent tragedies like Sandy Hook from occurring again in communities across our nation. Gun violence is an epidemic that will not solve itself. It will take true leaders making the right choices and all of us doing the hard work. It will mean making the choice of envisioning a future for our children that will empower them, instead of leaving them in fear. It is urgent and necessary work, because our kids and our educators deserve to feel safe at school. For the communities devastated by mass shootings, we must show courage and take action. We owe it to every person we have lost in these tragedies. We owe it to their families and their communities to prevent the next tragedy before it happens. Thank you for standing with me in the fight for a safer and better future. With love and strength, – Jahana
---
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39649757/320802032/-1229177919?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWI5ODBmOC1lMTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXnk7FuzZmBat4yFCChI-A5H3grevr5b0anfO9OHDVA=&emci=387e25a5-225c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=21b980f8-e15c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15529135) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39649758/320802033/1768821864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWI5ODBmOC1lMTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXnk7FuzZmBat4yFCChI-A5H3grevr5b0anfO9OHDVA=&emci=387e25a5-225c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=21b980f8-e15c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15529135) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39649759/320802034/-1565319766?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWI5ODBmOC1lMTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXnk7FuzZmBat4yFCChI-A5H3grevr5b0anfO9OHDVA=&emci=387e25a5-225c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=21b980f8-e15c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15529135)

body:
this is madness |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39650226/320803197/608615099?refcode=20211214_e_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZkYmVjMi1lNDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wY2vV8RcukemOFumvk_2Sbd5wQ6Yll0IlEkr8Za6mhE=)

Friend,

Every time we turn around, it’s a new, horrendous decision by Gov. DeSantis. This month, he’s proposing **“a new civilian military force in Florida that he would control"** (CNN).

No governor should have his own handpicked secret police. _This is madness._
Do you approve of Gov. DeSantis and his latest action?
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39650227/320803198/-263675006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZkYmVjMi1lNDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wY2vV8RcukemOFumvk_2Sbd5wQ6Yll0IlEkr8Za6mhE=&emci=76e5e856-465c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fcfdbec2-e45c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=8807089)

When Gov. DeSantis isn’t talking about creating his own secret police, he’s asking the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade, signing voter suppression bills, or refusing to spend billions in pandemic relief for Florida’s children.

When will the madness stop? Do you approve of this?

**[Take our _URGENT_ , one-question survey >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39650229/320803200/-263675006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZkYmVjMi1lNDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wY2vV8RcukemOFumvk_2Sbd5wQ6Yll0IlEkr8Za6mhE=&emci=76e5e856-465c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fcfdbec2-e45c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=8807089)**

\-- Team Crist

| Dear Friend,
I'm pleased to announce that this week, I've officially filed and am on the ballot for U.S. Congress in TX38. This is very exciting for me, and I could not have done it without your support.
---
---
However, my campaign and our fight to take back our country is just beginning. The Republican Establishment in D.C. is working hard to get - their - candidates elected across the country, in TX38, and in neighboring congressional districts. They have decided, in advance, who should win each of these elections with no care given if it's the candidate that you want. Campaigns have been influenced by D.C. power players, threatening candidates, their campaign managers, and consultants with harsh repercussions should they not back down or quit working for the opposing campaigns. While it's true that politics is a heavy hitting sport, this behavior is wrong. Also, it is just one more proof point that The Establishment cares only for themselves and retaining their own power, giving little care to the concerns or desires of The People.
So, what can we do? Well, we continue to fight back. I'm working hard to ensure that this behavior does not continue in the dark. I'm also continuing in my campaign and am dedicated to fight for the issues that you care about. However, I will continue to need your support. Your donations matter in keeping my campaign going. I cannot do this without your help. Donate today to keep this momentum going.

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: remembering Sandy Hook
