[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39650895/320806794/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTkzMWUyOC1lNjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WOdgGr4TV9VON-AA48h4KJlYm_DfjbfJRoxLLFH2tsw=&emci=c934bbe9-6d5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=7a931e28-e65c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Nine years ago today, the world was shocked by the horrific events at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut.
Twenty families packed lunch pails and put their children on the bus, not knowing that in a moment of evil everything was about to be ripped away from them.
It felt at the time like a turning point. Surely something would be done after the senseless killing of 20 six- and seven-year-old children. Wouldn’t our nation finally do something to stop the mass shootings and the tragic loss of life plaguing our communities?
I’ve heard some suggest, though, that it was the day the NRA won. If the massacre of first graders didn’t lead to immediate gun safety reform, what would?
Since then, names like Parkland, Pulse, San Bernardino, Vegas, and now Oxford have become seared in our memory. But with the Oxford community still reeling from grief, with the parents of Sandy Hook about to mourn a ninth Christmas without their youngsters, **I flatly reject the idea that our gun violence epidemic is acceptable because firearms are part of our American culture.**
We can – _we must_ – continue to fight for federal gun laws that save lives.
We can – _we must_ – demand that “thoughts and prayers” are coupled with real and meaningful firearm legislation.
And we can – _we must_ – elect more Democrats who seem to be the only ones willing to boldly stand up to the NRA and all their blood money and say enough is enough.
That is how we can remember and honor the victims of senseless gun violence. That is how we can save lives and spare another community from unspeakable heartbreak. And that is how we ensure the NRA never wins.
My opponent Chuck Grassley may have been bought and paid for by the NRA long ago, but I’ll always be a voice for sensible reform in the Senate.
In solidarity,
Mike Franken, Vice Admiral, U.S. Navy (ret.)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39650863/320806664/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDkzMWUyOC1lNjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4pllagLZTaVY6_RM4AoBijOIfGxWytTJ8ZoSC-nsFE=)

| | Folks, There’s a reason why North Carolina is called the tipping point state. Elections here are always won by the slimmest of margins. If 2020’s election margin was any indication, North Carolinians are trying desperately to flip our state blue – but Republican gerrymandering makes that a hard task to accomplish. North Carolina’s courts are currently debating the constitutionality of our congressional maps, and their decision could lead to fair districts being drawn. North Carolina CAN go blue – with your help. [**Rush a donation ahead of our mid-month deadline to help NC go blue!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39650867/320806671/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211214_FR_MM2NCBlue_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDkzMWUyOC1lNjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4pllagLZTaVY6_RM4AoBijOIfGxWytTJ8ZoSC-nsFE=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39650871/320806675/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211214_FR_MM2NCBlue_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDkzMWUyOC1lNjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4pllagLZTaVY6_RM4AoBijOIfGxWytTJ8ZoSC-nsFE=)
---

Hey there Peter, Emily here with Dr. Martin’s finance team. [_**I’m reaching out to ask for your help covering our December campaign costs**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39652426/320811752/1701703762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213costs_EC_ope_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmU0ZmQwZi1lODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05WJwNgvOd76eQ3hsVWPelSpIZ_GGP7YbH0XhBb8UVM=), but first I wanted to explain why your support is so important.
**In short, it comes down to the _massive_ cash advantage that the corrupt GOP machine has against campaigns like this one that are fueled by small-dollar, grassroots supporters.**
Unlike Bill Lee’s campaign — and unlike pretty much any GOP candidate we’ve ever seen — our campaign is largely funded by grassroots supporters like you, meaning we rely on $5, $10, or $25 donations to fuel this campaign. We depend on people power, not big checks from corporate PACs.
As you might imagine, that puts us at a bit of a disadvantage. But we wouldn’t have it any other way, because our grassroots support is what enables us to run a campaign that’s for ALL Tennesseans, not corporate-backed special interests or the super wealthy.
**That said, running a campaign isn’t cheap! Here’s what our bare-bones, essentials-only budget looks like for this month:**
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39652427/320811753/568893727?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213costs_EC_ope_xx_table&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmU0ZmQwZi1lODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05WJwNgvOd76eQ3hsVWPelSpIZ_GGP7YbH0XhBb8UVM=)
---
As we get into the new year next month, we’ll start building out robust plans to reach voters where they are — TV ads, digital ads, mail pieces, door-knocking programs, and more. But to do so, we’ll first need to make sure our basic costs are covered before we can expand our efforts.

clean_body: | | = Hey there Peter, Emily here with Dr. Martin’s finance team. =, but first I wanted to explain why your support is so important. In short, it comes down to the massive cash advantage that the corrupt GOP machine has against campaigns like this one that are fueled by small-dollar, grassroots supporters. Unlike Bill Lee’s campaign — and unlike pretty much any GOP candidate we’ve ever seen — our campaign is largely funded by grassroots supporters like you, meaning we rely on $5, $10, or $25 donations to fuel this campaign. We depend on people power, not big checks from corporate PACs. As you might imagine, that puts us at a bit of a disadvantage. But we wouldn’t have it any other way, because our grassroots support is what enables us to run a campaign that’s for ALL Tennesseans, not corporate-backed special interests or the super wealthy. That said, running a campaign isn’t cheap! Here’s what our bare-bones, essentials-only budget looks like for this month: = As we get into the new year next month, we’ll start building out robust plans to reach voters where they are — TV ads, digital ads, mail pieces, door-knocking programs, and more. But to do so, we’ll first need to make sure our basic costs are covered before we can expand our efforts. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- | = | = Emily Team Martin | Dr. Jason Martin is running for Governor because now more than ever Tennessee needs a leader who will start working to meet all of our needs. subject: Herschel Walker just cleared the field. Raphael Warnock is in trouble.

| | Peter, Mitch McConnell just gave Herschel Walker—the ex-football player and financial scammer Donald Trump hand-picked to oust Senator Raphael Warnock—a major gift: unequivocal, election-defining Republican Party establishment support. Now 74% of Republicans in Georgia say they will vote for Walker compared with just 6% who support his closest rival. And Trump's furious, riled-up base has poured $3.7 million into Walker's campaign in just the first five weeks. Voting rights champion Raphael Warnock is in serious trouble. Because if Trump and McConnell can successfully suppress the vote in Georgia in 2022—a state Joe Biden won by only 0.3% in 2020—Herschel Walker will defeat Raphael Warnock, and Mitch McConnell will control the Senate once again. Together, Walker and McConnell will clear the path for Donald Trump—who has already raised $102 million for his reelection campaign—to retake the White House in 2024. CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 Most Vulnerable Democrat. And CBS News reports that the Senate Republican campaign arm just outraised us for the _seventh straight month_. While we're doing everything we can to protect and reelect Raphael Warnock, today we're still $2,500 short of our daily fundraising goal. Peter, too many Democrats think we can afford to play it safe. They've already forgotten how hard YOU fought with us to win our 50/50 Senate Majority in 2020. name: Team Lamb
subject: Not another TV personality running for office…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39653591/320815163/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGM1MTY1Yi1lYTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IaUMqgWsPX7OSnFsHVjVyF8o-r-3ROAp9yQSOssImCk=)

Friends,

After four disastrous years of Donald Trump, you'd think we'd be done with TV personalities running for office, but with Dr. Oz jumping into our race we could go right back to where we started four years ago.

How can a pseudoscience TV doctor -- and longtime resident of New Jersey -- with zero political experience ever hope to lead Pennsylvania in the right direction? **How can we entrust someone who floated fringe medical treatments for COVID-19 with the public health and safety of Pennsylvanians?**

The answer is: We can't. We all remember the last time we put a "political outsider" in charge of things, and look how that went.

Friend, that's why we have to elect someone with a proven track record of delivering for Pennsylvanians and the American people -- _**that's why we have to elect Conor Lamb to the Senate.**_

**[Friend, as a frequent guest on Fox News and friend of Donald Trump, "Dr." Oz is the last person we need representing Pennsylvania in the Senate. Can you chip in to help Conor build a grassroots army big enough to fight him off?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39653593/320815164/212407962?refcode=em21_211214_midmonthfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGM1MTY1Yi1lYTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IaUMqgWsPX7OSnFsHVjVyF8o-r-3ROAp9yQSOssImCk=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39653594/320815165/212407962?refcode=em21_211214_midmonthfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGM1MTY1Yi1lYTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IaUMqgWsPX7OSnFsHVjVyF8o-r-3ROAp9yQSOssImCk=) Dr. Oz just spent $1.2 million of his _own money_ on ad buys, all in the blink of an eye. And with a net worth of approximately $100 million, **Dr. Oz has virtually unlimited money to spend on his own race, meaning he has _zero incentive_ to listen to the people of Pennsylvania to earn their vote.**

That's why we have to do everything we can to make sure Conor wins this race, because we can't afford to entrust our democracy to another celebrity just looking to add a title to their resume.

**[Conor is the leader we need to represent us in the Senate, friend. Can you chip in $5 or anything that works for you to help us take on Dr. Oz and his self-funded war chest, dollar for dollar?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39653595/320815166/212407962?refcode=em21_211214_midmonthfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGM1MTY1Yi1lYTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IaUMqgWsPX7OSnFsHVjVyF8o-r-3ROAp9yQSOssImCk=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39653596/320815168/212407962?refcode=em21_211214_midmonthfr&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGM1MTY1Yi1lYTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IaUMqgWsPX7OSnFsHVjVyF8o-r-3ROAp9yQSOssImCk=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39653597/320815169/212407962?refcode=em21_211214_midmonthfr&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGM1MTY1Yi1lYTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IaUMqgWsPX7OSnFsHVjVyF8o-r-3ROAp9yQSOssImCk=)

clean_body: | = Friends, After four disastrous years of Donald Trump, you'd think we'd be done with TV personalities running for office, but with Dr. Oz jumping into our race we could go right back to where we started four years ago. How can a pseudoscience TV doctor -- and longtime resident of New Jersey -- with zero political experience ever hope to lead Pennsylvania in the right direction? How can we entrust someone who floated fringe medical treatments for COVID-19 with the public health and safety of Pennsylvanians? The answer is: We can't. We all remember the last time we put a "political outsider" in charge of things, and look how that went. Friend, that's why we have to elect someone with a proven track record of delivering for Pennsylvanians and the American people -- that's why we have to elect Conor Lamb to the Senate. = = Dr. Oz just spent $1.2 million of his own money on ad buys, all in the blink of an eye. And with a net worth of approximately $100 million, Dr. Oz has virtually unlimited money to spend on his own race, meaning he has zero incentive to listen to the people of Pennsylvania to earn their vote. That's why we have to do everything we can to make sure Conor wins this race, because we can't afford to entrust our democracy to another celebrity just looking to add a title to their resume. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for all your support, Team Lamb = = *

Peter, Kevin asked us to reach out to you before our mid-month fundraising deadline. He’s been working hard in Washington on behalf of those in our district, and he needs your help. He’s making waves by challenging Nancy Pelosi, and publicly calling her out for her failures in passing a reasonable budget. The Democrats are going to be coming after him hard, and we need your help to build our war chest to fight back. **It is critical that we keep this seat RED in 2022, and we can’t do it without you. Can you please help us hit our mid-month fundraising goal by chipping in what you can right now?**

name: Team Nikki
subject: Ron Recap 😰
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

We’re weeks away from the end of 2021. And from working to protect our environment to holding our state government accountable, Nikki has spent the year fighting for everyday Floridians.

We can’t say the same for Ron DeSantis.

DeSantis has spent the year imitating Trump, acting as a wannabe authoritarian dictator, and running a shadow campaign for the presidency in 2024 — all the while enacting horrifying policies that hurt our state.

Here are just a few of the things DeSantis has done over the past year:
❌Implemented new voter suppression laws to silence voters
❌Attacked our First Amendment right to peacefully protest
❌Enacted a pro-COVID agenda, blocking efforts to keep Floridians safe
❌Cruelly attacked the LGBTQ community and people of color
❌Signaled his intent to ban abortion in Florida
❌Abandoned Florida in the middle of a crisis to raise money for his 2024 presidential run

If this is what he’s done in 2021 alone, can you imagine what he could do with another term? Or, worse, with the presidency?

We can put a stop to it, Peter. We can fight like hell, elect Nikki, and bring something new to Florida. If you’re with us, click here to make a contribution and help us reach our 2021 fundraising goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-dec-2021?refcode=ronrecap]

After the year we’ve had, we deserve something new. We deserve a real leader who will break Florida’s rigged system and deliver results for all of us. And that’s exactly what Nikki will do as our next Governor.

Let’s make next year better by winning this race!

Thanks,
Team Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Tyler Harper for Georgia
subject: ICYMI: TYLER HARPER'S INTERVIEW WITH UCTV NORTH GEORGIA
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, DECEMBER 14, 2021
---
| ICYMI: TYLER HARPER JOINS NIGHT TALK ON UCTV NORTH GEORGIA
---
| OCILLA - In case you missed it, Tyler Harper joined North Georgia's UCTV Night Talk to discuss his campaign for Agriculture Commissioner and his conservative vision for Georgia. Namely, Tyler talked about fighting for our farmers and producers through favorable trade deals and partnerships, supporting and sustaining local farms, and defending agriculture's position as our number-one industry. He also outlined his vision to promote food safety and security within our supply chain, supplementing agricultural education opportunities, and investing in the next generation of Georgia farmers.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JPJsDo19Ot59lO_lknM6hqjjN1fOV8xklSDKI6O85Rh9v5YQVTGWoFSAcN1ozGuRC-5hs2PZN_-VhokXB2UhvCchxFCQST9XpZ_LkcoKTgdlaNYH6JKqt1fc8YLA_L0Mu7SrBQGFzug5E9V1-FhIfn9tu0EyvfJm--SthTOJKa6dh1rKhu_LWQ==&c=hRNKjPECMJuR9zk3x6SF94jUxMa275R7D21WWvq6T6lYCnrnujsVEQ==&ch=zGWolGjQXfPaD3UL31vnhDIen7MCp-IMw8yJBg-JlLdJzfg0g585NA==) or the image below to watch highlights from the interview:

name: Madison Horn via madisonhorn.com
subject: There’s a lot to get done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| I can’t thank you enough for being a member of my grassroots team. Launching our campaign to defeat self-serving party politicians, like Senator James Lankford, and bring true public service back to our state is a tough endeavor, but because of your support we will win.

Grassroots supporters like you made it possible for us to reach our November goal for fundraising — so thank you. We’re building a campaign to elect the first woman Senator ever from our state, and it is your support that will make it a reality.

Lankford has made it clear that he acts only out of self-interest and party politics, while leaving Oklahomans behind. Moving ahead, I will be a leader that fights for the people of my state, rather than party politics, but one thing is clear: We cannot deliver on our promises to serve everyday Oklahomans without building a strong coalition of people across the state. That’s what we must do, and I’m asking you to join us in the fight for everyday people!

**[Click here to follow my campaign on Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39657684/320829333/732552061?refcode=MH_EM_ST_1MO_211214_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTA5OGVkMy1lZTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BsYMFrEehBJBEDOE6O9vmFFsbUWh3ykseqjNb0oyg4Q=&emci=3074d679-5458-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=91098ed3-ee5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5119200)**

**[Click here to follow my campaign on Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39657687/320829337/25329129?hl=en&refcode=MH_EM_ST_1MO_211214_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTA5OGVkMy1lZTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BsYMFrEehBJBEDOE6O9vmFFsbUWh3ykseqjNb0oyg4Q=&emci=3074d679-5458-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=91098ed3-ee5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5119200)**

I am so proud of the strides we made over the past month since launching this campaign. We will continue to stand up for Oklahomans on the issues that matter most: affordable healthcare, quality education for our children, protecting a woman’s right to make decisions for her own body, and more.

This fight is just beginning and won't stop until we ensure everyone in Oklahoma has a voice in Washington.

Thank you for staying with me,

Madison

Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. Together, united by a common set of values, we can work to fight inequities, secure and defend our country, and build a better future. Help support her campaign by **[donating now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39657693/320829343/230617363?amount=10&contactdata=WAoCMzDgEcbP65I%2FsIeKA5oduTUcqWcBCRCo%2Bjd%2FYPTgr1SqgCudfAMt%2BQLHkKVy&refcode2=91098ed3-ee5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=MH_EM_ST_1MO_211214_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTA5OGVkMy1lZTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BsYMFrEehBJBEDOE6O9vmFFsbUWh3ykseqjNb0oyg4Q=)**

name: U.S. Senate Control Alert (IOWA)
subject: You've got to hear about this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Democrats' best opportunity in decades to flip this seat blue ...
| | |
---
**Peter – if you care about Democrats protecting our Senate majority, you have to hear about what's happening in Iowa:**
**First:** Nearly two-thirds of Iowa voters said they DIDN'T want to reelect Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) – unprecedentedly bad numbers for the seven-term incumbent, and Democrats' best opportunity in _decades_ to flip this seat blue!
**Then:** Democrat Abby Finkenauer launched her campaign with a massive outpouring of grassroots support, and The Des Moines Register reported RECORD-LOW approval ratings for Sen. Grassley.
**Now:** **With Sen. Grassley more vulnerable than he's been in years, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep – and expand – our Senate control if we flip Iowa blue.**

body:
I’m looking for the most engaged members of this team to weigh in on my campaign strategy
| | |

As we head into the full swing of the election year, friend, **there is zero room for error**.
After Democrats’ recent defeat in Virginia, we need to be prepared for the tough reality that our 50-50 Senate majority might flip red. **So** **if we're going to keep Senate control,****pickup opportunities like my race in Florida to defeat Marco Rubio are _mission critical_.**
It’s going to take a massive grassroots effort to win in Florida and defend our razor-thin Senate majority, which is why** ** I’m looking for the most engaged members of this team to weigh in on my campaign strategy. That includes you, friend.

Friend,
Yes, it's about that time. We're getting the final campaign finance report of the year ready for the FEC, and wanted to share a few details with you. First, we're proud to report that as I write this email, we have received nearly 5,000 individual contributions since Kirsten announced her candidacy in March. And as of our last finance report, we have raised over $600,000.
**Is that more than the other Democrats in the race?**
Yes. Based on the most recent FEC reports, Kirsten has raised more than both her primary opponents combined.
**Is that more than the Republicans in the race?**
Kirsten has raised more than all but one of the Republicans running in this district. Unfortunately, Gov. Ducey's right-hand man has the backing of nearly all of the AZ GOP "money men" including Jim Click, and is a bit ahead of us. For now.
**So what does all of this mean?**
What this means is that Kirsten is in the best financial position to take on the Republicans next fall, but she needs your help. We need to increase the number of donors, the number of contributions, and the amount raised, all before our Dec 31 deadline. And with the holidays coming up, fundraising could very easily take a dip at the worst possible time.
**How can you help?**
Let's talk numbers. So far this year the campaign has received:

name: Barrier To Entry PAC
subject: 🚨NEW ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Meet Claudia Zapata
body:
Texans deserve representation that works as hard as they do.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39661088/320842286/-100273895?refcode=211214_FR_claudiazapataspotlight_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NjIzZTY5LWY0NWMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IWLr2LfEkt84nxCtiW0J6JHAy4CMDEdFtXVPN6uYU1A=)
---
Peter, We’re absolutely thrilled to announce our official endorsement of **Claudia Zapata for Congress in Texas’ 21st District!**

Claudia represents true Texan values of family and community. Growing up as a daughter of working-class Tejanos, she saw firsthand the hard work her parents and grandparents put in to make ends meet. At a young age, Claudia would pick citrus on her family’s farm, assist her grandpa in hospice, and even clean toilets at the University of Texas-Austin -- where she would later graduate from.

Having lived in both rural and metropolitan neighborhoods, she has seen how the lack of an inclusive government too often leaves rural and low-income Texans behind. Small businesses have gone under, farm owners and field workers have been displaced by large multi-million dollar corporations, and neighborhoods keep expanding without infrastructure to support this growth.

When the power grid system failed her small community, she helped provide families and individuals with essential resources while they were living without access to water and food for weeks, miles from the nearest hospitals and grocery stores. She has watched as her district has suffered and even lost lives because their government had failed them — choosing corporate greed over Texas civilians.

_**“I have learned in my life that the people who are closest to the problems are closest to the solutions”**_

Claudia has the lived experiences of the underserved working-class people in Texas. She’s witnessed the severe neglect and hurt of poor government, but that’s also why she has faith in the positive impact that the right type of leadership can have.

That’s why she’s determined to represent working Texans in Congress and break the socioeconomic barriers in her community. Claudia is ready to change the narrative and set equitable standards for ALL cities and neighborhoods in TX-30, regardless of size. She’s fighting for affordable housing, universal healthcare, clean and safe environments, an increase in minimum wage, good public schools, and more.

At Barrier To Entry PAC, we believe in candidates that mirror our values and reflect the working class, which is why we are so proud to give Claudia our full support. She rejects corporate money, so her grassroots movement is going to need our help.**[Will you rush a contribution today to help us elect Claudia Zapata for Congress so she can champion the working-class Americans of TX-21?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39661089/320842287/-100273895?refcode=211214_FR_claudiazapataspotlight_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NjIzZTY5LWY0NWMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IWLr2LfEkt84nxCtiW0J6JHAy4CMDEdFtXVPN6uYU1A=)** **______[DONATE TO CLAUDIA →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39661092/320842288/-100273895?refcode=211214_FR_claudiazapataspotlight_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0NjIzZTY5LWY0NWMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IWLr2LfEkt84nxCtiW0J6JHAy4CMDEdFtXVPN6uYU1A=)** This movement would not be possible without you. **_Barrier To Entry PAC_**
**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. clean_body: Texans deserve representation that works as hard as they do. | | | = Peter, We’re absolutely thrilled to announce our official endorsement of Claudia Zapata for Congress in Texas’ 21st District! Claudia represents true Texan values of family and community. Growing up as a daughter of working-class Tejanos, she saw firsthand the hard work her parents and grandparents put in to make ends meet. At a young age, Claudia would pick citrus on her family’s farm, assist her grandpa in hospice, and even clean toilets at the University of Texas-Austin -- where she would later graduate from. Having lived in both rural and metropolitan neighborhoods, she has seen how the lack of an inclusive government too often leaves rural and low-income Texans behind. Small businesses have gone under, farm owners and field workers have been displaced by large multi-million dollar corporations, and neighborhoods keep expanding without infrastructure to support this growth. When the power grid system failed her small community, she helped provide families and individuals with essential resources while they were living without access to water and food for weeks, miles from the nearest hospitals and grocery stores. She has watched as her district has suffered and even lost lives because their government had failed them — choosing corporate greed over Texas civilians. “I have learned in my life that the people who are closest to the problems are closest to the solutions” Claudia has the lived experiences of the underserved working-class people in Texas. She’s witnessed the severe neglect and hurt of poor government, but that’s also why she has faith in the positive impact that the right type of leadership can have. That’s why she’s determined to represent working Texans in Congress and break the socioeconomic barriers in her community. Claudia is ready to change the narrative and set equitable standards for ALL cities and neighborhoods in TX-30, regardless of size. She’s fighting for affordable housing, universal healthcare, clean and safe environments, an increase in minimum wage, good public schools, and more. At Barrier To Entry PAC, we believe in candidates that mirror our values and reflect the working class, which is why we are so proud to give Claudia our full support. She rejects corporate money, so her grassroots movement is going to need our help.= ____= This movement would not be possible without you. Barrier To Entry PAC BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. **Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> ____= | || || Barrier To Entry PAC PO Box 6623 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | |

name: Reed Powell
subject: Timothy Barr for Congress Volunteer Opportunity
body:
Hello, my name is Reed Powell. I have just recently come aboard Timothy Barr’s congressional campaign as his campaign manager. One of the very first things I am doing in this new role is recruiting a team of conservatives who are committed to ensuring our Tenth District is represented by a man of faith, a fighter for liberty, and a principled conservative who will represent our values in Washington and stand in the gap against socialism and the left wing radicalism bent on destroying our country. That is why Congressman Jody Hice has endorsed Timothy Barr, and why we need all the help we can get.

Your contact information was submitted via our website and I am reaching out to ask if you are interested in helping our campaign. This race will require the work of countless individuals. I am humbly asking for your support and assistance with our campaign. If you know of anyone else who would be interested in getting involved (or any high school or college student looking for an internship), we would sincerely appreciate all the help we can get. We will be very flexible to accommodate schedules and will have the utmost gratitude for any help we can get.

If you are interested in getting involved, please reach out to me at [reed@votebarr.com](mailto:reed@votebarr.com) and we would love to have you on Team Barr. Our campaign office is opening up after the holidays, and we are very excited for what the next few months have in store. We would love for you to join us.

On behalf of Team Barr, we want to wish you and your family a Merry Christmas and we hope we can count on your support.

Best,
Reed Powell
Campaign Manager

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Vaccine mandates are good.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

I am a business owner, and I KNOW that we need vaccine mandates.

The Senate passed a bill to repeal the Biden administration's rules ordering large, private businesses to require vaccination or testing for workers. It was high-level b.s. political peacocking.

These ill-advised attempts to undercut logical public health policy make me furious. The majority of American adults are responsible enough to get vaccinated for the public good. People like me, and probably you. We know for a fact that for business to get anywhere near back to usual, we need to be protected from the worst COVID-19 outcomes, every single one of us.

Yet these people are playing politics with our lives. We already have to deal with people like U.S. Sen. Pat Toomey trying to politicize public health in our state. And, as it turns out, it's a PA Congressman, Rep. Frederick B. Keller, who’s proposing a similar bill in the House.

We are pissed off, and we are rising up. Join us! Keystone Progress is mobilizing voters through education, organizing, and coalition building. Help us as we build a progressive PA with a donation today.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=121421&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=121421&amount=20]

Thank you for standing up for what's right!

In solidarity,

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

We’re just two weeks away from the biggest FEC deadline of the year. What we raise will set the tone for 2022. And, in order to hit our end-of-quarter goal, we must hit our mid-month goal. =** | | | = | | = \-- Elaine Luria | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support Elaine for Congress, click below to make a donation! | | = Paid for by Elaine for Congress PO Box 66191 Virginia Beach, VA 23466 United States Elaine Luria is a retired member of the US Navy. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Navy or the Department of Defense._

With the fate of our Senate majority hanging in the balance and Joe Biden’s plans to Build Back Better at stake, Pennsylvania is the #1 most important Senate race in the country.

name: Casey Wardynski
subject: * MAJOR ENDORSEMENT **
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
See what Gen. Michael Flynn has to say about this race. Tap or click >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/a12e5eb7af1b09ab/27c9f4f9c2468bc8c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, This is HUGE news – and we need your help to get out the word. **Gen. Michael Flynn, who served as President Trump’s National Security Advisor following a 30-year career in the U.S. Army, has OFFICIALLY ENDORSED me in our AL-05 primary!** I’m incredibly honored and humbled, beyond words. Gen. Flynn is a true American patriot. I’m so proud to have him standing by my side in this race and in our fight to SAVE OUR COUNTRY.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/a12e5eb7af1b09ab/4078f5f70e602499c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Here’s what Gen. Flynn had to say: “In times like these, it is incumbent upon good men to stand up for others. We are witnessing the attempted destruction of our nation from the top down, and we can no longer sit idly by or passively vote for weak representatives to send to our nation’s capital. These are some of the reasons why, today, I am announcing my endorsement of Hon. Casey Wardynski for Congress in AL-5. “Rarely does our country have the opportunity to elect true patriots like Casey Wardynski. I strongly and wholeheartedly endorse him and encourage the citizens of north Alabama to support him at the polls on May 24, 2022.” Please take action today to help us share Gen. Flynn’s message. Forward on this email to your family members and friends... [_**and pitch in $5, $10, $25, or $50 (or more if you can) to fuel our fight!**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/a12e5eb7af1b09ab/253f130f77a96197c3d6b838967d376c/36963) Thank you for your support,
Casey Wardynski

name: Shuwaski Young
subject: A Democrat Who Represents All Mississippians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHUWASKI YOUNG FOR CONGRESS
body:
] | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39663891/320853567/1896748836?refcode=113021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzY5ZDAyMC1mYTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nA4_7JkGPs3NYu8vU3xpIUX8oX_MBMjdUfc7oUJgFJI=)
---
Friend,

From both sides, we’re being bombarded with messages about the economy. Democrats are proud of historic low unemployment rates, and Republicans are dragging inflation and gas prices. But behind the political rhetoric, many families and small businesses are still struggling in ways that don’t fall on either side of the aisle, or span both.

Representative Michael Guest just voted against two of the biggest investments in Mississippi families and economic development in our lifetimes, the bipartisan Infrastructure Bill and Build Back Better Act.

The Infrastructure Bill will bring thousands of jobs, improve public transportation, and rural broadband to the Mississippi economy. The Build Back Better Act would cut taxes for low-income workers, significantly reduce childcare costs, and expand Medicaid to uninsured Mississippians.

**We need a representative in Congress who thinks above red versus blue, who votes for community and constituent needs. We need a fair, living wage, opportunities for Black and minority businesses and support for all small business owners, investments in STEM and agricultural science, and so much more.**

**Representative Michael Guest has proven that the economic needs of Mississippi’s 3rd Congressional District are not his top priority. They will always be mine.**_**[Will you help me spread that message to our neighbors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39663892/320853568/1896748836?refcode=121021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzY5ZDAyMC1mYTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nA4_7JkGPs3NYu8vU3xpIUX8oX_MBMjdUfc7oUJgFJI=)**_

clean_body: ] | = Friend, From both sides, we’re being bombarded with messages about the economy. Democrats are proud of historic low unemployment rates, and Republicans are dragging inflation and gas prices. But behind the political rhetoric, many families and small businesses are still struggling in ways that don’t fall on either side of the aisle, or span both. Representative Michael Guest just voted against two of the biggest investments in Mississippi families and economic development in our lifetimes, the bipartisan Infrastructure Bill and Build Back Better Act. The Infrastructure Bill will bring thousands of jobs, improve public transportation, and rural broadband to the Mississippi economy. The Build Back Better Act would cut taxes for low-income workers, significantly reduce childcare costs, and expand Medicaid to uninsured Mississippians. We need a representative in Congress who thinks above red versus blue, who votes for community and constituent needs. We need a fair, living wage, opportunities for Black and minority businesses and support for all small business owners, investments in STEM and agricultural science, and so much more. Representative Michael Guest has proven that the economic needs of Mississippi’s 3rd Congressional District are not his top priority. They will always be mine.= = We’re going to bring real change, friend – to these national conversations, to Mississippi politics, and to our neighborhoods. Thank you for being with me. – Shuwaski | = | PAID FOR BY SHUWASKI YOUNG FOR CONGRESS

name: Adam Schiff
subject: straight-up looney toons
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, I remember when Democrats used to be able to work with Republicans in Congress on a broad range of issues. When the GOP was a party of ideas, and they didn’t pose such an existential threat to our Democracy. They used to believe in something. I might have disagreed with them on most of their policy views, but they believed in _something_. And one thing we did agree on? That our democracy was vital to the future of our country, and that we needed to lead the rest of the world by the strength of our ideals. That is no longer the case for the GOP. Far from it. This is who best represents the Republican Party today: She’s straight-up Looney Toons. A conspiracy abetting, bigoted, fear-mongering disgrace. But Members like Marjorie Taylor Greene hold much of the clout in the modern-day Republican Party. And of course, she’s lying here. But truth isn’t ever the point for her. She is a kind of vile performance artist, who delights in ginning up right-wing attacks on me, and the threats to my safety that go along with it. The Marjorie Taylor Greenes represent the new base of the GOP. They reject the results of free and fair elections. And they spread anti-Semitism, Islamophobia, and ever more toxic prejudice and bigotry into the public sphere. The worst part? People like Greene could soon be in even greater positions of power. Their threats of expelling me, censuring me, and stripping me of the ability to hold them — and their master — accountable, can very well come true. Their leader, Kevin McCarthy, has backed up these threats on the House floor. Repeatedly. **But here’s the thing, we are the last line of defense against this terrifying future. We must prevent our government’s descent into a reality where truth is vilified and lies are rewarded. And it begins with protecting our House Majority. It begins with us.** **Will you pitch in $10 right now to help ensure my re-election, and to allow me to continue to fight for our democracy?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39663927/320853771/-1966934778?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211214_AM1_V1_S4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTUzN2Q5NC1mOTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uT4f3Upt_3_Xkq2PAdQcYx-3FTQu7DwWlpLFqO2fDD0=)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of Dec. 13th: Opportunity to end the vax mandate!
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* Call your Representative to stop the vax mandate
* If you haven’t yet, submit and send your OSHA vax mandate comment

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
“U.S. consumers should be wary of investments managed by BlackRock Investment management Company,” Consumers’ Research, America’s oldest consumer organization [wrote in an official “Consumer Warning.”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) According to Consumers’ Research, BlackRock is knowingly using investments funded by hard-working Americans to support companies directly tied to the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). BlackRock’s dependence on Chinese investments and relationship with the Chinese Communist Party are simultaneously strengthening the Chinese economy and enhancing the Chinese military while putting investors’ money at extraordinary risk.

The organization has taken their warning a step further, writing letters to 10 governors with state pension fund investments with BlackRock, warning them that the world’s largest money manager was “taking their money and betting on China.” Those states include Washington, Florida, New York, Nevada, South Carolina, Oklahoma, Pennsylvania, Montana, Nebraska and West Virginia.
|
---
**Call your Representative to stop the vax mandate**
Last week, the Senate did the right thing! They used a tool they have in the Senate called the Congressional Review Act to repeal Biden’s vax mandate. Now we expect the House to do the same using the tools available in the House.

Since Pelosi will not allow a vote that undermines Biden’s overreach, we need a tool in the House to get a simple majority vote. In the House, this is called a discharge petition.

**The key takeaway is to call your Representative this week! We can’t let this opportunity get away! We must overwhelm them with calls!**

When you call, ask your Rep. to -
* Support [HJ 65,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._cT0lN0IlMjJzZWFyY2glMjIlM0ElNUIlMjJhY3Rpb25Db2RlJTNBJTVDJTIyNjAwMDAlNUMlMjIlMjIlNUQlN0Qmcz0xJnI9MyZtaWQ9NDQ2OTQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIn0/yV_vjwVxAmFJl9AkZtqteg)
* Sign on as a co-sponsor, and
* NO VACCINE MANDATES. PERIOD.

The important message is to oppose vaccine mandates completely.

If you have a Democrat Representative in the House, you should feel encouraged and should call because two Senate Democrats voted to repeal the vax mandate. There is a chance we can get Democrat Reps. as well.

[Find your Rep.’s phone number.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._8K0eIuBcg)
|
---
A few months ago, Sen. Mitch McConnell drew a red line on the debt ceiling, [writing](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0Njk0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/ffkVZoSU5e7Ymj8Fb9FDJQ), "We have no list of demands. For two and a half months, we have simply warned that since your party wishes to govern alone, it must handle the debt limit alone as well."

This promise has proven to be empty. McConnell caved to pressure and is now backing a bill that would allow Democrats to temporarily suspend the filibuster so they can raise the debt ceiling as much as they want.

Members of McConnell's caucus [aren't happy with Sen. Tommy Tuberville](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) saying, "I'm not real keen on the idea right now, to be honest with you, because we had a red line."

We need leadership that cares more about the nation's fiscal health than playing political games. Republicans should have no part in facilitating the Left's free-spending ways.
|
---
**Submit and send your OSHA vax mandate comment**
Please [submit your comment](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._gDpyJL9uDzUc19g) before Jan. 4th, if you haven’t submitted one yet. [We have a sample comment](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0Njk0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSNzYW1wbGVvc2hhIn0/fhbPXD-XVZTb_lpEE2AESQ) that you can use to help you write yours.

We need to leave comments, even though the courts have ruled in our favor, so far. The issue has not been settled yet, though, so it’s important to continue to leave comments until the deadline.

[**Read the summary of the OSHA rule.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-b4QieXicKXPqw3qQ-gkg)
** **
[**Submit your opposition comment to the OSHA rule.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._lGAUvzGrb2pZ-SxgJ5lA)

**[View a sample comment to reference.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0Njk0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSNzYW1wbGVvc2hhIn0/uSM_wpOdXoqVr0cIXKQBVg)**
|
---
A Los Angeles mother was shocked [when her 13-year-old son told her](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) that he had received the Covid-19 vaccine in exchange for pizza even though his school district hadn't asked for her permission. According to her son, the woman who gave him the shot said, "Please don't say anything. I don't want to get in trouble."

This undermining of parental rights shows how far some on the Left are willing to go to enforce their views on the Covid vaccine. Some have even [advocated](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._4hlXI-o5cXK2v2a2Eddw) that children over the age of 12 be allowed to take the vaccine without parental consent or knowledge.

Giving the Covid-19 vaccine to minor children without parental consent is disturbing and beyond the pale.
|

History**_ The first inhabitants of this land were the Anishinaabe, who lived in symbiosis off the land. When the French arrived, the area now known as the Upper Peninsula of Michigan became an important fur-trading route and acted as a corridor to the western portion of the American midwest. Missionaries then traversed the area in the 1600s. When the Michigan Territory was first established in 1805, it included only the Lower Peninsula and the eastern portion of the Upper Peninsula. In 1819, the territory was expanded to include the remainder of the Upper Peninsula, all of what later became Wisconsin, and part of Minnesota (previously included in the Indiana and Illinois Territories). When Michigan applied for statehood in the 1830s, the proposal corresponded to the original territorial boundaries. However, there was an armed conflict known as the Toledo War with the state of Ohio over the location of their mutual border. Meanwhile, the people of Michigan approved a constitution in May 1835 and elected state officials in late autumn 1835. Although the state government was not yet recognized by the United States Congress, the territorial government effectively ceased to exist. _**[Donate $18.50 to Dr. Bob's campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39664505/320856519/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=18.5&refcode=express_lane_18.5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzEzMGM1NS1mYzVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19OO_oHKe2bwI9rVemwrebHcjtGX2gP_nQGTjIlNrvQ=) so he can fight to protect the Upper Peninsula and advance better policy to ensure Yoopers continue to thrive.**_ President Andrew Jackson's government offered the remainder of the Upper Peninsula to Michigan if it would cede the Toledo Strip to Ohio. A constitutional convention of the state legislature refused, but a second convention, hastily convened by Governor Stevens Thomson Mason, consisting primarily of his supporters, agreed on **December 14, 1836** to the deal. In January 1837, the U.S. Congress admitted Michigan as a state of the Union. At the time, Michigan was considered the losing party in the compromise. The land in the Upper Peninsula was described in a federal report as a "sterile region on the shores of Lake Superior destined by soil and climate to remain forever a wilderness." This belief changed when rich mineral deposits (primarily copper and iron) were discovered in the 1840s. Today, the Upper Peninsula is a beacon of industry and tourism with a robust, diverse culture thanks to immigration and its Indigenous people. We have 1 day until our next fundraising deadline. body:
We’re just over two weeks from 2022.

That means we’re just over two weeks from an **_election year._**

name: Gary Black
subject: re: It comes down to this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/36d2f1a4748465c5/8642c86ea7bf5cf2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I’ve got the trusted experience to do the job, and because Raphael Warnock must not have six more years to fundamentally change our state and country. **

---
But in order to win, we must have the resources to compete on the field.
Asking for money is not my favorite thing to do, far from it, but our need is great and it’s urgent. If you haven't given to our Mid-Month fundraising drive yet, [**will you stand with me now to take back Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/36d2f1a4748465c5/d3ee7181cb1d774bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/36d2f1a4748465c5/94f930435fc336bdc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
With your help, we can restore a Republican Senate majority with one conservative vote. With that majority, we can _**protect**_ voter ID, _**secure**_ our border, _**fund**_ our police, _**stop**_ Biden’s outrageous spending, and _**renew**_ our energy independence. **But in order to do that, we must overcome Raphael Warnock, the Democrat machine, and the Swamp — all of which are raising and spending millions to keep their power. ** That’s why emails like this — and Mid-Month fundraising drives like these — are so vital to our efforts. [**If you’re able, I’m personally asking you to donate whatever you can here and now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/36d2f1a4748465c5/53948bd4c48d2169c3d6b838967d376c/37793) Your support will make the difference in taking back the Senate and sending a message that Georgia is a **RED** state.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/36d2f1a4748465c5/91984b714ebc1639c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/36d2f1a4748465c5/3fb89cb035846657c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/36d2f1a4748465c5/49d20761d00ab549c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=36d2f1a4748465c5&d=9fc296b1406ca8e1c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=36d2f1a4748465c5).
---

Athens, GA 30604

Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts. With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, .

body:
Another election year is here. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39665887/320864025/823540626?refcode=ea.58c67386-005d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.58c67386-005d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGM2NzM4Ni0wMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMvwyCnjbAX0gaLNCTucf-gnelpnq0p4OcDU8fUbTR4=&emci=6cad07d3-ec5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=58c67386-005d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
In 2022, Republicans only need to flip FIVE seats to win the majority in the House of Representatives. **And they’re willing to do _whatever it takes_ to win those five seats, Peter. **Across the country, far-right legislators have gerrymandered congressional maps to shut Democrats out of power. They tried it here in North Carolina, too. Republicans know that their best shot at winning isn’t running on the issues — it’s giving _their voters_ more of a voice than others. **In just about two weeks, it’ll be an election year once again (we can hardly believe it either).** And Roy is committed to spending every spare minute of it working to support Democratic candidates here in North Carolina — because he knows that having a Democratic governor alone isn’t enough. **[Roy knows that DEMOCRATS CAN WIN in our state, but only if we work together. If you’re with us in the fight, click here to chip in whatever you can right now to fuel our work ahead>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39665889/320864027/435245919?refcode=ea.58c67386-005d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.58c67386-005d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGM2NzM4Ni0wMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMvwyCnjbAX0gaLNCTucf-gnelpnq0p4OcDU8fUbTR4=)** Our Democratic leaders in Washington are key partners to Roy’s work here in North Carolina. Just after President Biden took office, Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan to pull communities back from the brink during this pandemic. More recently, they approved an infrastructure plan that delivered nearly _$9 billion_ to improve our state’s roads and highways, broadband networks, and more. But there’s more work to be done — work that won’t happen if Republicans take back the House. Meanwhile, North Carolina’s GOP legislators have done all they can to gerrymander our congressional maps so that they’re _guaranteed_ to win at least 70% of our House seats. So far, those clearly partisan maps have been held up by GOP appointees in the courts. **But we can’t get complacent, Peter. We can’t assume that we’ll succeed in getting new maps approved before the midterms.** **[There’s a lot of hard work ahead for Democrats, and we’ll be there every step of the way. clean_body: Another election year is here. | In 2022, Republicans only need to flip FIVE seats to win the majority in the House of Representatives. And they’re willing to do whatever it takes to win those five seats, Peter. Across the country, far-right legislators have gerrymandered congressional maps to shut Democrats out of power. They tried it here in North Carolina, too. Republicans know that their best shot at winning isn’t running on the issues — it’s giving their voters more of a voice than others. In just about two weeks, it’ll be an election year once again (we can hardly believe it either). And Roy is committed to spending every spare minute of it working to support Democratic candidates here in North Carolina — because he knows that having a Democratic governor alone isn’t enough. = Our Democratic leaders in Washington are key partners to Roy’s work here in North Carolina. Just after President Biden took office, Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan to pull communities back from the brink during this pandemic. More recently, they approved an infrastructure plan that delivered nearly $9 billion to improve our state’s roads and highways, broadband networks, and more. But there’s more work to be done — work that won’t happen if Republicans take back the House. Meanwhile, North Carolina’s GOP legislators have done all they can to gerrymander our congressional maps so that they’re guaranteed to win at least 70% of our House seats. So far, those clearly partisan maps have been held up by GOP appointees in the courts. But we can’t get complacent, Peter. We can’t assume that we’ll succeed in getting new maps approved before the midterms. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks so much, Team Cooper = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. **It’s time we have a representative in Congress who brings meaningful change to the North Country instead of wasting time at Mar-a-Lago.** I’m running to restore honorable leadership for our community, but I need your support. name: American Update
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8284%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=fotK5h2Nu%2fSLyY%2frSMnHjg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10692%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=biUvAOtJGwHrHVrWJ%2bAKHg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10693%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMkVpmFHd4A9xHVXUBDrFg&sysid=1)**_
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10694%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=95Juel3ulW8b4Lv42COaIw&sysid=1)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through We must add hundreds of thousands more subscribers in 2022!
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and new Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10605%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=syN2ugupCVUdQxB0FtxAGQ&sysid=1)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s latest book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.” ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10606%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gDoNrY9J0lP0bgMr0XLkFQ&sysid=1)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8284%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=fotK5h2Nu%2fSLyY%2frSMnHjg&sysid=1)_

name: Kari Lake
subject: I walked away from the mainstream media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Arizona
body:
Despite being number one ratings for over two decades, I walked away from my career as a news anchor because the mainstream medi
_Sponsored message_
| | | | |
---
| | Friend,

Despite being number one ratings for over two decades, I walked away from my career as a news anchor because the mainstream media has become part of the problem in America.

The radical Left is viciously tearing this country apart at the seams, and **the press has become its number one cheerleader and accomplice. **The corruption must stop.

To stand up for truth and common-sense, America first conservatism I am now running for Governor of Arizona – and with President Trump's total support I am leading the rest of the field by double digits.

After an election ripe with fraud, President Biden thinks he has Arizona under his thumb. But a **political tsunami is coming in 2022** , and Arizona has the chance to lead the way.

**To stamp out Biden and the Left's Big Government socialist experiment, we need patriots in all 50 states to stand up and help, and need your support now.**

**[This is a key race that we can and must win, and I hope you will donate today.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpr2e1312r64i25a174uvemsbbl2kep92d203nb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg62o72cjh2bs)**
---
|
---
|
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztq0sos2gtjrl98fpuocjlo82jebtas4oek3hslg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg62o72cjh2bs)
|
---
|
---
Some of our nation's most beautiful places are being destroyed by progressive policies and people are either leaving in droves, or finally standing up to throw out the bums who are making their lives worse, not better.

That's what we saw in Virginia just last month, and I believe this is just the beginning.

As Governor of Arizona, I will ensure that we once again champion the American West's timeless values of freedom, individualism and courage. That means:
|
---
✅ **NO to all COVID and vaccine mandates, both government and private
✅ Protect election integrity, starting with Voter ID
✅ Finish the wall and secure the border
✅ Empower parents and restore honest, patriotic education in our schools
✅ Back the Blue and take the fight to criminals**
✅ **Protect the right to life and religious freedom**
|
---
We've put our trust in politicians for too long, and they've nearly rendered us helpless against the very aggressive and unending onslaught of the Left. But patriotic Americans are standing up, and inch by inch we're going to take back our country.

**[Arizona is a key piece of the equation, and I need your help now. Can I count on you?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5kqp3tnbmnkmngpsf18gmsmbi3i1ngvis0t00vo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg62o72cjh2bs)**

Thank you, we've got a lot of work to do.

With love,

Kari
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zuqvgubo4kdrf5njjs2kf4hlp7dmhresfv872bk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg62o72cjh2bs)

name: Team ODP
subject: We have a plan to win, and your support is crucial to its success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
Election Day is less than a year away, and Ohio Republicans are gearing up to do whatever they can to hold onto Ohio's governor's seat, Ohio's open Senate seat, and take back both the House and Senate majorities in 2022.

**We have a plan to stop them** \-- but we need your help to continue building the infrastructure we need to flip Ohio blue in 2022.

We'll be honest, our December fundraising is off to a slow start. Hitting our monthly fundraising goals is essential to ensuring we have the resources to train Democratic candidates up and down the ticket, grow our volunteer team, and fight back against whatever attacks national Republicans throw our way.

We have to kick it into high gear to get back on track. That starts with hitting our December mid-month fundraising goal before tomorrow's deadline -- and we're counting on our best supporters to help us get there.

[**Help us get our monthly fundraising back on track by pitching in $5 or more to help us hit our December mid-month fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39668335/320875449/1492199982?refcode=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___opd_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___opd_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDNmMjNhZS0wOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N_r10Db18WDuWxcYYPqU11uzqk5YOQGgVBnfhHCShuY=)

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39668336/320875457/1492199982?refcode=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___opd_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_mm2_fndd_gq_act___opd_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDNmMjNhZS0wOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N_r10Db18WDuWxcYYPqU11uzqk5YOQGgVBnfhHCShuY=)

name: Bo Hines
subject: Nancy Pelosi Fired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress
body:
Peter --
The polls show a massive red wave is about to
sweep Democrats out of power in 2022.

But firing Nancy Pelosi is not enough.

Trading out one set of
establishment swamp politicians for another will not stop Joe
Biden's lawless assault on our liberties.

America First patriots
must elect a conservative majority that learned the lessons from
Donald Trump and FIGHT back against the socialist left and their
allies in the fake news media and big tech.

My name is Bo Hines, and
I'm running for Congress as the 100% pro-Life, 100% pro-Gun, and
100% pro-Trump candidate in North Carolina.

But before I ask for your support, I want to
tell you a bit about myself.

I earned a football
scholarship to North Carolina State University through hard work
and dedication.

I later attended Wake
Forest Law School after experiencing firsthand the cancel culture
and leftwing indoctrination on the campus of Yale University.
And I'm running for Congress because you and
I both know something is wrong in America right now.
STAND WITH BO HINES
CHIP IN $10 RIGHT AWAY
I really hope I can count on your help in
fighting to take our country back.
Joe Biden's trying to
jam needles into the arms of every American - even small children
against the will of their parents.

The FBI is spying on moms and dads at school
board meetings that protest mask mandates that harm their
children and critical race theory that teaches students to hate
this great country.

Joe Biden opened the
border to a record flood of illegal aliens marching into our
country.

If you ask any questions about the November
2020 election, Big Tech bans you, and Joe Biden's FBI may burst
through your door arrest you.

Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi,
and Chuck Schumer are pushing trillion in new spending to turn
American into a socialist nation by imposing the Marxist Green
New Deal and creating a cradle to the grave welfare state.
Enough is enough.
STAND WITH BO HINES

CHIP IN $10 RIGHT AWAY

Conservative champions like Reps. Marjorie
Taylor Greene, Madison Cawthorn, and Paul Gosar endorsed my
campaign for Congress.

I hope I can count on you to join them by
chipping in your most generous contribution to my campaign.

Your donation will allow my campaign to run
TV and online ads, direct mail, and phone banks to let voters in
the North Carolina that I am the America First conservative in
this race-ready to take the fight to Congress.

Like Donald Trump, I'm sick and tired of the
all-talk and no-action career politicians.

If elected to Congress, I promise to:

*** SUPPORT legislation to fire Dr. Fauci.
Dr. Fauci lied to Congress and must face criminal prosecution;
*** DEFEND election integrity. I support
voter ID laws, and I will oppose any effort by the Democrats to
impose the shady vote by mail and ballot harvesting schemes
liberals employed in the 2020 election;
*** OPPOSE all unconstitutional gun control.
No gun bans and no red flag laws;
*** BUILD the wall. The biggest winners from
Joe Biden's open borders policies are drug cartels and human
smugglers; and
*** STOPPING Joe Biden from imposing any more
illegal vaccine mandates or economy crippling shutdowns.

If you agree these should be the priorities
for a new conservative majority in Congress, I hope you will chip
in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 - or whatever you can
afford - to help me fight for your values.

I understand why so many Americans are angry.

Too many establishment Republicans are afraid
to take on these fights.

They fold as soon as CNN calls them names.

I promise you I will never flinch in fighting
for the America First agenda.

That's why Reps. Marjorie Taylor Greene,
Madison Cawthorn, and Paul Gosar endorsed my campaign for
Congress.

I'm asking that you join them by chipping in
a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 - or whatever you can
afford - right away.

These past 18 months of COVID imposed tyranny
by Dr. Fauci and Big Government politicians like Joe Biden proved
one thing.

Petty tyrants and wannabe authoritarians will
never willingly give up the power.

It's up to "we the people" to take our
country back.

You and I have the chance to do just that
next November.

Runaway inflation, the debacle in
Afghanistan, and an invasion at the southern border whipped up a
tsunami of opposition to the Democrat's socialist agenda.

But conservatives cannot afford to elect
anymore Republicans looking to bend the knee for CNN or MSNBC.

That's why I'm running for Congress as a
proud, pro-life, pro-gun, and pro-Trump conservative.

But I need to know if I can count on your
support.

Will you join stalwarts of the America First
movement like Marjorie Taylor Greene, Madison Cawthorn, and Paul
Gosar by chipping in a contribution today?

STAND WITH BO HINES

CHIP IN $10 RIGHT AWAY
Your generous support will send a message to
Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Ilhan Omar that a red
wave is building to sweep them out of power next November.

I am a fighter through and through.

As my wife and I embark on a journey to start
a family, I hope to help make a better life for yours by
preserving our values and our heritage.

If you believe in this country as I do, I
humbly ask for your support in this campaign.
Sincerely,

Bo
Hines

Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 17, 2021.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWj3wSoHNQ

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWj3wSoHNQ
