name: ICYMI News
subject: What Does “The Good Life”Look Like?
body:
Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find myself in that position as well. It’s part of the hum
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlc5b3t6qph8fibi5tm25qv0kbtdd7bh0b32tlso_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg62o74c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Knowledge, Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find myself in that position as well. It’s part of the human condition to be faced with difficult situations, choices, and people. We teach at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider concepts such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character, and justice when we face difficult questions. In the _Nicomachean Ethics_ —the first book written on how best to live—Aristotle argues that human happiness chiefly depends upon a person’s character, which is formed by making good choices. But good choices don’t come naturally. That’s why every student at Hillsdale studies Aristotle. In fact, understanding Aristotle is so important to living a good life that we’ve produced our online course, **“Introduction to Aristotle’s _Ethics_ : How to Lead a Good Life.” **
---
| | And now you can own the course on DVD, along with a special Hillsdale College edition of Aristotle’s _Nicomachean Ethics_ , for personal study. You’ll not only study what Aristotle says about the good life with Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, but you will also explore ways to put this knowledge to work.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9jrdon367i1hjvrc95eaj2efcqj31jj3fg43s98_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg62o74c5h2bs)
---
| | The DVD gives you a seat at the table in a seminar-style class like those here on campus, and you’ll read from the same book the students are in the course. In addition to the topics I’ve already mentioned, the course focuses on subjects including:
* Aristotle’s _Politics_ and the Nature of Man
* Deliberation and Choice
* Practical Judgment
* Contemplation and Action

Just consider what Rebecca, a free online course student, recently said: _“I have learned [through the Aristotle course] that every choice we make etches into our soul.”_ Make a good choice, and watch a special preview video of the course. Then reserve your DVD and book today using this secure link: [**_https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/aristotle-dvd-book-offer_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbbm8rb0l944qb0vn7aiho4vr0sr0in1o1k5i12o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg62o74c5h2bs) After watching the preview, if you’re struggling with a thorny question, I hope you’ll join Rebecca and many others by reserving your DVD of [**“Introduction to Aristotle’s _Ethics_ ”**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj8jtg4vg7ule4ojeh8ivo19olu9u9u9s5l1g6e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg62o74c5h2bs)**** along with its companion book __ today _._ Quantities of the DVD and book are limited, so don’t wait too long to decide. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zo85qmdroqm14rnf36oso87saeopha98cn8pnb6o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Marisa Wood
subject: total embarrassment.
body:
McCarthy is supposed to hold his caucus accountable and put the country over party. Instead he's letting them walk all over him. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39669032/320878282/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTI3MDBjYS0wZDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_n4cXAb2RSXiGSTlAD7UcgUtx2iKhFl7GZm_ASykhoI=)
Friend,

Over the past few months, Kevin McCarthy's true intentions have become clearer, and the stakes in my race have only become more urgent.

Rep. Paul Gosar tweeted a video depicting violence against Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. Rep. Lauren Boebert suggested Rep. Ilhan Omar was part of the "Jihad squad." Then Marjorie Taylor Greene said she wanted to give Kyle Rittenhouse a congressional medal.

**A real leader would hold these extremists accountable. Instead, McCarthy let them walk all over him.** It begs the question, what would they get away with if McCarthy became Speaker of the House? I don't think we want to know the answer. If it weren't so infuriating, I'd be embarrassed for his lack of spine.

Voters here in the Central Valley know McCarthy has been a complete embarrassment to our community. But many don't yet know I'm the viable Democrat running against him. We're working to change that, but we need your help reaching more voters:

**[My FEC end-of-quarter goal hits at the end of the month, and we're coming up short. Will you chip in $3 to help me fill the $7,891 gap on our daily goal? clean_body: McCarthy is supposed to hold his caucus accountable and put the country over party. Instead he's letting them walk all over him. | = Friend, Over the past few months, Kevin McCarthy's true intentions have become clearer, and the stakes in my race have only become more urgent. Rep. Paul Gosar tweeted a video depicting violence against Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. Rep. Lauren Boebert suggested Rep. Ilhan Omar was part of the "Jihad squad." Then Marjorie Taylor Greene said she wanted to give Kyle Rittenhouse a congressional medal. A real leader would hold these extremists accountable. Instead, McCarthy let them walk all over him. It begs the question, what would they get away with if McCarthy became Speaker of the House? I don't think we want to know the answer. If it weren't so infuriating, I'd be embarrassed for his lack of spine. Voters here in the Central Valley know McCarthy has been a complete embarrassment to our community. name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: Demoralized by Education
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a895ba602ad9/demoralized-by-education?e=5167ed8367)
---
|
---
|
---
# When Children are Under Siege by Ideology, Parents are the Solution
Peter,Today, our children are growing up more demoralized as Americans than previous generations. Our students are leaving school more anxious, more at risk for mental health crises, and more likely to be politically radicalized. The last generation to finish school, Millennials, swung more [dramatically towards socialism](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=78918ad416&e=5167ed8367) than most expected. And the next generation will most likely continue to turn away from fundamental American values if ideologies being imposed in the classroom supersedes academic excellence.
| [Help me Restore America, click HERE to DONATE](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=034cf5c429&e=5167ed8367)
---
It’s a shame that many schools are only focused on indoctrination and alienation instead of educating. First impressions are powerful: when your formative years are filled with experiences of social unrest, riots, wars, economic disasters and rising student debt, and part of your education might consists of the terms and concepts that are part of Critical Race Theory, anti-American philosophies and radicalism, it makes sense that a lot of young people think America is fundamentally evil.But we know America has been a force for good in the world – restraining communism, defeating terrorism, and protecting religious freedoms here and abroad. More than any nation in the history of man, it is better to live in America if you are a minority. We are a diverse nation of immigrants, which turns other nations’ tired, poor, and huddled masses yearning to breathe free into a society which offers equal opportunity for all.If there is any nation where you can make a place for yourself better than America, name it.If there is any place better in history where each and every person can thrive and enjoy the blessings of liberty, tell me.
| [DONATE to Defend our Parental Rights](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=3301cc3404&e=5167ed8367)
---
When parents are involved in their child’s education and passing on the story of our Nation, we give our next generation the best chance to carry freedom forward. We should tell the painful story of the blemishes and burdens of an imperfect Nation. We should tell our children about how previous generations moved forward and overcame the challenges that faced them. Parents solely carry the responsibility of raising their children and are the best educators.
|
---
| [VOLUNTEER and Join a Campaign Fighting for New Jersey’s Parents](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=97a75afb0a&e=5167ed8367)
---
I believe parents have proven themselves to be the best educators we have at our disposal. And I will support a variety of education options that work for New Jersey kids. School choice, educational savings accounts, and federal tax credits are good policies because they give parents the power to choose what’s best for their child.For New Jersey,Shawn Hyland
|
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Don't let young conservatives miss this!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn44tjn3n7s63apo5m96n9099nhnijeiju3a0uv0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq7ad346ljmadtl61rm8o9jcdrb3dbkslp3bc9h6kq6ed9h69p71o70carmcojgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661qbad1nmpg6ctb4mdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpieao30s5i6aoh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkll86kq1bcp6vrv2mh9di2rnv0pr4nu083l3ej0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhf1s0umchl31jhf1vmnqc7b8ii4g102v1n76qvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd8duhqikhp8ksfv8tiudjho0kle7upv6aauna6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zksu0gqcfve8kmmgraud59cu5ejvobeo44g7tfu8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs)**[?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znl480tkg99e3ico1qf22es0u5dlge5mcihdat08_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjnkm3t5h81i7a2hflkc833ag96jvhjr168sshug_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zigo50c64gprm82v87g2799ecf4trt37211n7gso_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z39bnch04vinu04vfcjkbsm0obcecef8q5r8soto_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9osjttoblgfrt13oqcldmi74d9smki94ruaa9bg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl3cd1roe5citddbu47g4qt4fodc4gpmjlaraq4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztaq84uriup7ra0m7ginft62ss3qqdtfaqk2q9eg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4tj2s88lo96kb49pbt846l8m7cb75b7icgq3llo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjgngl42177gl6lmqi9vj2h4l3fe6o4avaoahheo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slg61ob4clh2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z4etol8o1anl7ue2k4c7pik6tf5gr9ldsn75v3o8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1veabvr1hkfv7gcph7ucjh0k021jseph6o8u0so_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cjim0o71chim49fg)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: We need to step up for a better 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We need to show Republicans that their efforts are moot
#
We just have a couple of weeks left in 2021, Peter. It’s time to reflect on how to have a strong new year.
_**The most obvious being that we need to defend our Senate majority.**_ But we need to work together, and I need you to make a commitment to keeping the Senate blue in 2022.
**[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or any amount to reach our mid-month goal to defend the Democratic Senate majority? And if you can, will you make that a recurring contribution?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39670463/320884734/-358626674?refcode=dd_em_211214_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjMwZjE1Yi0xMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AnIwsNMviLXo7quu46Dktn49AXQK8_E4rnziyari8Kw=)**
**_We already know that Mitch McConnell and the GOP will try to continue obstructing_ any and all progress that President Biden and Democrats are making for our country. We need to be ready. **
We need to show Republicans that their efforts are moot. We will continue to work hard each and every day to protect working families.
**[But we need you. We are just $14,375 away from our goal. clean_body: We need to show Republicans that their efforts are moot We just have a couple of weeks left in 2021, Peter. It’s time to reflect on how to have a strong new year. The most obvious being that we need to defend our Senate majority. But we need to work together, and I need you to make a commitment to keeping the Senate blue in 2022. = We already know that Mitch McConnell and the GOP will try to continue obstructing any and all progress that President Biden and Democrats are making for our country. We need to be ready. We need to show Republicans that their efforts are moot. We will continue to work hard each and every day to protect working families. = Together, we can continue to have a blue Senate in 2022. My best, Dick Durbin **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: America Victory on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Socialism Survey
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59012935:6DGs96ENm:m:1:3298722022:44ED1BC0783C18ED425E7E86EE1560A8:r) Dear Peter,
Two years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
To say "everyone" is a gross exaggeration. But it's clear that socialism has made--and continues to make--inroads in America, especially among the young.
Today, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of that support and the amount of opposition to socialism. With your input, we can form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of liberty in our country.
**Please give your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59012935:6DGs96ENm:m:1:3298722022:44ED1BC0783C18ED425E7E86EE1560A8:r)**
With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand mainstream Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.
A recent poll showed that 70% of Millennials are either somewhat likely or extremely likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.
**Why is this?**
For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.
For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.
This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels.
_The New York Times_ ' "1619 Project" is a prime example of this. The mainstream media praised this effort to subvert the proper teaching of American history, and its lead essayist even won a Pulitzer Prize.
In the face of such well-financed efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach efforts have never been more urgently needed**.
By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** , your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.
We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence and underlying the Constitution.
As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."
If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today.
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59012935:6DGs96ENm:m:1:3298722022:44ED1BC0783C18ED425E7E86EE1560A8:r)**
In the face of recent successes by the Left, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

You were added to the system October 16, 2021.

name: Phil Arballo
subject: re: our momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arballo For Congress P
body:
We still have a fighting chance to secure our majority against Republican attacks

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39670880/320887070/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTQzZjU0MS0xNDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1nz3hiwaXebMR_9RMhKlm9q_m2kOTAMkyUWItHPQrxA=)
---
Peter, I’ll be blunt: Right now, momentum is on MAGA Republicans’ side.

body:
I know you've been inundated with a ton of email, so I want to thank you for letting me take up a little space in your inbox today to talk about Tom's campaign.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39671328/320888938/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2MwYjc1Ny0xNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JZWx-pJsJN480ZoAtv98FFwTJWBHhDOyqC3n-qbpPGU=)
Hi there,

I know you've been inundated with a _ton_ of email, so I want to thank you for letting me take up a little space in your inbox today to talk about Tom's campaign.

**If you're already fired up about Tom and committed to sending him to Annapolis,****_[I'll ask you to click here and lend him your endorsement now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39671329/320888939/-903084847?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2MwYjc1Ny0xNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JZWx-pJsJN480ZoAtv98FFwTJWBHhDOyqC3n-qbpPGU=&emci=b0a06c4d-3c59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=33c0b757-165d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)_**
If you're looking for another reason to support his campaign for governor, keep reading!

Currently, I represent Queens as the only Asian American Member of Congress from New York State, but I first met and worked with Tom as Vice Chair of the DNC. Together, we fought to rebuild trust and infrastructure within the Party. It was a monumental task, and from the beginning, I saw how much Tom's values guide his work.

He deeply believes change starts when _everyone_ has an opportunity to participate, be included, and succeed. This value powers everything that he does -- from prioritizing outreach to communities that have been traditionally left out of the political process, to diversifying our candidate pool, to his campaign for governor.

**I'm asking you to** **_[endorse his campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39671330/320888940/-903084847?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2MwYjc1Ny0xNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JZWx-pJsJN480ZoAtv98FFwTJWBHhDOyqC3n-qbpPGU=&emci=b0a06c4d-3c59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=33c0b757-165d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)_** **because I know Tom will bring those values of diversity and inclusion to Annapolis to fight for Maryland families.** Under his leadership, kids will finally have a shot at a world-class education regardless of ZIP code. Equal justice under the law won't just be a talking point. Affordable health care and housing will be top priorities. And workers will have a voice.

But the primary field is crowded, and 2022 is going to be impossibly competitive for Democrats. **It's going to take a sustained effort on behalf of supporters like you to get him there.**

**_[Lend your endorsement to demonstrate the power of this campaign and help fight for equal access to education, health care, and justice for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39671331/320888941/-903084847?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2MwYjc1Ny0xNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JZWx-pJsJN480ZoAtv98FFwTJWBHhDOyqC3n-qbpPGU=&emci=b0a06c4d-3c59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=33c0b757-165d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)_**

Thank you,

Representative Grace Meng

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Crime - We are more unsafe than ever before
body:
Help me tackle rising crime
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wE79JrwVXAny6KvlniCibohqREVNnqp5kco1KlbdmAhZ5Fye4p5EKEhllJb332iSGnd_og3lDDWl1K_K8Z4Xt72IGaJFCE_di8ELvGmwJnzl67QwQO_29yMrZhOGhLVxFo2Z_ArOvVMat_lmOaO08ffHLzceunW9&c=M5gBlCkLaX20kssipZQ0RWZc8A82wKlPUNd9QMPUEDUa88MQVfPIWw==&ch=EmUBvqJMUN1AOB7NxwINrvTDC7a8484VNB5_nkyEUAhizLFqDYh5Xg==)
---
|
---
|
# Feeling unsafe? You're not alone
---
It's not rocket science.
You can't defund the police, reduce or eliminate bail, and allow liberal prosecutors to put criminals back on the streets without seeing a spike in crime. I want to see real solutions brought forth at every level of government to address crime, and to ensure rule of law is sustained. Good people should never live in fear in this country.
Last week, the Common Sense Institute issued a report showing drastic statistics that you may already feel (I have friends in Denver who are fearful whereas they never were before).
Among key findings:
* Average monthly crime rate in 2021 is 28% higher than it was in 2011, and 15% higher than it was only two years ago in 2019.
* Colorado had the highest increase in its property crime rate between 2011 and 2020, among all states.
* Colorado's violent crime rate in 2020 is 35% higher than 2011; nationally the rate grew only 3%.
* The 2020 murder rate is 106% higher than in 2011. The rape rate is 9% higher, with assault up 40%.
* Significant increases in organized retail crime and motor vehicle thefts contributed between $1.2 and $1.6 billion to total costs. * Colorado had the highest motor vehicle theft rate among all states in 2020.
Law enforcement--our local police and sheriffs--must have the support they need to address this rising tide of criminality. The federal government has provided funding for states to mitigate the impacts of the pandemic. I want to see these funds go toward bolstering our police forces and providing support for these frontline officers who are willing to risk it all to protect and serve.
Additionally, we must reform our judicial system. We cannot have dangerous criminals out on low or no bail, especially repeat offenders. It goes without saying that we must also secure our borders to prevent criminal elements from exploiting their current porosity.
However, I cannot do this without your help. Please consider a donation right now so that I can go to Washington and effect change. Our nation is dependent upon those who will represent practical solutions to evolving problems. Join me in standing up by giving me your support.
---
|
---

clean_body: Help me tackle rising crime | | | | == | | Feeling unsafe? You're not alone It's not rocket science. You can't defund the police, reduce or eliminate bail, and allow liberal prosecutors to put criminals back on the streets without seeing a spike in crime. I want to see real solutions brought forth at every level of government to address crime, and to ensure rule of law is sustained. Good people should never live in fear in this country. Last week, the Common Sense Institute issued a report showing drastic statistics that you may already feel (I have friends in Denver who are fearful whereas they never were before). Among key findings: Average monthly crime rate in 2021 is 28% higher than it was in 2011, and 15% higher than it was only two years ago in 2019. Colorado had the highest increase in its property crime rate between 2011 and 2020, among all states. Colorado's violent crime rate in 2020 is 35% higher than 2011; nationally the rate grew only 3%. The 2020 murder rate is 106% higher than in 2011. The rape rate is 9% higher, with assault up 40%. Significant increases in organized retail crime and motor vehicle thefts contributed between $1.2 and $1.6 billion to total costs. Colorado had the highest motor vehicle theft rate among all states in 2020. Law enforcement--our local police and sheriffs--must have the support they need to address this rising tide of criminality. The federal government has provided funding for states to mitigate the impacts of the pandemic. I want to see these funds go toward bolstering our police forces and providing support for these frontline officers who are willing to risk it all to protect and serve. Additionally, we must reform our judicial system. We cannot have dangerous criminals out on low or no bail, especially repeat offenders. It goes without saying that we must also secure our borders to prevent criminal elements from exploiting their current porosity. However, I cannot do this without your help. Please consider a donation right now so that I can go to Washington and effect change. Our nation is dependent upon those who will represent practical solutions to evolving problems. Join me in standing up by giving me your support. | | | | | == | | | | I need your help. Please donate to our fight so I can stand for you in the U.S. Senate. I want to hear from you

The holidays are my favorite time of the year. It’s always a special season filled with joy, laughter, and gratitude. One of my favorite traditions is buying pajamas for my family every year that we all wear as we open presents Christmas morning. Last year, everyone got matching elf pjs. clean_body: This is unconstitutional. Last week, the U.S. Supreme Court declined to rule on the Department of Justice’s challenge to S.B. 8 -- the Texas six-week abortion ban that has already been in place for 100 days. SCOTUS is failing women across our country. This decision gives other states the green light to pass similar legislation. The Supreme Court has abandoned the people of Texas and other states that will now pass copycat restrictive abortion laws. Forward movement only, Team Maggie Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! ___ Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer. Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible. _

name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: Only Two Weeks Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=309723e2fa&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | Friends,

In just two weeks we reach a critical end-of-year fundraising deadline. With more challengers entering the race, we need to be well-positioned to enter the new year.

**My campaign brings real lived experience and the courage to take a stand for real solutions.** I believe in building bridges – not burning them. We need to put aside our differences to bring forward policy to improve the lives of everyone in Pennsylvania.

Winning this race will take enough money to get our message to every resident and business in the district. Your support now will help ensure we have the resources to bring a strong voice to Harrisburg, fighting for healthcare reform, improved infrastructure, fully-funded public education, the creation of more family-sustaining union jobs, and policies that address economic resurgence in the district. [**Can you chip in a donation of any amount to**
**help us meet our fundraising deadline?**](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=bf88ddf6dc&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
We need legislation that helps strengthen our communities and invests in infrastructure to rebuild and fund the many resources, nonprofits, and businesses within our district. In the coming year, our boundary lines may change but my dedication to representing the needs and interests of the residents in the district is unwavering. Thank you for joining the movement and investing in our historic run. _Deja_
---
|
### Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=3b0cdce917&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=69b803b005&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39672285/320895578/-1406512299?refcode=ea.0b05a227-195d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.0b05a227-195d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA1YTIyNy0xOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpEuck7fQ4wx4P5l1Ee14uL8wewzavuQ5JIQtiubQys=)

name: CoraForMontana.com
subject: fwd: Our numbers will go public. So will Ryan Zinke’s.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:

I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement next year.

subject: A new district is a new opportunity to work for you.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39672680/320898294/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGI5YWI4ZC0xYzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p3y3b06AbwaH-g9eYwhpLB09zdBnZyXXSyCqgcIqG9c=&emci=267e2a75-735c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=68b9ab8d-1c5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9494239)

| | By now, you have likely heard that congressional district boundaries are changing across the nation due to population shifts as determined by the Census. And last week, Washington state finalized our maps in this process. **What does redistricting mean for the Second Congressional District?** For starters, I am eager to continue to serve my constituents in Northwest Washington and run for office in the newly configured district in 2022. The new district once again includes all of Island, San Juan, Whatcom, and Skagit counties. And in Snohomish County, the new boundary includes communities I am proud to represent today — along with many new areas in South Snohomish County, including Edmonds and Woodway. **I am ready to work hard to represent these new areas, and the rest of the district, to the best of my ability.** A chance to represent so many diverse constituencies is a tremendous opportunity. As our district lines shift, I am excited to get to know so many more of my neighbors in communities across Northwest Washington. **And that means we are going to have to ramp up a bigger organizing operation than we have seen in a while. Because, here at Team Larsen, we do not take anything for granted.** [**Please chip in $3 before the end of the year—we have less than a year until the election, and we have to get started now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39672681/320898295/1596212816?refcode=2021-12-10-newmaps&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=68b9ab8d-1c5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGI5YWI4ZC0xYzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p3y3b06AbwaH-g9eYwhpLB09zdBnZyXXSyCqgcIqG9c=) Democrats build big coalitions. We bring people together. We move our country forward on issue after issue. And that is exactly what we need to do county-by-county across Washington, and state-by-state across America after redistricting. **That is how we can and will win in 2022.** Each fundraising deadline is an opportunity to demonstrate our organizing strength to our opponents and everyone who wants Democrats to lose control of Congress in 2022. [**Chip in now and help our organizing teams get to work in the neighborhoods of the freshly-redrawn Second District.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39672682/320898296/1596212816?refcode=2021-12-10-newmaps&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=68b9ab8d-1c5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGI5YWI4ZC0xYzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p3y3b06AbwaH-g9eYwhpLB09zdBnZyXXSyCqgcIqG9c=) Time to get back out there. name: Abigail
subject: Staying connected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BsBR_DAGIUpR6Rg8zXJjOhO_SpqTFDjmo8vTulEfL68=/z_YmlU9x-UDS7nlBMhkfDqRiiKRFZ6Np0vDdZoHE9fE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211214-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| When I first arrived in Congress, this was the map of broadband coverage across Virginia. Of our ten counties, only two were in the blue!
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BsBR_DAGIUpR6Rg8zXJjOhO_SpqTFDjmo8vTulEfL68=/z_YmlU9x-UDS7nlBMhkfDqRiiKRFZ6Np0vDdZoHE9fE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211214-1-EM&amount=25)
But yesterday, I was in Goochland County to celebrate a $72 million grant that will bring broadband to counties across Central Virginia, including three more in our district! And beyond that, our Commonwealth has just allocated $722 million to cover 72 more localities across Virginia. This is a direct result of purposeful federal investments that I was proud to support and vote for and effective implementation by our governor and his team!

Broadband, broadband, broadband. . . I have talked about broadband with anyone and everyone on Capitol Hill and back home in our district. I have pursued every grant program, every legislative effort, and every platform to elevate the need for and our federal commitment to bringing broadband to our economies and constituents.

Yesterday, as people circulated, celebrating the announcement, a county leader approached me and said, **" Do you remember when you hosted the broadband summit in Louisa?"**

**" Yes, of course,"** I replied. How could I forget? In 2019, as a new representative, I had been proud to bring elected leaders, USDA officials, and academics together to discuss the need for broadband and how to optimize local and federal efforts to get it.

He continued, **" Back then, all you could do was listen, and you did. This makes a difference."**

This is why I love my job because **every day, there is a chance to listen and to make a difference.** Whether it's with broadband or any other issue impacting people's lives, our communities, our Commonwealth or our Country, I listen and work to make a difference.

Your ongoing support helps fuel our campaign. With it, I know we'll continue our work for the people of Virginia's Seventh District. [_**Please consider a contribution today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/BsBR_DAGIUpR6Rg8zXJjOhO_SpqTFDjmo8vTulEfL68=/z_YmlU9x-UDS7nlBMhkfDqRiiKRFZ6Np0vDdZoHE9fE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211214-1-EM&amount=25)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/BsBR_DAGIUpR6Rg8zXJjOhO_SpqTFDjmo8vTulEfL68=/z_YmlU9x-UDS7nlBMhkfDqRiiKRFZ6Np0vDdZoHE9fE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211214-1-EM&amount=25)
---
With appreciation,
Abigail

This is a direct result of purposeful federal investments that I was proud to support and vote for and effective implementation by our governor and his team! Broadband, broadband, broadband. . . I have talked about broadband with anyone and everyone on Capitol Hill and back home in our district. I have pursued every grant program, every legislative effort, and every platform to elevate the need for and our federal commitment to bringing broadband to our economies and constituents. Yesterday, as people circulated, celebrating the announcement, a county leader approached me and said, " Do you remember when you hosted the broadband summit in Louisa?" " Yes, of course," I replied. How could I forget? In 2019, as a new representative, I had been proud to bring elected leaders, USDA officials, and academics together to discuss the need for broadband and how to optimize local and federal efforts to get it. He continued, " Back then, all you could do was listen, and you did. This makes a difference." This is why I love my job because every day, there is a chance to listen and to make a difference. Whether it's with broadband or any other issue impacting people's lives, our communities, our Commonwealth or our Country, I listen and work to make a difference. Your ongoing support helps fuel our campaign. With it, I know we'll continue our work for the people of Virginia's Seventh District. | With appreciation, Abigail * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit =. If you wish to receive fewer emails, =. =

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: A blatant double standard...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8nPQ0cTFskx3leCH3wbXH1SJzoJRLu4tpf0j0xdMnhs3i4Fmse3MkAHGrTWM0zd-QK1lfaPunE0LeQETL2I10auhB_HH6QMN84GxnA8nrkGsqmCP-tjgQ_oIMetBrnf2rVM5B6-pJLpc2CXWhRlWXynyG0s1j_A-7RlJAvA9w8T6DOXG-4QcA==&c=PmtIxWDkVnCtEtiCJ6Uddnv9SgNr6vOgqGuorVBXwhQYOtO69CxKhA==&ch=j4_ylgGqFYRRXX7tv981keQx5itDryIdfSAr_wDP1fl34IB5zvI94g==)

| Peter -
---
| Call it selective outrage from the biased Fake News media...
When Ilhan Omar, avowed Socialist and antisemite, receives death threats (which I strongly condemn, by the way) the mainstream corporate media goes up in arms. We never hear the end of it, and they make it an indictment on our whole party!
Yet when a man literally travels across the country with the intention of killing me, these partisan hacks are silent.
Talk about a blatant double standard...
---

---
| It just goes to show that every last second of their coverage is slanted beyond belief - even on a topic as serious as death threats against members of Congress!

| Ilhan Omar isn't wrong, though...there HAS been an uptick in violent rhetoric towards members of Congress.
But the facts are that this has mostly been against Republicans, from a crazed Bernie supporter shooting up a Congressional baseball game practice to the MULTIPLE death threats against me this year. The fake news media fuels these madmen with their lies and smears against us conservatives.
They don't care about my safety or yours... only their radical, Left-Wing agenda. [So let's keep fighting to expose the Fake News and hold them accountable when our lives are at stake.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E8nPQ0cTFskx3leCH3wbXH1SJzoJRLu4tpf0j0xdMnhs3i4Fmse3MkAHGrTWM0zd-QK1lfaPunE0LeQETL2I10auhB_HH6QMN84GxnA8nrkGsqmCP-tjgQ_oIMetBrnf2rVM5B6-pJLpc2CXWhRlWXynyG0s1j_A-7RlJAvA9w8T6DOXG-4QcA==&c=PmtIxWDkVnCtEtiCJ6Uddnv9SgNr6vOgqGuorVBXwhQYOtO69CxKhA==&ch=j4_ylgGqFYRRXX7tv981keQx5itDryIdfSAr_wDP1fl34IB5zvI94g==)

name: Alex Stovall
subject: I’m getting attacked for being a black conservative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. | Hey Fellow Conservative,

My name is Alex Stovall and I'm running for Congress in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative and I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why...

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I’m SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44445ba8c54f4011815aee410e29e19c&_e=PUeGyboUMVN46w9C4hxkCbZmrS-5OeZvqjQakSDGR24X_EEc478ZMM3XiFawK7StoYTfQY8giXT6NJvw0Yg0Z_2Rgfj8p8oqxmusMpdgA_d1rskcJQY7m6HxqCjcyCwRUhPxkQ3e8qalFg5gQ6JkWQf2kQJjjJOqGaUOOBMkV8JnfOohdpP2SGFJTH_k74xRDdEBy-EiyR8bWlTZZFIJ26NJTmfUvRTLVZ2nFleB9WV3nvbPoTWsBTxQMrGHD5PZuZ36Yvh0MTLQb4_klG7e2BmSCcWrppah5CjiU4TFd3q-C6QYquoBrTtc2Cpm2XKqhyt6d2roi_6SC3tqqr3IpSSzhGYCAbpAUDpFocxMOnp_OTFzHU3HMMhxZK9tuE4W) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I’m in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect Me To The House of Representatives
And Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44445ba8c54f4011815aee410e29e19c&_e=PUeGyboUMVN46w9C4hxkCbZmrS-5OeZvqjQakSDGR24X_EEc478ZMM3XiFawK7StoYTfQY8giXT6NJvw0Yg0Z_2Rgfj8p8oqxmusMpdgA_d1rskcJQY7m6HxqCjcyCwRUhPxkQ3e8qalFg5gQ6JkWQf2kQJjjJOqGaUOOBMkV8I1MFf-qr1153YdKSTB03D9N83UQZO4oqGb1pCh8bXHdvbZgMzAYpUk7XMIKADeKM-w_e6dYLity5eP17WaBKtI4Go9W1jQ1a9A3AgKB_QxBJOzK4gY0VhmiVdN3yraotD4idWB0sqCp_-XrnFeLnNb5WAJZ3uu_QaJzGKeVPw23GGgH-uXZl8zgnhpaGPn46m-ZQ0ps72gyzX3-qN6LZ2Y)
The left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **“You ain’t black”** if you don’t vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44445ba8c54f4011815aee410e29e19c&_e=PUeGyboUMVN46w9C4hxkCbZmrS-5OeZvqjQakSDGR24X_EEc478ZMM3XiFawK7StoYTfQY8giXT6NJvw0Yg0Z_2Rgfj8p8oqxmusMpdgA_d1rskcJQY7m6HxqCjcyCwRUhPxkQ3e8qalFg5gQ6JkWQf2kQJjjJOqGaUOOBMkV8IBtyIpe0oWXG8ZrYaVb7LRGrmC70TfvKA6bYcmuNl528g0arzcNrtl9KMc2LtHqhU6U3I-kAnhASbFmVmalVsauwSKcTNXPFHNhldVHHOCNuiOBb1unDUEIKHXf8M1qxFVHZXnPV1TgVGxT0F4vmaFYQjiHJGKFSXCNejf77KA3NjUdgew2PSVP4yRQV5PRiYKigUmPZo3zAJAvQ8d9VZ_)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44445ba8c54f4011815aee410e29e19c&_e=PUeGyboUMVN46w9C4hxkCbZmrS-5OeZvqjQakSDGR24X_EEc478ZMM3XiFawK7StoYTfQY8giXT6NJvw0Yg0Z_2Rgfj8p8oqxmusMpdgA_d1rskcJQY7m6HxqCjcyCwRUhPxkQ3e8qalFg5gQ6JkWQf2kQJjjJOqGaUOOBMkV8J-sRQsGkj2OohXsQiPUAeu8AbWcEZOSvVBwEQIEee_24AjAopk5y0QhL1z4flTWpsicXXesOFkIxnztgVugBj7KCJxloOcQxn27-VWUHw_0qQYp6KeOVT9bVpxxoSRLGfCS2XAOM6cU2WuUh45sfCOuMnabObEE4L1y6mfMzSdXaQiLa7nzibQqCNxBM3oKZfGhrTvOKcPKfd6ADfloaEA)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44445ba8c54f4011815aee410e29e19c&_e=PUeGyboUMVN46w9C4hxkCbZmrS-5OeZvqjQakSDGR24X_EEc478ZMM3XiFawK7StoYTfQY8giXT6NJvw0Yg0Z_2Rgfj8p8oqxmusMpdgA_d1rskcJQY7m6HxqCjcyCwRUhPxkQ3e8qalFg5gQ6JkWQf2kQJjjJOqGaUOOBMkV8J0Eah-Cmgi457zMH0lZGWTCm0z8ferCm6oKbf6CZur-bKl6wmPiETPKAwMjvhVoL8IhjsLZ5Pa-9ZGQ1rb9js6sqT-L3ektSSpjCgtsY5HZLrBqtA4f21zCvH0B3JU1IuaH7ZvLpX2c7PvS89d9U1-53d3Nv5NScVhFqQffpgjNN2SKlMrTgTgbOXai3_Fil0ojTA6_3ZNLb5gN2JZHgr0)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - [**can I count on you to support my efforts?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44445ba8c54f4011815aee410e29e19c&_e=PUeGyboUMVN46w9C4hxkCbZmrS-5OeZvqjQakSDGR24X_EEc478ZMM3XiFawK7StoYTfQY8giXT6NJvw0Yg0Z_2Rgfj8p8oqxmusMpdgA_d1rskcJQY7m6HxqCjcyCwRUhPxkQ3e8qalFg5gQ6JkWQf2kQJjjJOqGaUOOBMkV8Lizxdiuuq875N0sGu3grGzzM2RKAUPn5elwu4X7SSF4nGsQJpXJn0NcdsB1Zf3aeD1BV82sEFNyBqiDYpbjW6plzfFrzrHVYbAtk_Ho01pHuahb7oLAguxaP3a4UFFSkgvlvaZKQm6RWCrv-0qTaaeCPyk3UtmxEtkOecWtwB-lGNbc7lADX01IWO9Si7nYoxkgYyo2WOqB3Rr3OVzELU9)

clean_body: I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. | Hey Fellow Conservative, My name is Alex Stovall and I'm running for Congress in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative and I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why... I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. Enough is enough. Black conservatives running for public office are being attacked by the Democrats and I’m in their crosshairs. The left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - the leader of the Democrat Party - who said, “You ain’t black” if you don’t vote Democrat. This is more than just upsetting. The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President. You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. Despite my childhood, I persevered. No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it. I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - I need to raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities. I can WIN this race, but I must raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - For Freedom, Alex Stovall Get the latest by following me on social media. | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS Use of military rank, insignia, photographs or descriptions of military service on this website does not constitute endorsement by the federal government, U.S. Department of Defense or Department of Homeland Security. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Russell=20Fry?=
subject: 🎥 Watch Rep. Russell Fry discuss Vaccine Mandates on House Floor 🎥
body:
Legislature reconvenes to pass redistricting plan and anti-vaccine mandate legislation | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
On Friday, I was extremely proud to [fight back](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=445915ccf7&e=44ebe864a7) against the unconstitutional COVID-19 vaccine mandates imposed on South Carolina by the federal government and Biden administration. This is a huge win in safeguarding our personal liberties and medical freedom.
We worked long into the evening Thursday to pass a bill that protects both businesses and the hard-working people of South Carolina. Under this, public entities can not mandate a COVID-19 vaccine, and private employers must honor religious and medical exemptions.

I fought for this legislation because it honors and protects the rights of all South Carolinians. I am proud of what we accomplished this week, and I will continue to fight this federal overreach in South Carolina. The bill now heads to the Senate.

Check out my remarks on the House floor!
---
| | [ ](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=8be9162104&e=44ebe864a7)
---
| _**Redistricting Overview**_ Over the past few months, we have been working to redraw the lines of the South Carolina House districts. Once a decade, the House is tasked with redrawing the lines to accommodate for population shifts as South Carolina continues to grow and change. Last week, we passed a [new plan](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=2eb1351b49&e=44ebe864a7) for our House districts. I look forward to connecting with the people of District 106, both new and old. You can see the proposed House district lines here: [https://redistricting.schouse.gov/housepassedmaps.html](https://FryforHouse.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fbe825a7d15353d1f4f10df98&id=6c4720de37&e=44ebe864a7)

| Peter,

| Kathy Barnette here. I wanted to reach out with a quick message from the campaign trail...
Democrats' vision for America has failed. Inflation and the supply chain crisis are hurting working Americans. We're seeing a crime wave as bad as the early nineties. Yet Congress is too interested in Biden's big-government spending bill to care!
To fix these problems, we need real, thoughtful solutions and hard work - and that's exactly what I'll bring to Washington. But my grassroots team and I can't do it by ourselves! We're behind on making our mid-month fundraising goal, and we need your help!

name: Team Kulla
subject: “What have you accomplished?”
body:
I was asked recently what I have accomplished in my time as Yamhill County Commissioner. Every accomplishment is always a team effort. But, there’s more to it ... | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61b8b8998e01d506a7c243f2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61b8179ba9c72f34b9ed2b01%26ss_email_id%3D61b8b8998e01d506a7c243f2%26ss_campaign_name%3D%25E2%2580%259CWhat%2Bhave%2Byou%2Baccomplished%253F%25E2%2580%259D%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-12-14T15%253A40%253A16Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=7GDwPed7I9wfcDW-x2w_o0a4oxQ%3D)
---
|
## “What have you accomplished?”
---
---
|
---
| _The results of effective leadership can be as clear and easy to see as a freshly worked field; but at other times, they can be more subtle yet still have critical lasting impacts._
---
**A message from Casey:** “I was asked recently what I have accomplished in my time as Yamhill County Commissioner, both at the county and at the state level. The reality: **every accomplishment is always a team effort**. “But, there’s more to it. As you may know, the main role of a _legislator_ is to sponsor bills, hold hearings, and pass the bills. Executives like the Governor have a completely different role: they implement. **County commissioners have a unique position of filling both of these roles and more** : they work in legislative, executive, and judicial roles.“These roles mean that commissioners are responsible for adjusting and approving new statutes for their counties; they implement projects and priorities across a wide spectrum of areas; and they can also be key decision makers in pivotal land-use decisions that can have big consequences for their communities. **These range of experiences as a county commissioner are why I am uniquely-suited for Governor right now**. “Some of my most significant commissioner accomplishments are more nebulous: **they are changes of institutional culture** , which come from **setting priority-based expectations** , **building trust** , and **holding staff accountable while recognizing their accomplishments**.**“Great things can happen with changes of culture**. Under my leadership, for example, Yamhill County Public Works has had a change of culture, from which flows habitat and soil improvements on roadsides, accelerated bridge rehabilitation, and employee retention. “To answer the original question though (‘What _have_ I accomplished?’), I have made a list of my accomplishments on my website [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61b8b8998e01d506a7c243f2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Faccomplishments%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61b8179ba9c72f34b9ed2b01%26ss_email_id%3D61b8b8998e01d506a7c243f2%26ss_campaign_name%3D%25E2%2580%259CWhat%2Bhave%2Byou%2Baccomplished%253F%25E2%2580%259D%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-12-14T15%253A40%253A16Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=yFv7INQZ0vcrqWwWwOxRFrmqNps%3D). All of these are the product of combined initiative and follow through working with an array of team members. This list shows the many areas I am always thinking about as commissioner. Please share with people who want to learn more!”Also, a reminder that we have a generous donor **matching new contributions** , through December 21st. Donations build momentum! Donate [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61b8b8998e01d506a7c243f2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fdonate%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61b8179ba9c72f34b9ed2b01%26ss_email_id%3D61b8b8998e01d506a7c243f2%26ss_campaign_name%3D%25E2%2580%259CWhat%2Bhave%2Byou%2Baccomplished%253F%25E2%2580%259D%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-12-14T15%253A40%253A16Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=SjxhVFjrsL_nyzNvVx7rmaLemTo%3D).As we approach the winter solstice and consider the return of the light, the days will get longer up to the May 2022 Primary. What are you doing to make sure your choice for Democratic nominee will be the choice for Oregon? You can volunteer for texting, canvassing, phone-banking, and hosting a sign [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61b8b8998e01d506a7c243f2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fvolunteer%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61b8179ba9c72f34b9ed2b01%26ss_email_id%3D61b8b8998e01d506a7c243f2%26ss_campaign_name%3D%25E2%2580%259CWhat%2Bhave%2Byou%2Baccomplished%253F%25E2%2580%259D%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-12-14T15%253A40%253A16Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=3R_p7DWKeLWWDdjhQEZBeWORCZc%3D).**Many thanks, Casey & Team Kulla**
---
|
---
**Learn more:**[**www.KullaForOregon.com**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61b8b8998e01d506a7c243f2&u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61b8179ba9c72f34b9ed2b01%26ss_email_id%3D61b8b8998e01d506a7c243f2%26ss_campaign_name%3D%25E2%2580%259CWhat%2Bhave%2Byou%2Baccomplished%253F%25E2%2580%259D%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-12-14T15%253A40%253A16Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=sp4prNcIzs9f0XP4n0axjwQgVew%3D)

--- | | **❝** Oregon faces a crossroads. On the current path, we are headed toward an Orwellian dystopia where Oregonians are subject to ever increasing dictates restricting their God-given rights and freedom. Small business is being eviscerated. Crime, filth, and hopelessness are enveloping our population centers. The forests are burning. If there is one thing that we have learned in the era of COVID, Oregon’s leadership likes to wield tyrannical power and it wants to turn Oregonians into compliant, docile, sheep who obey the orders of their government masters. That need not be the destiny of the descendants of our pioneering forefathers. We are self-reliant, not dependent. We trust in God, not a kingdom of man. We are citizens—not subjects. Oregonians need to seize back their rights by electing leaders who will restore power to the people. Marc Thielman is such a leader. He has successfully stood up to Governor Brown and the bureaucracy. He wants to put education back under your control through school choice. He has a solution for PERS to overcome the stifling government-created debt obligation that casts a dark shadow over the future for you and your children. And if you are tired of seeing your State trashed by homelessness and lawlessness, Marc Thielman is your man. I enthusiastically endorse Marc Thielman for Governor of Oregon.❞ [— Attorney Stephen Joncus](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7ZaHwBN5Kwqo-2B1YPGFDE2tUshUjSGMBnIN0kS-2BREDtPMTjRNovFgAsNJsVhp39FAFA-3D-3DJI0o_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6i2gSZvwe6vTq0J-2B-2FkWXjitxMFVk5wE-2BmKUMsEKY7ulSO8ESujZRQG8ztwUxBagimBztLvNDe7jCxegbpNatnfCh5aobNXM8I-2F9TW4Ez-2BGLhWYXkAZMUTTCNdDj0XYQpG7VPFteYwSmQCs3Iy2uAbw-2B-2BhdTd5JV8Ie7wPLdeeCHFva7WgUpsuCQ9Pnq6ddsDsi9ekmxtYFw-2BTz4SwxvatP07VnLsFjfDlnzDm553hkU2NOic4IVoNs-2FwnpsKiKij8fZGA-2FIRE04bPEIW1ySFbJdAHKQgPLvjTppvT5EOR1o32bu5gQI-2BBKs8ISNvWYsS599x2Yd51j6PsODk-2BMBGEIYIu121wtknts0MVPEQHpTT1ntx28C8OLqU8gGN2mkk9WMwy0tX-2FJQSBrNp-2FCyogKlTzYvcfaX-2FVF47KC6jUFfDZZOvOcIbGhMO9vUwun7C-2BHNo05EmyOwKCYDM8j6lhQndFyPooizH0yVzEg6rZLH-2BNoAd1OlKhCAFpVfXtUC9qGQTSXJPZafrp0vGOCkFQNGXgeHMEXhnOQ9dCpbqwyTfj7spSJ4p8E1Hh0KLD24UWekjztlOKQo6zclunNrXIr12PszfZVXz236ZWYAgXqs8QTa9DACmaItKTljF18gxFhGPbAGZFkspLEajmPdSTbsRIj8Oml7xGs-2FZlFSO8Mv0NFnL8SW-2B9PBZbIgJrikt1IJe2lfAuw9S-2BoByoPQgUXr0mkqZ5-2Bm6BMkbfg9WYMm8-3D) clean_body: | | | | Email not displaying correctly? . | | | | ❝ Oregon faces a crossroads. On the current path, we are headed toward an Orwellian dystopia where Oregonians are subject to ever increasing dictates restricting their God-given rights and freedom. Small business is being eviscerated. Crime, filth, and hopelessness are enveloping our population centers. The forests are burning. If there is one thing that we have learned in the era of COVID, Oregon’s leadership likes to wield tyrannical power and it wants to turn Oregonians into compliant, docile, sheep who obey the orders of their government masters. That need not be the destiny of the descendants of our pioneering forefathers. We are self-reliant, not dependent. We trust in God, not a kingdom of man. We are citizens—not subjects. Oregonians need to seize back their rights by electing leaders who will restore power to the people. Marc Thielman is such a leader. He has successfully stood up to Governor Brown and the bureaucracy. He wants to put education back under your control through school choice. He has a solution for PERS to overcome the stifling government-created debt obligation that casts a dark shadow over the future for you and your children. And if you are tired of seeing your State trashed by homelessness and lawlessness, Marc Thielman is your man. I enthusiastically endorse Marc Thielman for Governor of Oregon.❞ | | | Friend, if you agree with Attorney Stephen Joncus, "support the Marc for Oregon campaign"). Together, we can stop the unnecessary suffering from failed policies and poor leadership, and bring Oregon back to a place of accountability and abundance. | | JOIN US | | | | PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 949, Bandon, 97411

Peter, last weekend I was able to volunteer at a local food bank right here in Ringgold, Georgia.

Here at Team Holly, we try to volunteer every weekend that we are able. It was truly humbling to see how many folks are struggling to afford food inside our district. This weekend showed me just how important it is that our campaign focuses on food insecurity within our community. No child, family, or person should have to go without food.
****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39673556/320902170/-804235033?refcode=em1206&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQwY2NkMy0yMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=42_wxfPKFdzGMi-m31KNQRor3KyB67b7MGSNIMom3JU=)
**One in eight Georgians face hunger, and**** _one in seven are children_****.** This is unacceptable. Our legislatures need to do more to protect our most vulnerable populations. Children are the future of Georgia and we cannot leave them behind.

Large parts of GA-14 are considered food deserts. I spend lots of my time on the road throughout the District and I can say right now, there is not enough access to grocery stores but there’s a huge access to fast food chains. Our team is focusing on putting together the best policies to combat this.

That’s why our Rural Revival Plan is so special. As new studies come out and as we talk to more folks in GA-14, our Plan is able to adapt with the needs and wants of the constituents. The issues Georgians face are not too hard to fix. We need a representative who is working for the people, not against them. **[With your donation today, I know we can get Marjorie out of office. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39673557/320902171/-804235033?refcode=em1214&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQwY2NkMy0yMDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=42_wxfPKFdzGMi-m31KNQRor3KyB67b7MGSNIMom3JU=)**

Thanks for your support,
Holly McCormack.

clean_body: | | Peter, last weekend I was able to volunteer at a local food bank right here in Ringgold, Georgia. Here at Team Holly, we try to volunteer every weekend that we are able. It was truly humbling to see how many folks are struggling to afford food inside our district. This weekend showed me just how important it is that our campaign focuses on food insecurity within our community. No child, family, or person should have to go without food. ** = One in eight Georgians face hunger, and** one in seven are children. This is unacceptable. Our legislatures need to do more to protect our most vulnerable populations. Children are the future of Georgia and we cannot leave them behind. Large parts of GA-14 are considered food deserts. I spend lots of my time on the road throughout the District and I can say right now, there is not enough access to grocery stores but there’s a huge access to fast food chains. Our team is focusing on putting together the best policies to combat this. That’s why our Rural Revival Plan is so special. As new studies come out and as we talk to more folks in GA-14, our Plan is able to adapt with the needs and wants of the constituents. The issues Georgians face are not too hard to fix. We need a representative who is working for the people, not against them. = Thanks for your support, Holly McCormack. | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Dr. Roger Marshall
subject: Your vaccine appointment is coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow patriot, My name is Dr. Roger Marshall and I’m one of only four doctors in the U.S. Senate.

Like millions of other Americans, my family and I made the highly personal choice to get vaccinated. Having practiced medicine for nearly 30 years, medical decisions are between you, your family, and your doctor. Period.

But let me be clear, **nobody should force you to get the vaccine if you don’t want it**. Vaccines should NEVER be mandatory — and I’m leading the fight to block ALL of Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates.

Last week, **I attempted to block funding of the federal government** until Democrats stopped enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandates. And I’m not going to stop fighting against the destructive mandates Biden is attempting to enforce.
**_
[I’d like to know if you would support another attempt to defund the government if it meant blocking the enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandate.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b2f5bf7753014503afd30a90d52790ff&_e=BoCHKFxq1Kyimc5Y_SXQwVCrTDRjXh_tbxLZZW7vE-9U-owLwl9dSIyty33YSi-xniAJZUpZjhx94hyA6GLYoDGIbtUvd8HJG64jkbUdoy93ChsUwPy1FYGjYLMWEvY4L63rjiYMvgPWuYAXz8l3wpOSYvUjiuoT5a_qTJ6ES3gNNyBuYCAyrxeC7uGzRhWlEFiVHgxupBxWRQ3UTyMDAv0Qmhyn3QMgWv8Dgasnh-w8o-_I_gHZNv87BNYga-Bjc8aTO_qdM30SS1qgDloUXYIIkxBwBLwFHkj6BPFpcUOQAo3BkqypPqxjpzp9l2lnEsaI_HYiCA1yyhTs510-sQWmvgwES_VvK0NT4UkZpVmk9toN5kQIjOf3bWZ_7Gx7YWVaxGXyz3DkrITR1NT4DPMB2tcPSpon34xKu5c039iyzJfTsTk9jCwc_rT00LhOeK8qOkzbSfHHfxIjJIwb0byQRTwBIeK6PDv-2YqLVJo-ADMc7fq-_VwS72LNIeLn)_

name: Craig Murphy
subject: Businessman and Former Police Officer, Willie Vasquez Ng Announces for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Willie For Texas
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GR6uQEiybvysC6Zk4ujoy0_AcnlNcSAa0kU9nrBWEDgUS8CYT9QOiOcgXV-2CWaXUngoyjrShL_xnqsL7USiSt-X0KtUvl7TqzyQUTgaJLlMuvjstLYZF6hrSfm6wh2bvx_JdCs6e7TZFeErMVva1_zz9iqEnnQf&c=NXd_XalIu7Gd8J6QczmCAnkRgp7pv-hbFRPL96cySZMU67OWvj0Gxg==&ch=CzrpBqU5NE6XPtepQdoUo0CbEolKyBdmfhkU3oa4mD8FRV42m6yYUA==)
---
|
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT: Craig Murphy EMAIL: craig@murphynasica.com PHONE: 817-845-0111
---
| Businessman and Former Police Officer, Willie Vasquez Ng Announces for Congress

---
| Former San Antonio Police Detective, Chief Criminal Investigator, and successful security entrepreneur Willie Vasquez Ng today announced he will run for United States Congress in the Texas 28th Congressional District.
The Conservative Vasquez Ng, a Hispanic and Asian American, will challenge Congressman Henry Cuellar in the Texas "swing" Congressional district - one of only four such swing districts in Texas.
District 28 is a 9-county district that runs from San Antonio in the north to Laredo and Rio Grande City on the U.S.-Mexico border, covering part or all of Bexar, Guadalupe, Atascosa, McMullen, Webb, Duval, Zapata, Jim Hogg, and Starr counties.
Willie Vasquez Ng grew up on the southeast side of San Antonio as the grandson of an immigrant. His grandmother was born and raised at the Texas border in Laredo. He grew up in a low-income household but with a strong love for the nation that had brought his parents together. A 22-year veteran of the San Antonio Police Department, Willie started as a Patrol Officer and was promoted to Detective Investigator and a Special Federal Deputy Marshal assigned to the U.S. Secret Service Task Force. Willie was then appointed as The Chief Criminal Investigator for the Bexar County District Attorney and used his experience in law enforcement to establish a successful private security firm that has grown to 100 employees.
"America is the greatest nation in the world, but to keep us number one we must address issues like violent crime and border security," said Willie. "We must avoid the mistakes that destroy successful countries, like high taxes and regulations that make it harder to get a job. And we must keep our nation unified by rejecting divisive philosophies like Defund the Police and Critical Race Theory."
Willie has a strong concern for stopping crime. He became a police officer after one of his family members was murdered and shortly after joining the department another was murdered, and he believes that "we must gain control over crime because if we do not, we risk losing all we treasure. Where there's high crime, there's no economic development, no workforce, and poor education. Without public safety, there is no prosperity."
The 28th District has been trending more and more Republican for a decade as Democrat policies have hurt working people. South Texas has been at ground zero with national Democrat policies that attack the ability of people to make a living and live by their own values.
Willie and his wife Ruby have been married for 14 years. She helped him survive stage 4 throat cancer in 2017. They attend Cornerstone Church and Willie has built his life's success first upon his Christian values.
Watch Willie's story [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GR6uQEiybvysC6Zk4ujoy0_AcnlNcSAa0kU9nrBWEDgUS8CYT9QOiOcgXV-2CWaXwcG_q1iJeKh7U1NuqNVZucK4_MGs6g5gteIdlokIdfca90uRUrIFMpO4PZvKXIAuX-4sgjM4rG9VbGKkhe-Y82_vp_yH-LDzj2bPpQ9uF0DDMc_xL0JHjQ==&c=NXd_XalIu7Gd8J6QczmCAnkRgp7pv-hbFRPL96cySZMU67OWvj0Gxg==&ch=CzrpBqU5NE6XPtepQdoUo0CbEolKyBdmfhkU3oa4mD8FRV42m6yYUA==) and go to his website to learn more about him at [www.williefortexas.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GR6uQEiybvysC6Zk4ujoy0_AcnlNcSAa0kU9nrBWEDgUS8CYT9QOiGzHkiIkbaENnp_yLfUysI0Q_QXhCf9wiE0gytVSkqdmjhHtTPH9IFtHQ9MwDomV4QFyMNn2AzZ06VegaO3uMpg4OHn7y3EY3Q==&c=NXd_XalIu7Gd8J6QczmCAnkRgp7pv-hbFRPL96cySZMU67OWvj0Gxg==&ch=CzrpBqU5NE6XPtepQdoUo0CbEolKyBdmfhkU3oa4mD8FRV42m6yYUA==).
## 30 ##

subject: I’m the Green Beret who is draining the swamp
body:
And I am standing up to the Biden-Pelosi socialist lovefest
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9hts8to9r5a570aq4d4q3uu244ghvqaenttnaq8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrb3c3gc2qr6p3nmip60pljeup38dbnm9jb2ohl69jjctpm6dge3cbgmarm6s9gsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661qbad1gepimcc9kmdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpieap35cdi6aoh5u)
American Patriot, When I enlisted in the military on January 3rd, 1996, I did so because of the passion and respect that I felt for my country.

That same passion and respect kept me in the battlefield after being shot in the arm, kept me strong to perform surgery on myself in combat, and pushed me to return to active duty after **LOSING A LEG**. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt1ggegl4v0b1lmtfjcdnnptn5vnfnmjl5o3jft8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli6aor4clh2bs) But when I look at leaders like Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi, I do not see passion or respect for our country. I do not see patriotism or a love for the American spirit. What I see are corrupt, self-interested career politicians pushing a socialist agenda to **DESTROY** our country. [**STAND UP TO BIDEN AND PELOSI**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z96qa8ki2vg2r21jpnfpiltp6n335a00qknq32b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli6aor4clh2bs) I am a retired Green Beret and Purple Heart Recipient running for congress because we need more combat-tested leadership and less socialist swamp creatures setting out to flip America on its head. **[Will you help me stop the Biden-Pelosi socialist lovefest in Washington, and return our government to be one of, by and for the people? >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z20qs7frlc6rj3m0d35itsvtg4o9sud029mad4k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli6aor4clh2bs)** [**CHIP IN $25 TO DRAIN THE SWAMP**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2hodkqovqsvvkqa37np5r4bf10tek8pupmggpmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli6aor4clh2bs) [**CHIP IN $50 TO DRAIN THE SWAMP**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9543tvff7mogqmq0negqi0mc5prmf6irjtfevcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli6aor4clh2bs) [**CHIP IN $75 TO DRAIN THE SWAMP**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu6kchptdeol53cvvb8pqpn9mis2jdba2ett1dfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli6aor4clh2bs) [**CHIP IN $100 TO DRAIN THE SWAMP**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqovq75570u46ss7hich222pbufrn3nr33nkgmj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli6aor4clh2bs) Thank you, Jay Collins Jay Collins is a retired Green Beret, non-profit executive, father, husband and Republican candidate for congress. Collins has fought to protect and provide for American families for over two decades. He’s ready to continue that fight in Congress and put a stop to the far left socialist agenda that hikes taxes, blows out government spending, threatens national security, and fails to put the American people first. Folks,

_Meet the Press_ ’s Chuck Todd had these predictions for our race. From my perspective, it’s great news.
* Charlie is “the most formidable foe for DeSantis”
* This race will be decided on the margins
* “A gust of wind the day before the election could be the difference between [Gov. DeSantis] winning or losing.”

_Morning Joe_ ’s Mika and Joe didn’t hold back either in describing how things look for Gov. DeSantis:
**“One new poll shows DeSantis could be losing support in his state...DeSantis trails Democratic Congressman Charlie Crist by two points...this marks a major change for DeSantis.”**
As Charlie’s finance director, I know that if we’re going to stay competitive with Gov. DeSantis, we don’t have any choice but to raise as much money as we can by the end of the year. Like Chuck said, this race could come down to just a handful of votes.

We’re not going to leave anything up to chance -- we’re going to fight hard for every last vote. But to be honest, I need to ask supporters like you to pitch in a few dollars now. **_With your help, we will stay on track toward defeating Gov. DeSantis!_**

**[Can you help us get there? name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: your input matters to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
