The final weeks of this year will be extremely contentious — and consequential — in the U.S. Senate. Democrats still need the votes to pass the Build Back Better package and make it law before the end of the year when the monthly child tax credit program will expire, affecting millions of families. And without an agreement on a filibuster work-around, we will not be able to pass voting rights protections between now and the end of the year. I know where I stand on that — we can never give up on making progress for the American people — we must take bold action now to break this deadlock, protect voting rights, and deliver for hardworking American families. As we head into the 2022 midterm election year, I want to make sure your voice is being heard. [Will you please take a few minutes today to complete our short priorities survey? Your input is important to me >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39673778/320903226/-1346739065?refcode=CVH_EM_SV_3MO_211214_1_1&refcode2=0ada9680-215d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&contactdata=V8U7LkVZ122uYxAITdoo9G9IEGMfYU1Jf5knOXtjXpy02nGykTChRybJSOV%2Bd2C8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWRhOTY4MC0yMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EYHhtb-02r6L8OS8TJqbJKOUVlb7gs4xiHdVcql5a5A=&emci=9a14a9c6-0c5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=0ada9680-215d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2216363) | [ADD YOUR INPUT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39673779/320903230/-1346739065?refcode=CVH_EM_SV_3MO_211214_1_1&refcode2=0ada9680-215d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&contactdata=V8U7LkVZ122uYxAITdoo9G9IEGMfYU1Jf5knOXtjXpy02nGykTChRybJSOV%2Bd2C8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWRhOTY4MC0yMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EYHhtb-02r6L8OS8TJqbJKOUVlb7gs4xiHdVcql5a5A=&emci=9a14a9c6-0c5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=0ada9680-215d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2216363)

Your feedback today will directly help shape my strategy in the new year. Take my Official 2022 Strategy Survey before midnight. | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee99e428ba5b4f54a260700a47d7311c&_e=9dNCPY7RhY-ZlnpVzIJijz08hcMC0SS969IMc_PqhBKP2_g7ogKkyTrWPigOcA1sStYc0LVCSOxgG6fF6XLZgrhNB5PWEmLqOvSqNxxKNPbvesyPvx1QbXGK6d8vOeGj03NLxx8UibzE5FY9n9fTc-3xcgYcoR64dv2MLTFe2SloXu-gkn2USgzvFwZq-4pDy1w-4hw7100oxPU0VLs5se3BVJGxS4SFzPoZ9-4pntOpEkunw7UK0WlkKdYjCPCWMq7p62ISJAM-F58nGTR8nN-4WTFHqbowh0JyRT49ZVZdxByAwnaMBouY1hfbjHcvSIYT4Ayz6W5K7t49RGQiVDydJPTTqgJjcsojVlOKZAC0JFVQPPm1EJNOiGSsqCePI9VtCyIYfU8wUPPvC6pQScFRndoanmQ6SAqLKVggJq-_z35cdAxpWEL5GTn89iFfshPtxbA9-6Qcped79B8M8A23_H1CR4v_JFn3oL1gH254PibyERWmlHTp2xuE-4HpZsQ-njduE12CfWAPXb5eC6G6B-Ua71kzVycHCL28p8EyINh4yja_TvGXM5NVJX-S)

Fellow American,

The year is quickly coming to a close. Before we know it, we’ll be wrapping up reports and sending in our final numbers for 2021.

My team and I are working closely on our plan for next year to ensure we take back the House and protect our conservative values. [**Would you spare a few moments to give your feedback on my Official 2022 Strategy Survey before midnight?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee99e428ba5b4f54a260700a47d7311c&_e=9dNCPY7RhY-ZlnpVzIJijz08hcMC0SS969IMc_PqhBKP2_g7ogKkyTrWPigOcA1sStYc0LVCSOxgG6fF6XLZgrhNB5PWEmLqOvSqNxxKNPbvesyPvx1QbXGK6d8vOeGj03NLxx8UibzE5FY9n9fTc-3xcgYcoR64dv2MLTFe2SloXu-gkn2USgzvFwZq-4pDy1w-4hw7100oxPU0VLs5se3BVJGxS4SFzPoZ9-4pntOpEkunw7UK0WlkKdYjCPCWMq7p62ISJAM-F58nGTR8nN-4WTFHqbowh0JyRT49ZVZdxByAwnaMBouY1hfbjHcvSIYT4Ayz6W5K7t49RGQiVDydJPTTqgJjcsojVlOKZADyuXWBNJIdKS-fqysQeWJoB4uKsWr-r0biiWshPOdd0LSLj0TiQtWq_gBGKAo_aR58Lku5-ydR8BVFTNKheEmYMpLAeeG0ARKp2VkgZN2RwczootUSIUZ4pJoR5eXaWfA6ThSMxSNJSqbiNqGwVolhmby4atNO2hr5dY1BCcURmqEkxyTEmmxTypaJX-rw6rcgYuj6RITuChimehYn5G5K)

| | Team, We’ll get right to the point: This is a key moment to ensure we elect a real progressive Governor like Sonia Chang-Díaz. Now is no time to ease up. [_**Make your donation to build our campaign to elect a truly progressive Governor.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39674219/320905419/1699647371?refcode=em_20211214_f_t_better&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTU1NTIxNC0yNDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=codEfokYE6E_DN3Z793lqYWBuFQv6z_GI8BrWd3Mhvo=) Sonia has taken on tougher fights before, and never backed down. That’s why she announced her campaign against the most popular governor in the country in June -- it was a daunting challenge, for sure, but one she knew we could win together. Now that this race is wide open, candidates who weren’t up for a big fight, and are only joining the race now that the going has gotten easier are getting ready to enter the field. That’s not Sonia -- she’s never afraid to tackle the big challenges to make life better for people all across Massachusetts. This is our best chance yet to make real change. clean_body: This is a key moment to ensure we elect a real progressive Governor like Sonia Chang-Díaz. Now is no time to ease up. | | | | | Team, We’ll get right to the point: This is a key moment to ensure we elect a real progressive Governor like Sonia Chang-Díaz. Now is no time to ease up. = Sonia has taken on tougher fights before, and never backed down. That’s why she announced her campaign against the most popular governor in the country in June -- it was a daunting challenge, for sure, but one she knew we could win together. Now that this race is wide open, candidates who weren’t up for a big fight, and are only joining the race now that the going has gotten easier are getting ready to enter the field. That’s not Sonia -- she’s never afraid to tackle the big challenges to make life better for people all across Massachusetts. This is our best chance yet to make real change. We can make our Commonwealth a place where all of us can live -- and thrive. We need your help to make sure we can take this opportunity and elect a true progressive champion as Governor of Massachusetts. We need your help to elect Sonia. = Let’s do this, together. Hello,

body:
|
#
---
Folks — Mike didn’t run for office for money, power or influence. He’s running because the office of the Lieutenant Governor has lost its way, catering to certain special interests and engaging in partisan bickering instead of fighting for Texans. Too many politicians spend almost all of their time on the phone, asking for money or making closed-door deals with special interests for favors down the line. **Not Mike. Our campaign operates differently.** He refuses to take one penny from corporate PACs or wealthy special interests. We are powered by hard-working folks who pitch in what they can because they believe in what we’re fighting for — equality, justice, and progress for all Texans. As corporate PACs continue to corrupt our politics and twist our government’s priorities at your expense, we're going to focus on raising money from small-dollar, individual donors like you. **That’s why contributions to emails like this one are so important, team. We mean it when we say your $5 here and $10 there makes a real difference in a grassroots campaign like ours. name: Roger Misso
subject: "Why I'm Running Again"
body:
Friends,

I wanted to share the article I published at Syracuse.com today titled, ["Why I'm Running Again."](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xb0-tQ3rxqpE0sSVyQCVmJ-N_6I2HiEk9loWeVf5BgQ=/h3hx2qY5E7x5MVO6K8VV7Qn02JeWBk99zFTdOdjNjYM=) Please - read it to the end.

This is not a fundraising email, but should you wish to make a donation today, I continue to raise money for 4 important organizations: the [National Multiple Sclerosis Society](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xb0-tQ3rxqpE0sSVyQCVmJ-N_6I2HiEk9loWeVf5BgQ=/vqyf4VlUmi2z84zGTjeY6YPd0zAwKnyoXSLudImV2no=), [InterFaith Works CNY](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xb0-tQ3rxqpE0sSVyQCVmJ-N_6I2HiEk9loWeVf5BgQ=/EWKZzo76wrGupirV6shfB3QaZAa6M-m0AdY6-_H2bI8=), [Headstrong Project](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xb0-tQ3rxqpE0sSVyQCVmJ-N_6I2HiEk9loWeVf5BgQ=/jE24UqwgFA0ny9cTYc7MBLQHVjJ87Fwmy5BOUsjGF3I=), and [Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xb0-tQ3rxqpE0sSVyQCVmJ-N_6I2HiEk9loWeVf5BgQ=/pUMzPxdohHK88sJAQUCNL8StF3NaQeYJk66QBUuOL70=).

I will not be a candidate for Congress in 2022. Instead, I'll be running and working to make life better for as many people as I can. I hope, in both pursuits, you and I will find ways to work together.

Happy holidays and please, take time to check in with yourself and with others. Give yourself the gift of grace this season.

In service always,
Roger Misso

[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xb0-tQ3rxqpE0sSVyQCVmJ-N_6I2HiEk9loWeVf5BgQ=/2Hp3htDpXKLbziILDxDcMs5XacN8fldE1XytXU3r3fI=)
Roger Misso - PO Box 2632 Liverpool, NY 13089

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: A note from the campaign manager
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
You're an important member of our grassroots, people-powered movement, so I want to give you an update on where things stand.
#
Hey Peter, it's Lauren, Pramila's campaign manager. You're an important member of our grassroots, people-powered movement, so I want to give you an update on where things stand.
After December 31, federal law requires our campaign to open the books and report how much money we've raised over the past three months.
We set an ambitious goal to raise **$322,500** by the end of the quarter, so we can show the power of our movement when the report becomes public — especially as we head into a critical midterm election year.
I ran the numbers this morning, and with just 17 days until our deadline, we're exactly**300 grassroots donations short** of where we need to be this week to stay on pace for our end-of-quarter goal.
[**Will you chip in $3, or any amount, to help us close this gap before midnight on Thursday? Every donation, no matter the amount, makes a difference and helps power Pramila's fearless advocacy forward:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211214?refcode=em20211214-875&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=875_420207_82zr9v&akid=875%2E420207%2E82zr9v)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211214?refcode=em20211214-875&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=875_420207_82zr9v&akid=875%2E420207%2E82zr9v)**
Thanks to Pramila's bold leadership, the House has made some big strides in 2021 toward a more just, equitable future. **But we can't afford to lose control of the House and Senate.**
That's why it's absolutely crucial we enter the new year in the strongest position possible — so we can support Pramila's work to go even bigger on our progressive agenda in the House and _expand_ our coalition in Congress.
[**Peter, a contribution from you before midnight on Thursday will help us stay on track to reach our end-of-quarter deadline goal, and it will show everyone that there's a powerful grassroots movement behind Pramila. Will you chip in now? Any amount helps.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211214?refcode=em20211214-875&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=875_420207_82zr9v&akid=875%2E420207%2E82zr9v)
Thanks for your support,
Lauren
Lauren Lalonde
Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211214-875-footer&t=22&refcode2=875_420207_82zr9v&akid=875%2E420207%2E82zr9v)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=875%2E420207%2E82zr9v)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
A brand new super PAC just launched for Dr. Oz — there’s a money storm coming our way.
#
Derek,
Trust me, the *last* thing I want to be doing right now is emailing you about Dr. Oz.
But early this morning, the news broke that big time GOP operatives just launched a super PAC to support Oz’s Senate campaign from the shadows.
**Make no mistake... Republicans are trying to BUY this Senate seat.** Dr. Oz has a reported net worth of $100 million! He’s already sunk more than $2 million dollars into TV ads. And now, a collection of ultra-rich mega donors can write _unlimited_ checks from the sidelines to a super PAC.
**We’ve got a rich Republican money storm coming our way.** The only way we can stop it is if tens of thousands of grassroots supporters join together now in a way we’ve _never_ seen in Pennsylvania before.
**[Will you help us raise an emergency $50,000 today to fight back? If about 2,000 of yinz can donate before midnight, we’d raise that much and send an unmistakable message that we will not allow Dr. Oz and his rich friends to buy this election.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38250?refcode=em20211214-3830&t=1&akid=3830%2E434096%2ELOl_-i)**
**[Fight Back: Chip In Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38250?refcode=em20211214-3830&amount=&t=2&akid=3830%2E434096%2ELOl_-i)**
In every poll that’s come out, our campaign beats any Republican that we go up against. The latest poll shows we beat Dr. Oz despite all of his fame and wealth. But, it’s a close race — _just a two point margin between us and them._
**What should scare all of us is this *huge* surge of money.** If Oz and his powerful friends have unlimited sums of cash to spread lies on the airwaves, they might be able to buy their way to victory.
**The only way I know how to respond is with overwhelming grassroots momentum.** If we can get a couple thousand of our Team Fetterman supporters to chip in right now, we can raise $50,000 today and send a clear message about the kind of grassroots strength they’ll be up against.
**[Please, if you can afford it today, make a contribution to help us raise an emergency $50,000 to fight back against Dr. Oz’s new super PAC.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38250?refcode=em20211214-3830&t=3&akid=3830%2E434096%2ELOl_-i)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38250?refcode=em20211214-3830&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3830%2E434096%2ELOl_-i)**
Derek, it’s not an exaggeration to say this campaign would be nowhere without the determination, strength, and love from all of YOU. Whether you can give today or not, I’m incredibly grateful that you’re on the team. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211214-3830-footer&t=23&refcode2=3830_434096_LOl_-i&akid=3830%2E434096%2ELOl_-i)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=3830%2E434096%2ELOl_-i)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3830%2E434096%2ELOl_-i)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: I’ve never been more concerned about the future of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia

I have spent the last decade in the Senate championing abortion rights and reproductive health care.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39674785/320908072/-825425716?refcode=20211214_CGVA_OTS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTYzMjE0NC0yNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9Lgm-Vkzc3X--8buK9rxRQxIVSPGFiE3nNK5wi4qqw=)

| | Dear Derek, I have spent the last decade in the Senate championing abortion rights and reproductive health care. And I’ve never—never—been more concerned about the future of Roe v. Wade. Let me back up. This month, the Supreme Court heard Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health, a case challenging Mississippi’s 15-week abortion ban—and an explicit challenge to Roe v. Wade. Overturning Roe has been the GOP's goal all along—and Trump-appointed Supreme Court justices might give them exactly what they want. Our best way to fight back is to elect strong, principled Democrats who will never compromise when it comes to our reproductive freedoms. [**Please, split a donation between my Off the Sidelines PAC and Common Good VA. Your money goes directly toward electing game-changing candidates who will protect our reproductive freedoms and democratic values.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39674786/320908073/-825425716?refcode=20211214_CGVA_OTS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTYzMjE0NC0yNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9Lgm-Vkzc3X--8buK9rxRQxIVSPGFiE3nNK5wi4qqw=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39674787/320908074/-368617150?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTYzMjE0NC0yNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9Lgm-Vkzc3X--8buK9rxRQxIVSPGFiE3nNK5wi4qqw=) | | | [DONATE $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39674788/320908075/-825425716?refcode=20211214_CGVA_OTS&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTYzMjE0NC0yNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9Lgm-Vkzc3X--8buK9rxRQxIVSPGFiE3nNK5wi4qqw=)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I don’t know how else to put it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | It's Speaker Pelosi. I need your immediate attention:

\-- My FINAL Mid Month Deadline of the year is just 24 hours away.
\-- I've set a MUST-HIT $150,000 goal for my House Democrats.
****[\-- And I'm personally asking for your help and your $3 to meet it before time runs out.](https://links.e.dccc.)****
| [MID MONTH DEADLINE: 12/15, 11:59PM
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)

---

Please understand the situation we're in.

Republicans have **SHATTERED** eight fundraising records in a row.

Our polling lead to defend our House Majority has completely **EVAPORATED**.

And Republicans need to flip just **FIVE** seats to reclaim the House Majority once again.

I don't know how else to put it: **There 's just too much at stake for grassroots Democrats like you to sit on the sidelines at this make-or-break moment.**

**[That's why I'm asking you to rise up and help my House Democrats meet our LAST Mid Month goal of 2021 before my deadline expires in 24 hours. Please, there's not a second to spare -- so can I count on you?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-GsE~)**

Nancy

name: Mary Todd
subject: The Communists Killed My Son!
body:
My son was murdered for protecting the United States of America.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8t3ug6rgutvoq84q1s0hk1tbdf9jh5igt7e09d8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli61o70slh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1pr1cmrr6otimaq31dll6ion9p3lcorr2tlickrr1d36epojccr2c2or0t1h61jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coo79d9k61r60pjmcsqj8dtgmlin49fg)
|
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi707j4ubqnl46gmloki38aitifcv63gjfrpaujo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli61o70slh2bs)
---
| Friend,

_**My son was murdered for protecting the United States of America.**_ As a proud mother, nothing tested my courage and resolve more than what happened to my oldest son, Shane Truman Todd. After earning his PhD in electrical engineering, and taking an exciting job opportunity with a telecommunications firm in Singapore, Shane started to get worried about the work his employer was having him do with a shady company with close ties to the Chinese Communist Party. Soon, that worry turned into fear for his life. My son lined up a new job back in the U.S. because he knew he was ultimately being asked to **_undermine our national security by illegally transferring U.S. technology to Communist China. _** But after expressing concern that his life was being threatened for speaking out, my son never made it out of Singapore - **he was murdered.** On his last day of work, my son Shane was found garroted to death in his apartment. **Putting America Last has emboldened the very shady, Communist crooks who I KNOW****killed my son, Shane. That’s why, in running for U.S. Congress in Montana’s Second District, I am unapologetically committed to stopping this destructive globalism and to putting our country and our people FIRST!**
---
| [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z74ut66bd985da0dliagjhtgjist1k38ktshrbuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli61o70slh2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN")
---
| [HELP ME PUT AMERICA FIRST](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zffdckhas8u43g7t8b3vgc1bu79640ikeronr9e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli61o70slh2bs "HELP ME PUT AMERICA FIRST")
---
| The police accidentally left behind a hard drive that revealed that the project Shane was asked to work on was with **_Huawei_ \- the Communist Chinese firm that’s been repeatedly accused of espionage against the United States.** My husband and I took this evidence to officials in the Obama administration - but they did _NOTHING._ This can’t be the time to sit on the sidelines - when things are this bleak, and government is this incompetent, even everyday pastors like me have to answer the call to put God, family, and America **_first._** Our nation’s capital can no longer be filled to the brim with America Last D.C. Swamp bureaucrats who are so corrupt that they’ll even enable murderous Communist thugs just to make a buck. **So I’m running for Congress to give Montana and America the courageous leadership we need now more than ever. I am going to defend our country and the Constitution, fight corporate cronyism and Big Tech monopolies, hold our enemies like the Communist Chinese accountable,_and I can NOT be bought!_** Instead, I’m going to rely on the people who I will ultimately serve - everyday Americans like you. [_Can I count on you to help me take on the corrupt, America Last interests that are destroying our country?_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgsirj3pd6m3oobg09gorjfo4qgaeuhke75nlv60_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli61o70slh2bs)
---
| [RUSH IN YOUR GRASSROOTS SUPPORT](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2r3la3fq28t47vik1vvdqn10f9685fndki7u0hg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4sli61o70slh2bs "RUSH IN YOUR GRASSROOTS SUPPORT")
---
| God bless you, and thank you for your support,
_Mary Todd_
---
| |
---
| MARY FOR MONTANA
---

That’s why, in running for U.S. Congress in Montana’s Second District, I am unapologetically committed to stopping this destructive globalism and to putting our country and our people FIRST! | "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN" | "HELP ME PUT AMERICA FIRST" | The police accidentally left behind a hard drive that revealed that the project Shane was asked to work on was with Huawei \- the Communist Chinese firm that’s been repeatedly accused of espionage against the United States. My husband and I took this evidence to officials in the Obama administration - but they did NOTHING. This can’t be the time to sit on the sidelines - when things are this bleak, and government is this incompetent, even everyday pastors like me have to answer the call to put God, family, and America first. Our nation’s capital can no longer be filled to the brim with America Last D.C. Swamp bureaucrats who are so corrupt that they’ll even enable murderous Communist thugs just to make a buck. So I’m running for Congress to give Montana and America the courageous leadership we need now more than ever. I am going to defend our country and the Constitution, fight corporate cronyism and Big Tech monopolies, hold our enemies like the Communist Chinese accountable,and I can NOT be bought! Instead, I’m going to rely on the people who I will ultimately serve - everyday Americans like you. | "RUSH IN YOUR GRASSROOTS SUPPORT" | God bless you, and thank you for your support, Mary Todd | | | MARY FOR MONTANA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Emma Brown, MarkKelly.com
subject: a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Three National Republican outside groups are attacking Mark right now, and it’s clear that this is just the start.
#

I made a difficult decision yesterday.
Three National Republican outside groups are attacking Mark right now, and it’s clear that this is just the start.
So, I looked at our numbers. With attacks ramping up this early, we’re going to need more resources to fight back. The money isn’t in the budget at this point in the race, so I gave the green light — we’re raising our goals.
This decision is a risk. We’re counting on lots of people like you to help us reach it, because we cannot get caught without the resources we need to win as we get closer to the election.
But the bigger risk was doing nothing.
So, the bet I made is that if we asked, you’d come through for Mark and help fill in the budget gap. I hope that you will. Control of the Senate is on the line:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to make sure we have the resources to fight back against the attack ads running against Mark right now? Do it before our mid-month fundraising deadline ends tomorrow.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211214-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1792_6688874_6XgUVD&akid=1792%2E6688874%2E6XgUVD)

Folks, before [**I ask you to chip in toward our last mid-month goal of the year**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39674985/320909673/2040598085?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211214_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTAwMzMzMy0yOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7iQNar1ApinIIEG864wGuAyfwKTB4AUvYdD7ZiXA05Q=), I want to share all we’ve accomplished because of this grassroots team. There’s no denying the past few years have been difficult. But we’ve overcome so many challenges that have been thrown at us. Last year, we came together to defeat Donald Trump, send President Biden to the White House, protect our majority in the House, and secure the Senate. Thanks to those victories, over the course of the past year, we passed the _American Rescue Plan_ and the historic _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ — giving families massive economic relief and sending $3.7 billion-plus to New Mexico to repair our bridges and roads, expand access to clean drinking water, and preserve our planet for future generations. Now we’re on the brink of passing the _Build Back Better Act_ in the Senate. We’ve got our best shot, right now, to make pre-k universal, alleviate child poverty, expand health care, and make once-in-a-generation investments to act on climate. Passing the _Build Back Better Act_ is one of my top priorities because it responds to the everyday needs of New Mexicans and folks across the country. But I’m counting on your support to continue the work ahead. **Our final mid-month deadline of the year is just one day away. name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Reproductive rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Last week, the Supreme Court failed to block Texas' extreme anti-abortion law, S.B. 8. This law encourages private citizens to sue health care providers who provide abortion services, effectively shutting down clinics and putting women’s health at risk. The law allows any private citizen to collect $10,000 in damages against a healthcare provider who performs an abortion after the detection of a fetal heartbeat - usually about 6 weeks. That is 18 weeks less than the standard set by Roe v. Wade.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39675137/320910061/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjAwMzMzMy0yOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZDnax8Tmi4VwN_mAU6dciFtnfqrpSLF_5FJxSi6uedg=&emci=f7aeda37-f15c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4f003333-295d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

Last week, the Supreme Court failed to block Texas' extreme anti-abortion law, S.B. 8.

This law encourages private citizens to sue health care providers who provide abortion services, effectively shutting down clinics and putting women’s health at risk. The law allows any private citizen to collect $10,000 in damages against a health care provider who performs an abortion after the detection of a fetal heartbeat -- usually about 6 weeks. That is 18 weeks less than the standard set by _Roe v. Wade_.

**Let's be clear: The Supreme Court ruling is a step in the wrong direction for our country and will put women at risk.** Every woman should have access to quality, safe reproductive health care and health care providers should not have to live in fear simply for doing their jobs.

This is not the time to hope the courts will protect abortion access as it hangs on by a thread. As governor, I will defend access to reproductive care in our state. That's why I am proud to have worked alongside so many to pass the Reproductive Privacy Act, which will ensure Rhode Islanders’ access to abortion through state law. But we need the leaders across the country to act and protect reproductive rights.

[**If you support codifying _Roe v. Wade_ to protect reproductive health care from these unprecedented threats, join me in adding your name today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39675157/320910093/-1346262020?ms=em21_211214_roe_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&refcode=em21_211214_roe_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&source=em21_211214_roe_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211214_roe_adv_gq_act___sm_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=BwHGMk0mCmf8udaA%2F0g1eKAiky8mUuoZ%2Fzve64B2r6SF%2F6%2BPdHuV0oFBD%2FwTfm8D90Xzb%2FZ3iisYKQ5FC2bxCmH520%2FaPmqiwFT%2FVbiwS8r7SpQuj62xv0q8hEXfjD7ef%2BpcdrtX7L%2FJV9vKJUoapFewroXlZvjE0Hn0KDM8crk%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjAwMzMzMy0yOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZDnax8Tmi4VwN_mAU6dciFtnfqrpSLF_5FJxSi6uedg=&emci=f7aeda37-f15c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4f003333-295d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15384964)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Democrats Want Non-Citizens to Vote
body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59013700:6ut-F6EVN:m:1:3253819041:55CED701EA529E767C51262BD116649B:r)
Peter,
Our Constitution is based on the idea of "We the People." Specifically, the Founding Fathers believed that our government rested on the consent of the American people. Democrats reject this, preferring a "Woketopia" that violates the principals on which our nation was founded.
**The latest case in point:** New York City Democrats are going to allow non-citizens to vote. This will allow upwards of 800,000 non-citizens to vote in New York City. Could you imagine the reaction of people in, say, France if you or I sought to vote in their elections? _**American leftists are in a class by themselves when it comes to legislating insanity.**_
[**FIGHT BACK >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59013700:6ut-F6EVN:m:1:3253819041:55CED701EA529E767C51262BD116649B:r)
Democrats see themselves as global citizens rather than American citizens. But that doesn't make their contempt for our Constitution any less reprehensible.
**Make no mistake about it, these non-citizen voting policies are going to spread and had Florida not passed a constitutional amendment that only American citizens can vote, Democrats would be fighting to implement these same radical policies here.** It's high time Democrats start prioritizing American citizens and putting their needs first.
[**LET 'S FIGHT FOR OUR CONSTITUTION**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59013700:6ut-F6EVN:m:1:3253819041:55CED701EA529E767C51262BD116649B:r)
[**CHIP IN $100 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59013700:6ut-F6EVN:m:1:3253819041:55CED701EA529E767C51262BD116649B:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59013700:6ut-F6EVN:m:1:3253819041:55CED701EA529E767C51262BD116649B:r)
[**CHIP IN $25 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59013700:6ut-F6EVN:m:1:3253819041:55CED701EA529E767C51262BD116649B:r)
Unlike Democrats, **I honor my oath to support the Constitution.** It has endured for centuries to build the greatest, most prosperous and generous nation the world has ever seen, even despite Democrats' latest attempts to spit on it.
**We 're preserving what it means to be an American citizen in Florida,** regardless of the latest "progressive" plan du jour Democrats are concocting to take away more of our rights.
**[Chip in today to help me continue fighting back against Democrats who want to rewrite American history and change our laws to benefit their radical policies.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59013700:6ut-F6EVN:m:1:3253819041:55CED701EA529E767C51262BD116649B:r)**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[CHIP IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59013700:6ut-F6EVN:m:1:3253819041:55CED701EA529E767C51262BD116649B:r)

name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: Private: Please do not forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca

Friend,
---
Tony Evers already VETOED 6 election security bills passed by the state legislature this year, which is why our lawsuit against the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) is absolutely critical.
---
After a non-partisan audit found that the WEC issued **_unlawful_** guidance on the 2020 election, I knew we couldn’t wait to act, and I sued the WEC.
---
__But the cost of taking this fight to the courts has been significant. Our $50,000 legal bill ( nearly 50% of the funds our campaign is projecting to raise this month) has set us back on our end-of-year goal.__
---
**That’s why I’m asking every last conservative patriot who cares about the security of our nation’s elections to give just $5 or more to our Election Integrity Fund.**
---

clean_body: | | | | | Folks, I want to ask you to make a critical contribution to my campaign to help us bounce back after a MAJOR setback, but first, let me explain: Our campaign depends on digital ads -- it’s one of the best ways for us to compete against my 6 GOP opponents. And when we had to take down all ads and pause fundraising during my recent fundraising blackout, our numbers plummeted. Now that we’re out of the blackout, we’re scrambling to relaunch ads so that we can catch up. | | | | | | | | | | | | | My 6 Republican opponents have funds from the GOP war chest at their disposal. With that money, they’re able to drown out our messaging online -- which is why I need your help to ensure Nevadans across the state can hear my message loud and clear. There’s so much on the line here -- if we don’t hold on to this seat, any one of my MAGA opponents will jump at the chance to undo all of the progress we’ve made. name: Dr. Roger Marshall
subject: Your vaccine appointment is coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow patriot, My name is Dr. Roger Marshall and I’m one of only four doctors in the U.S. Senate.

Like millions of other Americans, my family and I made the highly personal choice to get vaccinated. Having practiced medicine for nearly 30 years, medical decisions are between you, your family, and your doctor. Period.

But let me be clear, **nobody should force you to get the vaccine if you don’t want it**. Vaccines should NEVER be mandatory — and I’m leading the fight to block ALL of Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates.

Last week, **I attempted to block funding of the federal government** until Democrats stopped enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandates. And I’m not going to stop fighting against the destructive mandates Biden is attempting to enforce.
**_
[I’d like to know if you would support another attempt to defund the government if it meant blocking the enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandate.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=976e70b952864bccb95b96074d11ffd0&_e=W-XZ2hp-XndQ94G0md0ab9EaoqTZOl7BdHuif6wP-WORYtUwS4P1PhD3yrKty0Fdq3mp6rb0Aj-iJjgovVksRcSE8p6on1jDdd6RnoHoTkMkdw3AJmUe8l4weWDkPfJGyykfoODapAGCBfn4Ub4Ku8JK9Pbk62dgcFYnB9d18XbG7cdS6DNVQ-DtrZaqnqBJnfT5MP_COfXdzG6XaGYsBh8k83EFrKHzQpfLTjiJOm6yFXnfx6GY5i_RofOpH_O4gm32DelRCgOIopPKeZyfH4HvzQuYZdrQ_rSUFsiKHeVj5xY-bzj3bFuAZziUXpD5lvFl28d-d1JREsS5iTpbTJjpnzxPweUjkvPolHpBL8Yb4wl6_hCw_lJ33uyYRcD3vnBNmLk3SZ7WNnbrKJ0DOBN-G4qF2kEVQaHPIo2W87AZUGz2CtOYKuWbyIUyYIKg3noerctQDVMBfM9tpJyW560EIcCLEm_4kHgV_umWA_-c_2SAEem_RwcdhS8eg0Wl)_

** [** BLOCK THE MANDATE BY SHUTTING DOWN THE GOVERNMENT?
LET ME KNOW TODAY->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=976e70b952864bccb95b96074d11ffd0&_e=W-XZ2hp-XndQ94G0md0ab9EaoqTZOl7BdHuif6wP-WORYtUwS4P1PhD3yrKty0Fdq3mp6rb0Aj-iJjgovVksRcSE8p6on1jDdd6RnoHoTkMkdw3AJmUe8l4weWDkPfJGyykfoODapAGCBfn4Ub4Ku8JK9Pbk62dgcFYnB9d18XbG7cdS6DNVQ-DtrZaqnqBJnfT5MP_COfXdzG6XaGYsBh8k83EFrKHzQpfLTjiJOm6yFXnfx6GY5i_RofOpH_O4gm32DelRCgOIopPKeZyfH4HvzQuYZdrQ_rSUFsiKHeVlbP54s806nWPBhXUPxoF0d_zAVhvjsHZcK5WkTiWwFFbGKvKIS9h6JbatTIo24S2yOsmp9xZjwtvQPLfb_mu9lKTfVMoKLO73FONsVCwIs_DBzC0B5mCnDLekjG9rInKaVhb0wB3Gx1gY4NJLGsmahBMEUSDl4C_X3eXzJBTmy4lyyoRF2jwQxMtgJI6cxK1wRbl1lb09qGTpw_x_PKs2)
Biden’s unconstitutional mandate is a threat to our entire economy, and it’s up to each of us to stand together to stop its enforcement.

**[Please do me a favor and let me know if you would support another move by Senate Republicans to block enforcement of Biden’s onerous vaccine mandates by any means necessary](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=976e70b952864bccb95b96074d11ffd0&_e=W-XZ2hp-XndQ94G0md0ab9EaoqTZOl7BdHuif6wP-WORYtUwS4P1PhD3yrKty0Fdq3mp6rb0Aj-iJjgovVksRcSE8p6on1jDdd6RnoHoTkMkdw3AJmUe8l4weWDkPfJGyykfoODapAGCBfn4Ub4Ku8JK9Pbk62dgcFYnB9d18XbG7cdS6DNVQ-DtrZaqnqBJnfT5MP_COfXdzG6XaGYsBh8k83EFrKHzQpfLTjiJOm6yFXnfx6GY5i_RofOpH_O4gm32DelRCgOIopPKeZyfH4HvzQuYZdrQ_rSUFsiKHeX16TEwyStZTMFKkspcfNtu9xqAAxh6XrGcHL7mG4O97hSdZatJWMwb6InI8RIcBb6BvKwM3S2SmkRYCLU7LQL-eYpqLLlNb2bMB6RjMQSakjoFIZUu0e_KqABSh7rzfDGE_GZ8CL0upqga1bDVYQdjQihorJNHMY9QMCLuFrXAs0tszmw8VGFxcKCBfrjZsNnCtkd-B_3WaEPhJ5GGqTIK)**.

clean_body: | Fellow patriot, My name is Dr. Roger Marshall and I’m one of only four doctors in the U.S. Senate. Like millions of other Americans, my family and I made the highly personal choice to get vaccinated. Having practiced medicine for nearly 30 years, medical decisions are between you, your family, and your doctor. Period. But let me be clear, nobody should force you to get the vaccine if you don’t want it. Vaccines should NEVER be mandatory — and I’m leading the fight to block ALL of Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates. Last week, I attempted to block funding of the federal government until Democrats stopped enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandates. And I’m not going to stop fighting against the destructive mandates Biden is attempting to enforce. Biden’s unconstitutional mandate is a threat to our entire economy, and it’s up to each of us to stand together to stop its enforcement. . Thanks, Dr. Roger Marshall United States Senator for Kansas If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. body:

Friend,

**We think it's fair to say that Eric is not a typical politician.** He's an educator, football coach, pastor, and a fifth-generation Western North Carolinian with a deep connection to our community.

**He's not running a typical campaign either.** He's engaging on issues that matter -- affordable housing, broadband, jobs, and health care. He's also not writing off any voter or community some might consider too Republican.

**He's also not taking a typical approach to funding this campaign.** Eric is depending on individual donors to chip in their support. That means he's relying on a large number of people to contribute what they can if we’re going to flip Madison Cawthorn’s seat.

**[Our mid-month fundraising deadline hits tomorrow and we still need some help hitting our goal. Will you make a contribution to send Eric to Congress? Any amount helps, but $3 from you would go a long way in turning this seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39675558/320911897/1573898945?refcode=em-12.14.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2QyOWZiNC0yYTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTbhrQIMB5nPD2KDyLnxAyfpGk4LTk0TP8bzCNXO_vI=)**

Eric says this a lot, but it's worth repeating:

**What we're doing in NC-14 is much bigger than just winning a House seat. This is about giving voice to a community long ignored by the status quo.**

name: Alex Stovall
subject: I’m a conservative and I’m being attacked
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. | Hey Fellow Conservative,

My name is Alex Stovall and I'm running for Congress in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative and I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why...

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I’m SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=edaa66217ba4469c86f6169046a33a7e&_e=9tQeIgbOsIjmjORRXZj4XpH7n95fHAVQXLKoxJeEotgnbp9fyYIDwUbhOhp9SmkYrGO4DdEau5xthh6Y3IcQApBAA3qsFCRRNLRFESZv7W5Y7Ab8hXHo45HBblrrpdh_AikszKUhAqnIXVru_kUzbSnS43pA-jqEaJ9y9wVX1cRu3wIcMKc79Xpd9UN0EDnhtQnziLbkWnwsmp3dw6hpSTqOtu2ZkO5PBsqa4FLvDzbuygBqq9hzc_7cgzrKhZCfNHSSgRNPRzIwXv_kizXze2ITPeay2kB-Xw7o33sXhgWk3UXSVfqmso5ARfbxCDYI5iRvjd5ZnA0cqsR-lNilr4MtPUNFmbAs_JZsd9XhdGFmuODqFktS5YKR8fdY6lopA7QflV3bR3JC3jrONQS0ng%3D%3D) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I’m in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect Me To The House of Representatives
And Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative » **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=edaa66217ba4469c86f6169046a33a7e&_e=9tQeIgbOsIjmjORRXZj4XpH7n95fHAVQXLKoxJeEotgnbp9fyYIDwUbhOhp9SmkYrGO4DdEau5xthh6Y3IcQApBAA3qsFCRRNLRFESZv7W5Y7Ab8hXHo45HBblrrpdh_AikszKUhAqnIXVru_kUzbSnS43pA-jqEaJ9y9wVX1cRu3wIcMKc79Xpd9UN0EDnhNIs1cwT4EiBG-Il8vlGXrsSH5wmU47kOAiNrv-BFfdB9vdIdNVPxGwpG9-ElrZ86FiQaVSBMUYLGaEheRGjIvj8E5T9tvmWZbmAK96i8mHvyaiJ9Jg76Khc5YasS_iiKbSPfmpJ72nGv9YdHZiU3LmKvWoCfdwzNCGO9DevM2jyGLk1VGbOSIfqmCt_YvKtj0rarhRIVyLPyqZip7Ob5dA%3D%3D)
The left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **“You ain’t black”** if you don’t vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. clean_body: I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. | Hey Fellow Conservative, My name is Alex Stovall and I'm running for Congress in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative and I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why... I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. Enough is enough. Black conservatives running for public office are being attacked by the Democrats and I’m in their crosshairs. The left isn’t shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - the leader of the Democrat Party - who said, “You ain’t black” if you don’t vote Democrat. This is more than just upsetting. The Democrats love to talk about how it’s the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn’t imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President. You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I’m a doer. I’m a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor’s degree in Theology and master’s in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. Despite my childhood, I persevered. No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it. I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it’s why I’m asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn’t popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - I need to raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it’s time the truth came out. The left’s socialist government programs are crippling our communities and Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left’s oppression of our communities. I can WIN this race, but I must raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - For Freedom, Alex Stovall Get the latest by following me on social media. | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS Use of military rank, insignia, photographs or descriptions of military service on this website does not constitute endorsement by the federal government, U.S. Department of Defense or Department of Homeland Security. body:
We want to hear from you --

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39675846/320913105/-825069922?refcode=20211017_tf_biglie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNkZGU2ZS0yYzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uqh0dGPDOjX41Ldyn1Pi9NRmf0jODBXPNQp6LweZ-nk=) Like all of you, we at Team Flowers are paying close attention to the arguments being made at the U.S. Supreme Court over whether or not to overturn Roe v Wade and gut abortion protections for millions of Americans. **Elizabeth Warren, Amy Klobuchar, and others in Congress have proposed using the Democratic majority to codify Roe into law. ** [**So we want to hear from you. Add your name to our petition if you think Congress should codify Roe vs Wade into law!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39675847/320913106/-1481163398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNkZGU2ZS0yYzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uqh0dGPDOjX41Ldyn1Pi9NRmf0jODBXPNQp6LweZ-nk=&emci=8e00aa47-ff5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b2cdde6e-2c5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035) | **[ADD YOUR NAME>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39675848/320913107/-1481163398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNkZGU2ZS0yYzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uqh0dGPDOjX41Ldyn1Pi9NRmf0jODBXPNQp6LweZ-nk=&emci=8e00aa47-ff5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b2cdde6e-2c5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035)**
---
It isn’t just Democrats calling on Congress to codify Roe into law. GOP Senator Susan Collins of Maine echoed Warren and Klobuchar in a statement this week: Senator Collins supports the right to an abortion and believes that the protections in the Roe and Casey decisions should be passed into law.
**[For now, we want to know what you think. Should Democrats codify Roe into law?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39675849/320913108/34719616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNkZGU2ZS0yYzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uqh0dGPDOjX41Ldyn1Pi9NRmf0jODBXPNQp6LweZ-nk=&emci=8e00aa47-ff5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b2cdde6e-2c5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035) **
Thanks for sharing,
Team Flowers for Congress

As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. **This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39675850/320913109/-825069922?refcode=20211214_tf_roeRE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNkZGU2ZS0yYzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uqh0dGPDOjX41Ldyn1Pi9NRmf0jODBXPNQp6LweZ-nk=)

clean_body: We want to hear from you -- = Like all of you, we at Team Flowers are paying close attention to the arguments being made at the U.S. Supreme Court over whether or not to overturn Roe v Wade and gut abortion protections for millions of Americans. Elizabeth Warren, Amy Klobuchar, and others in Congress have proposed using the Democratic majority to codify Roe into law. | It isn’t just Democrats calling on Congress to codify Roe into law. GOP Senator Susan Collins of Maine echoed Warren and Klobuchar in a statement this week: Senator Collins supports the right to an abortion and believes that the protections in the Roe and Casey decisions should be passed into law. Thanks for sharing, Team Flowers for Congress Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible. | = **** **** ****** ** ** **** Paid for by Marcus for Georgia Marcus for Georgia PO Box 725 Bremen, GA 30110 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ********=**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: 2 months until a primary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In 2 months, in-person early voting for our first 2022 primary starts. And
we have a chance to defeat an anti-abortion Democrat who votes against
labor unions and action on climate change.

Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros is taking on corporate Democrat Henry
Cuellar in Texas’ 28th Congressional District.

As soon as polls open and mail ballots arrive to voters in TX-28, we need
to ensure folks are ready to elect Jessica — a progressive fighter for the
people. Cuellar is Big Oil’s favorite Democrat, and he’s been the ONLY
Democrat in the House this year to vote against labor unions and abortion
rights. He’s the most conservative Democrat in the House. We need to
defeat Cuellar.

We here at Justice Democrats made our first mark on Congress when we
helped elect Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez in 2018. Not only did we change
politics by helping send her to D.C., we ousted one of the most powerful
Democrats in the House.

By recruiting and helping to elect AOC, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and
others, we’ve built progressive power in Congress for the first time in a
long time. But we know we still have a long way to go to transform the
Democratic Party and pass Medicare for All and a Green New Deal.

Our next step in that process is electing Jessica Cisneros. But we don’t
know if we can get outspent 5-to-1 and still come out on top. The Wall
Street, fossil fuel, and corporate PAC money will keep flowing to Cuellar
as primary day approaches. We’re relying on a flood of grassroots
donations — $5, $27, $50, whatever folks can afford — to help us close
this fundraising gap.

The political establishment will do absolutely everything it can to stop
more Justice Democrats from winning a seat in Congress. Corporate
Democrats don’t want to see Jessica and her support for Medicare for All
and a Green New Deal unseat their friend, Rep. Cuellar.

Peter, it’s
absolutely critical that we have your support right now to build our
progressive bloc of Justice Democrats in Congress. Are you in?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86788?refcode=em20211214-20964&t=1002&akid=20964%2E1203867%2EuSjnzA ]→ Yes, I can donate $3 to Justice Democrats today to
help elect Jessica, build the Squad in Congress, and defeat the most
conservative Democrat in the House.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86788?refcode=em20211214-20964&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20964%2E1203867%2EuSjnzA ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=20964%2E1203867%2EuSjnzA ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=20964%2E1203867%2EuSjnzA ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211214-20964-footer&t=1006&refcode2=20964_1203867_uSjnzA&akid=20964%2E1203867%2EuSjnzA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=20964%2E1203867%2EuSjnzA

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6674%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=GY6rXpAzACCosCsOp60kFg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68899%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4a4%2fAdIUqq9KJl0il3VyjA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68890%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DIl0ukaqdG2BcmeUMXT%2bZA&sysid=1)**_
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68891%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S5Fi8vsTcHlOStwU8QjljQ&sysid=1)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through We must add hundreds of thousands more subscribers in 2022!
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and new Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68892%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eaqsgbSRC56e0hv3aE5fvg&sysid=1)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s latest book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.” ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68893%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HbQu0aV49XCCnq1LFZWErA&sysid=1)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6674%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=GY6rXpAzACCosCsOp60kFg&sysid=1)_

name: Bruno Amato
subject: Our veterans deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFE0uIjofAduQty9vNFY-fIJx01XUjbTm2D6OW3zxZqi8wMX-4s00wP75TvOj2Wd4eBpArbUdwap1uePALAAerlN6mk1xDkqCQ_sOYlr6OgBlGSeU2M4EkVNlyDqnFPqyOgfFJ5_MMJyNw7w2a8VpTEfCdRUL05Ax7Myo4FdAi5nsc4NTbkLYX6FpQ-xgZFaR4HycgqYfpEeXG-8buQZucGWuFAVGtTC85RetJLDpj5f0G7WeoAk2HbZX56U2oOl5fah0n2GwZp0mKSN7qxehW4CmlAY0L2XAwkEKMG0wU51D/3hu/8qOkIFKlSr6Ne6gEqrnsbA/h0/2WFbHz055kUdJELdi6-MiP1c3cnR38DITi-SrVzMEuk)

I’m a Navy veteran. 10 years ago, Kevin McCarthy promised he’d do everything he could to help veterans like me by getting the funding to build a new VA clinic. 10 years later, veterans like myself still have to travel **over two hours** to the nearest VA hospital if the one clinic close by — old and in drastic need of an upgrade — is full. McCarthy can talk all the big game he wants about caring, listening, and working to make sure that veterans are supported. But veterans like myself? We know the truth. [**When I’m in Congress, I’ll fight for a VA hospital — not just a clinic — and I’ll never turn my back on those who have served. If you have a moment, watch this video where I talk about why veterans in CA-23 deserve better. Then, chip in $5 or $10 bucks to help make history by helping us hit our $100,000 year end goal and elect real leadership for the Central Valley.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQJ5d1qV2Ise8igGo-C3RXC6_ENMDyi0H9FfXOxAUstkKemMk7hcdbg84ochi-eiE3UJaktr2JfV-YxLZWT6FzHcPJwi4_gKhiSr-6_YW19E9Rt3Uvwac1Ja8y5ooq8uD0EZ1_ZhpEdBSDMlx9rYFO9EKxtMjk92kbgMDTxxYfCgXuxS8fSxW3R4lsjgJ4xYdnD-qY5weOg-dEcwiFboK4mNjb5h2Ov2RxoC7MrBZZu2SL5ubHNt9NMd9mt_wJ9n_E9wbrXzUcmCLtu8QbkY1JmBaJEwsYmfDw2b-k5LjAeYn1s24tZhbEn7ky4VdDOPUMLTRJCocjQWdYAqiBTLhyFQ/3hu/8qOkIFKlSr6Ne6gEqrnsbA/h1/4G-3UCD5OmK9xtvmdxCBXp8hPDGVCmyBM_Ax1hpdGP8) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQJ5d1qV2Ise8igGo-C3RXC6_ENMDyi0H9FfXOxAUstkKKSYtlcAC_BkbaQDoHSAvc2AaEQxv7z2-f8qkdwuhpncmdVegWbugTF0PmBZrzeKmg3gNZNKGwhYvMtQPBqu9hZcZLglGyAKQPoT05gevWEdFfqehDOBaCdCvVI-03ymBA8IF0sanLTc8N_Qon_i6xiFn-t91z4cUjTrWw6UU2WxfEzTNChNUme-FhusXS7gG-kZ0wmmuHp88Rj2z0FCRlppA4tAWW2bFLeP9cF0sP2mpd-FMyNnCFrvpNGE78ozYBuSQMtDaRPTsjoC9522at57n6IyhuJQU9WhSvPHcFog/3hu/8qOkIFKlSr6Ne6gEqrnsbA/h2/xYNsrgrI9emD776QJwirT6QTL1HLnbztJzQ-g1utIuk)
I never thought I would be a politician. But, as a veteran, I watched the horrific insurrection attempt on January 6th and I thought it might actually turn a Republican like McCarthy around. Instead, he worked as hard as he could to cover up the testimony of that day, and for months he has refused to meet with the U.S. Capitol Police officers — many of them veterans themselves. He is trying to cover it all up. McCarthy has no respect for veterans. He only uses us to score political points when it’s convenient. When it won’t benefit him, it’s of no interest to him. That’s not how being in Congress should work. I’m running to fight for veterans of CA-23 — and I'm proud to have the endorsement of VoteVets, an organization that helps veterans like me run for office. Unlike Kevin McCarthy, I’m not looking to score points, I’m just looking to serve the community I love. [**Help make that a reality by chipping in whatever you can so we can hit our critical year end goal and defeat McCarthy once and for all.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQJ5d1qV2Ise8igGo-C3RXC6_ENMDyi0H9FfXOxAUstkKemMk7hcdbg84ochi-eiE3c-KqXQ46I9yO182GI0gIa-prJFe8K9NKiK-ibLYmxp9KrSUGenG5di4_Zk7uXMVT_n88IabEVWPcEz7k9ZExa_MXa-MZ22aTElGi3BPjtqpdtqjjF7udG3H6yrDOwJX6JxYThhEPld1uiikTFyxDs39IIgfzXEeEmXZJPvYmjVXSjwavfKm-nLcaU6ZgXiGK8h6DFMhYnBKxT4I2QGzfyEJTqsU_gPnAR2xiH-TDQAxskEryhNjOXZnRjg0GqYkNd1Kokjlz6dLNLFNxwJ-tKw/3hu/8qOkIFKlSr6Ne6gEqrnsbA/h3/Ov8JrjL9ArVeZw-gIiiUiwTtSc4jNrKS086Ex5TVKz0) Let's get this done, Bruno [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQJ5d1qV2Ise8igGo-C3RXC6_ENMDyi0H9FfXOxAUstkIhIVUEVvGLRH5f0PVgkkaKPzd-DWgfk1kfeY5cNXp9vIU3WtvSJMQswWDeaRi9NzyfI6niv8Jh-Do3k-ut0g8Kq9EGXikS2Svv0wQFwKwZxrwbfiOY77EQNViiVS2E8_crFKP-svRsH6ua9UOAU2dF-TbLuNFAz-z3c9vbeq6N-SSRhg-E-Kuu5njkK5Bnt0mrv7DsQ_nGmSR3eGILZxV66m7iHfKW5tdejcgyK84tguARk8Ti7Y6JPJIi4p5oyB96qCPlQ7Y2SwISF0c4hb61jJoIgZsHaEAI1GHWUyL3zQ/3hu/8qOkIFKlSr6Ne6gEqrnsbA/h4/7Pv2R45zzHz9XIQn2rt4GOesm0Vcs5Zf2Fwj87S86A0)

Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, Ironworker, and Democrat and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District, where he resides. Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington — like Kevin McCarthy — Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Folks, It’s likely that more candidates will join the race for Massachusetts governor very soon — which is why we need to ramp up our fundraising efforts ahead of our big end-of-year deadline. In order to afford the resources needed to take our movement to Beacon Hill and elect Ben as governor, we’re setting a goal to reach _3,500 individual contributions by this Thursday, December 16_. **That means we need just four people in your area to chip in $3 or more by Thursday’s deadline. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Don't let young conservatives miss this!
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a brand new event:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z281u2qi1c59minot68kh6v8c9if10one9fqrr00_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onhmqrm2p72c5gn0tjmedq6bd31m9h6fctkedh3bc5jcjj66c3imlhb6sdn6apm1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc3kmkq3fclhcoq61cr66uobapbi4no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5bptgjj5l6jno3q5q09qjvle8qiuc1nu7cv1u20_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh9d5umi3kt4tdllpm364i8rh3edn2ck2phdcb8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ —and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021—but we need your help to do it.******](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3jilm93jbhjihujditej4u3s0p150anpmj484do_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcdjk0k8mc6onbr1rramu9drcv52cqcb35p0rmv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs)**[?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0is697vj0g2ovco6aptrror8j9re01bc7p5ksmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7a1shkml48f2iafmenstd5uggdr5jtdgc1ojaro_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq6hj0t43uaumjshlqi0vv72cfardp63p5im8jm8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1svp14qqf4dinjs7s0e3g6esrra0ufe3hvpjovo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen—by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zok4rv3spei5ikrdqoml44ft7e4rm4g6cqssjb3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmta01bdglad1lr3rgpvo68lqoptp0hoq9d8bpe0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z15gb1h87l1a3onq98gckprekn6qfoll887bte6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp4vmp1s0sefj4ql016ug01gj6l5avipmif4i0oo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on— _and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** —[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbi0bc4u5cso170k35fdpcd9fqk3cp8jgriac5jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph2bs)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z254re7fgm34vl19jotutp77fg35ieblmgks2bco).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrqstq9mhfqlf413e36uolc1j2rif7646974h248_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Zilvinas Silenas
subject: {Video} Living under communism
body:
I grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania. And trust me, you do not want communism to come here. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8290%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=UOF5ZdNZ6D0HrSqvb6qc2w&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10630%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rh0gOxHGMejHRYWZt6Jo8g&sysid=1)

Friend,
I grew up in Soviet-controlled Lithuania. And trust me, you do not want communism to come here.

I am terrified of the rise of socialism in the United States. A lot of the cultural revolution happening here has similar characteristics to the cultural revolution in China and the Soviet Union.

Nowadays, the U.S. seems to be under constant propaganda for a radical agenda against individualism, liberty, and free markets. Socialism is gaining ground once again.
* Major leaders in Congress are openly socialist (Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez), calling on 70% income taxes and a Green New Deal which would essentially take over our economy.
* Roughly 18% of social scientists in the United States self-identify as Marxists.
* **Perhaps most alarmingly, opinion polls show that more young Americans have a positive view of socialism than have a positive view of capitalism.**

The end of this year marks the final FEC fundraising deadline of the year. After that, the amount we raise will become publicly available for all to see. Political pundits, the press, and yes... even Doug LaMalfa will use our numbers to size up the strength of our campaign.

Last quarter, we outraised Doug LaMalfa thanks to thousands of supporters who chipped in after he voted to overturn the 2020 election results. Rather than correct course, LaMalfa doubled down on his right-wing antics and voted against new roads, bridges, waterways, broadband access, and wildfire protection in our community.

**This deadline is our chance to send another strong message that we’re through with LaMalfa. We can outraise him again, but it’s going to take all of us coming together to do it:**

**[Will you chip in $3 before my FEC deadline?
