name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Make it possible for a conservative student
body:
This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6673%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=3EnJfEHqToeYO2v82sjU0Q&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68806%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oq2PaWtGTnOcbQkuSNTitA&sysid=1)
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68806%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oq2PaWtGTnOcbQkuSNTitA&sysid=1) Hi Fellow American, This is really exciting news. Are you ready to hear it? Turning Point USA is beyond thrilled to announce a _brand new event:_**AmericaFest 2021!** This four-day event will be _the largest conservative movement event in the country_ --and an event like you’ve _never_ seen, featuring dozens of the best and brightest conservative speakers, special musical guests, and non-stop energy and excitement alongside _thousands of like-minded, freedom-loving individuals._ [**TPUSA wants to get thousands of young people to AmericaFest 2021 --but we need your help to do it.**** **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68807%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F7D8VB43EMeQjK19RYlbBA&sysid=1) You see, thousands of young conservatives are ready to come to AmericaFest, but, being full-time students with limited resources, they simply don’t have the means to afford the ticket. I’m hoping that as a fellow patriot who loves America and cares about the next generation, you’ll help us meet some of those needs. **Will you help us educate and encourage our future leaders to steer this country in the right direction by**[**making a generous gift right now to TPUSA’s AmericaFest Scholarship Fund**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68808%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nEaytnc837huaeO9v%2bUcXQ&sysid=1)**[?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68809%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7cRvqRLrsBGeF2haGtWy9w&sysid=1) ** [**A contribution of $35 will provide a One-Day Pass to this massive event for a conservative student. A generous gift of $100 will pay for an entire Four-Day Experience for a young conservative.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68800%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oFU%2fIuz%2fm5ReWbu%2fTiZnhQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Gift!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68801%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fsA3pNLGzqPWd9nKNlZW7A&sysid=1)
---
This four day celebration of America, of our constitutional rights, and of our freedom is happening this _**December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona**_** _._ **If you will be in the Southwest, I hope you’ll consider joining us! And if you’re not able to make it, [**please consider sponsoring a student today**.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68802%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n8eDGiozg%2fp8ou%2fXEs8KIg&sysid=1) **AmericaFest 2021** will be an event unlike any this movement has ever seen--by creating an experience that breaks the traditional norms of a political conference as we continue to****_bridge the gap between politics and entertainment to win America’s culture war._ Guest speakers include: Donald Trump Jr. Senator Ted Cruz Tucker Carlson Candace Owens **And Many More!** Plus, full live concerts by: Dustin Lynch Brantley Gilbert RaeLynn Russell Dickerson **And More Musical Guests!** Plus entertainment, food, and presentations from dozens of conservative organizations. This event will go down in the history books as one of the greatest conservative events in the USA! But to make sure we can execute it to its fullest potential, we need __YOUR__ help to get as many young conservatives in the door as possible. [**Will you please help us do that with a generous Scholarship Contribution of $35, or even $100 today?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68803%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l9wwSfm7u2PaoGNVAjiwIQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Give One-Day Pass**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68804%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZOEz6%2bdFYARQqbj8e7nP0g&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Four-Day Experience**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68815%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T5jyAKeApxQNFz7HPfnYDA&sysid=1)
---
[**Give Another Amount**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68816%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j8QrWdSgtjbAM0RHKKp%2bhw&sysid=1)
---
I personally know many of our great guest speakers and musical guests very well. Each of them have personally told me they cannot wait to attend this incredible event! All have been working tirelessly to prepare for **AmericaFest 2021** and have promised not to disappoint! _It’s going to be awesome._ Building up this nation and empowering students through education is my life’s work. This event is a culmination of everything I have spent the last decade focusing on--_and so much more._ If you’re able, I hope you’ll join us **December 18-21 in Phoenix, Arizona** --[**and please consider sponsoring one or more students so they can attend this mind-opening, liberty-loving, informing and entertaining experience!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68817%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iMXZClSgLhJbTu90mD7PzA&sysid=1)
---
With unbridled excitement, Charlie Kirk Founder, President Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6673%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=3EnJfEHqToeYO2v82sjU0Q&sysid=1)_

|
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6673%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=3EnJfEHqToeYO2v82sjU0Q&sysid=1)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z50h2ah1o46p08f7n0ei2n66i2ospd7q1msfohd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zooqppa2e6aldgo3l9dp40do88rj776ge6b0c9hg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zs26ovtnhahfrnnjcfcbbl5infb7q5q11kip4kg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4slh68o32c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Cynthia Cano, Beto for Texas
subject: One of the great things about being on the road with Beto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Our campaign is making headlines all over Texas.
#
Here’s one of the many great things about running a campaign by, for, and about Texans: when Beto comes into town, he doesn’t just reach the people in person. He also gets his message out on local news!
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50468?refcode=ema20211214-166931&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=166931%2E444211%2ECUp-Le)
While Beto’s been on the road, our opponent Greg Abbott has been trying to make the race for Texas Governor about divisive culture-war issues — that’s why Abbott's priorities as Governor have been extreme policies, like banning masks in schools and targeting trans youth.
Beto is focused on what actually keeps Texans up at night: bringing better jobs to Texas, making sure everyone can afford medical care, and fixing the dangerous power grid issues that killed 700 people last winter. That’s why our campaign is going to all 254 counties to listen, to learn, and to bring people together.
**Town by town, voter by voter, we’re building the biggest grassroots campaign in Texas history. Can you help us keep going?**
[Make a $3 contribution today to help fill up the tank and keep Beto on the road. Together, we’re building the campaign that will defeat Greg Abbott and elect a Governor that will take care of the people of this state — but we can’t do it without your help. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50468?refcode=ema20211214-166931&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=166931%2E444211%2ECUp-Le)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50468?refcode=ema20211214-166931&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=166931%2E444211%2ECUp-Le)**
The way we’re going to win against Greg Abbott is for all of us to work together. You’re a critical part of this campaign and we’re grateful for any support you can show today.
I look forward to seeing you on the road!
Thank you,
Cynthia Cano
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211214-166931-footer&t=22&refcode2=166931_444211_CUp-Le&akid=166931%2E444211%2ECUp-Le)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=166931%2E444211%2ECUp-Le)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=166931%2E444211%2ECUp-Le)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Team Padilla
subject: Please, make a contribution to our grassroots campaign before our FEC deadline at the end of the month
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We know our campaign sends a lot of emails, particularly before big deadlines like the FEC deadline coming up at the end of the month.
#

Hi there,
We know our campaign sends a lot of emails, particularly before big deadlines like the FEC deadline coming up at the end of the month.
So before we ask you to make a contribution, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain what an FEC deadline is, and why it’s so important that we generate as many contributions as possible before then.
Ok, here’s the deal:
Every quarter, the Federal Elections Commission (FEC) mandates that campaigns like ours report what we raised and what we spent. This deadline, the last one before an election year, is particularly important.
These reports are public, and lots of people are going to be looking at our filing _very_ closely. They’re going to be looking to see if our campaign is generating the energy and enthusiasm it’s going to take to win in 2022.
**And one of the best ways to show that people are excited about Alex’s campaign is by putting up a _MASSIVE_ number of contributions before the reporting deadline on December 31. Can you add yours today?**
[**Please make a contribution to our grassroots campaign. Do it before our FEC deadline at the end of the month and help us send a message about the strength of our campaign going into an election year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=&t=1&refcode2=504_159979_ufWfh2&akid=504%2E159979%2EufWfh2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=&t=20&refcode2=504_159979_ufWfh2&akid=504%2E159979%2EufWfh2)**

Thank you for chipping in. Together, we are going to build the largest grassroots movement California has ever seen.
\- Team Padilla

name: Alvin & Winsome
subject: Winsome wanted me to pass this along to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
Peter, this election flies in the face of the Democrat lie that... -
| | | _You're receiving this email because you support our mission of reclaiming Black voters by destroying the Liberal Lies. If you're giving up on this critical fight, then please[click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021eu0301&n=1) to stop receiving emails._
---
| | | | Dear Mr. Willis, I'm sure you heard about Virginia's next Lt. Governor, Winsome Sears. Her election is historic on so many levels. Not only is she the first black woman elected to statewide office in Virginia, but she is a staunch conservative! Her election flies in the face of the Democrat lie that the Republican Party is the party of racist white men. I hope you'll take a moment to read her message to you as she prepares to take the reins of one of the highest offices in one of the oldest states in America. Thank you, and God Bless. | |
Alvin Williams
President
---|---
* * *
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | [](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?recruiter_id=61913&info=2021EU0301&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EmailUpdate&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021eu0301&n=2) Dear Mr. Willis, According to the left wing, a black conservative woman like me isn't supposed to exist -- let alone recently win election as the first woman and first Black female Lt. Governor of Virginia. Therefore, my very existence flies right in the face of **_the lie that the Republican Party is full of racists_**. **And now my victory has the Democrat Party _scared to death_.** In fact, America is seeing a resurgence of all minorities willing to consider the values of the Republican Party, specifically:
* **That the free enterprise system is the MOST PRODUCTIVE SUPPLIER of human needs and economic justice.**
* **That all individuals are entitled to equal rights, justice, and opportunities and should ASSUME THEIR RESPONSIBILITIES as citizens in a free society.**

Democrats know that if a small enough percentage of Black Americans hear our message of parental school choice, reducing taxes so that families keep more money in their pockets, then Democrats will lose future elections and their grip on power. That's why they're already conjuring up new lies about me, saying I'm not "black enough" or that I'm nothing more than a token mouthpiece for white supremacists. [So, I'm asking you to stand shoulder to shoulder with Black America's PAC Action Fund through your donation](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?recruiter_id=61913&info=2021EU0301&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EmailUpdate&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021eu0301&n=3). My good friend and fellow Black conservative, Alvin Williams, started Black America's PAC Action Fund to help minorities hear and consider the Republican Party's message of a hope and a future for our children and their children's children! Using radio ads, billboards, and grassroots outreach, Black America's PAC Action Fund is reaching more people every election and helping them realize that America will continue marching forward only if we, TOGETHER, fight those politicians who continually divide us through racial, economic and other means. In fact, without Black America's PAC support, I wouldn't be writing you today as the first Black conservative woman elected as the Lt. Governor of Virginia! [Please support Black America's PAC Action Fund so we can help more Americans return to the party of Lincoln](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?recruiter_id=61913&info=2021EU0301&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EmailUpdate&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021eu0301&n=4). [](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?recruiter_id=61913&info=2021EU0301&sal=Peter&ask=20&utm_content=EmailUpdate&utm_client=BAF&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021eu0301&n=5)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | © Black America's PAC Action Fund Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.
---

name: James Marter
subject: Friends, Marter endorsed by Taxpayers United of America!
body:
|
---
|
Friends, Great news! **Taxpayers United of America endorses Marter for Congress!** You may have seen the story in publications like the Illinois Review, or on radio stations like WCMY or JACK-FM.
---
---
| Lauren Underwood has earned an "F" rating from the National Taxpayers Union, every year she has been in office. They don't endorse candidates but Taxpayers United of America does and they have confirmed: They endorse Marter for Congress to represent Illinois and replace Lauren Underwood. No other Republican in this race can say they're endorsed by T.U.A. They also can't say they're GOP Chairman of a major county in the district (like I am) or even that they live in the district (like I do). Send me to Congress. I'll be relentless in my efforts to end the out of control waste, fraud, debt and abuse, funded with our tax dollars. If you think too much of our money is squandered by Washington, consider donating to my campaign. Together, we can make a difference for generations to come.

They also can't say they're GOP Chairman of a major county in the district (like I am) or even that they live in the district (like I do). Send me to Congress. I'll be relentless in my efforts to end the out of control waste, fraud, debt and abuse, funded with our tax dollars. If you think too much of our money is squandered by Washington, consider donating to my campaign. Together, we can make a difference for generations to come. | | == | = | I'm grateful for your support, | | | James Marter Republican for Congress info@marter4congress.us (815) 585-8006 - Work ---|--- | | | | = | mailto:info@marter4congress.us and send a blank email. | | Marter for Congress Post Office Box 271 Oswego, Illinois 60543 United States (815) 585-8006

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:

Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $50,000 before our mid-month deadline tomorrow, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our critical mid-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39676952/320917827/-42398318?refcode=em20211214pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmMxMjdkYS0zMTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTXuYPanZfIh72eKVAMKVwhrzYFDsHDQuWxOUSNiqsc=)

My name is Billy Long and I’m a United States Congressman, former small business owner, former radio host and father; but above all, I am a proud conservative American.

I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement next year.

**We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. We are so close to a Senate majority, and this would derail our efforts exponentially!****[That’s why I need you to help me protect this Missouri senate seat, immediately and help Republicans take back the Senate in 2022.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0c8fb3c8da16479d879b39e4c8750488&_e=vM8lW09BixBztyVYJIM-JgcVE9uSfwN2UcN7TjfCCsz3HXAthgacA0q-GiHSFDHyZSwZeFTqeN257JWOhdW9AqEHg5PqFaBz27AejXUqyyVnCguW7ige5mesvlErgdmoAFI24us_m1gosgxQ-JcmlCSNnCfPsZDBfUaKf4P_PbabXeAu_KCTGCShIymzMx2JNvgDH4ZPJqtcwZeIDA_RSflTLZwVUYsATeNt3PdPgPunVUsauZrcFcHUsUBWIS1oVIJ5nqpi2EmtA8ZE4jHLohBxz2DIOjSLoxrJ0BdmiN1f_nCquWlTY98FtioWWlP_-MIw6bUmrd1JwE6x2XEqYrtRncWkv8TdCSGcT-SdZ4fYxD1lZy0skhzzRALa5alXkZUIw5dcsM8hgN-u9UAwNp-i62lEZsS1NCQQdLT9NUHFcnMleX9X42SUjYgcQpLbC0EdazYtavDVdsYln95sq4-qXl-OnBhoS42PBmwAExE%3D)**

**I won’t sugarcoat it; the odds are stacked against us.** With the Democrats controlling the mainstream media AND big tech censorship, it’s going to be an uphill battle to spread our conservative message to hardworking Americans.

_But luckily, our team has a secret weapon: patriots like you, Peter._

This race and the future of our country, depend on every day, hardworking Americans, and **[now is your time to show the world you stand behind the Republican Party more than ever.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0c8fb3c8da16479d879b39e4c8750488&_e=vM8lW09BixBztyVYJIM-JgcVE9uSfwN2UcN7TjfCCsz3HXAthgacA0q-GiHSFDHyZSwZeFTqeN257JWOhdW9AqEHg5PqFaBz27AejXUqyyVnCguW7ige5mesvlErgdmoAFI24us_m1gosgxQ-JcmlCSNnCfPsZDBfUaKf4P_PbabXeAu_KCTGCShIymzMx2JNvgDH4ZPJqtcwZeIDA_RSflTLZwVUYsATeNt3PdPgPunVUsauZrcFcHUsUBWIS1oVIJ5nqpi2EmtA8ZE4jHLoo4KgQFyTTiLGbEfro1u5iJHacAex113WY9tFDRily7VxtqOmUSPcAar0IVd3J1w0QcbaoswFOBfNIMZORBBj246VIFsaeHvubVseaBUlV3BJAfN6d8DNjOYj2zMky54UK2cC0CN2Gd2lNC212HBqTgawkzZqpVxll2myG9SHotz2NjUiVwynSRlnZszFwfT0YjoAS2G_XDYApkudoGI3Tw%3D)**

**From day one in Washington, I have fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China** and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States. I have cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. I am a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement.

My loyalty to the American people has never wavered and will remain when I get to the Senate floor. **[But I need your help to win the toughest Senate race in the nation and keep this seat in Republican hands.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0c8fb3c8da16479d879b39e4c8750488&_e=vM8lW09BixBztyVYJIM-JgcVE9uSfwN2UcN7TjfCCsz3HXAthgacA0q-GiHSFDHyZSwZeFTqeN257JWOhdW9AqEHg5PqFaBz27AejXUqyyVnCguW7ige5mesvlErgdmoAFI24us_m1gosgxQ-JcmlCSNnCfPsZDBfUaKf4P_PbabXeAu_KCTGCShIymzMx2JNvgDH4ZPJqtcwZeIDA_RSflTLZwVUYsATeNt3PdPgPunVUsauZrcFcHUsUBWIS1oVIJ5nqpi2EmtA8ZE4jHLon19IF0zrPRY1e3zU5kL6WeXOTRwIKDGjG9Ql8ZfPd0psr8gjrMGoUz4d4IN-vvS69jRgHthwXWXlVZMMfnahYADbi-kUbS6Dvs-bV7GJve99Bh-zUUCWxFk0agAkPvNDa-eF14L_QfqobFyMONjNVzR8fTtngXv_k1HNSj9TWicLs7hfdl1Yh6mRpyC4Y2SVIoKB0i_w5fTDf0VbWarLiA%3D)**

With you in this fight,

Billy Long

name: Dr. Roger Marshall
subject: Your vaccine appointment is coming up

body:
| Fellow patriot, My name is Dr. Roger Marshall and I’m one of only four doctors in the U.S. Senate.

Like millions of other Americans, my family and I made the highly personal choice to get vaccinated. Having practiced medicine for nearly 30 years, medical decisions are between you, your family, and your doctor. Period.

But let me be clear, **nobody should force you to get the vaccine if you don’t want it**. Vaccines should NEVER be mandatory — and I’m leading the fight to block ALL of Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates.

Last week, **I attempted to block funding of the federal government** until Democrats stopped enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandates. And I’m not going to stop fighting against the destructive mandates Biden is attempting to enforce.
**_

name: Matt West
subject: I can’t stop thinking about this:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
It’s now or never. | I’ve got a lot on my mind, friend:
1. **GOP leaders are peddling dangerous anti-vaccine conspiracies while the Delta variant ravages hospitals and the Omicron variant spreads across the country.**

2. **Republican state legislators in 49 states proposed over 400 extreme voter suppression laws to disenfranchise Black and brown voters and secure their coordinated power grab in 2022.**

3. **Far-right loyalists are encouraging Donald Trump to run for president again, even after inciting a violent insurrection and working to discredit the 2020 election results.**

But here’s what really scares the hell out of me: **If the midterm elections were held tomorrow, experts predict Republicans would take back the House without breaking a sweat.** I can't emphasize this enough: if Republicans beat us in 2022, we can kiss our country as we know it goodbye — our democracy, progress on climate change, reproductive rights, healthcare, and more will be all for nothing unless we do SOMETHING. That's why there’s no plan B for Democrats like myself. **_[We must win BIG next year to keep the GOP out of power. I am counting on 500 grassroots fighters to chip in $13.23 (our average contribution!) before 11:59 pm on Thursday to take us closer to our crucial end-of-year fundraising goal>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39677270/320919430/-265126237?amount=13.23&refcode=ea.a8cf7fff-325d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.a8cf7fff-325d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGNmN2ZmZi0zMjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zcUHqGCDuvoy-VWg7_xgkL3uXNvtUScPhVBYurtsRZE=)_** Friend, our new Congressional District is one of a handful of real opportunities to win a new seat. clean_body: It’s now or never. | I’ve got a lot on my mind, friend: 1. GOP leaders are peddling dangerous anti-vaccine conspiracies while the Delta variant ravages hospitals and the Omicron variant spreads across the country. 2. Republican state legislators in 49 states proposed over 400 extreme voter suppression laws to disenfranchise Black and brown voters and secure their coordinated power grab in 2022. 3. Far-right loyalists are encouraging Donald Trump to run for president again, even after inciting a violent insurrection and working to discredit the 2020 election results. But here’s what really scares the hell out of me: If the midterm elections were held tomorrow, experts predict Republicans would take back the House without breaking a sweat. I can't emphasize this enough: if Republicans beat us in 2022, we can kiss our country as we know it goodbye — our democracy, progress on climate change, reproductive rights, healthcare, and more will be all for nothing unless we do SOMETHING. That's why there’s no plan B for Democrats like myself. = Friend, our new Congressional District is one of a handful of real opportunities to win a new seat. And I believe I am just the scientist to do it. Congress has no place for Donald Trump’s far-right extremist movement. 2022 is not about Democrats vs. Republicans. It’s about democracy defenders vs. unhinged extremists. It’s about pro-science followers vs dangerous propagandists. And we’re running out of time to prepare for the most crucial election of our lifetime. We need leaders who will never back down from this fight. body:
When you look at Sinema’s donors, it starts to make sense. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPG4qFFwDzwHCyoLiexB7KdBt_nGHyMOg_37KXzLYo4hh9wUJ14jbL_rqFgmzHJlJB3dKm1QZ1Waa9G8zCxy49eK5CBwQg3A8CbObyW3hmPHsiXpwWNvfRTRPgZuYGG32ntdKpHEuE4ahPOxATTawjHtihOaimScAhXwIVuPCmQiiw6_ZjGReEPkr_Youf5tpB4vKJQe7MRSf4fzpYQk_bllkmPad2xMAI_a_tzzm_OMYkVreWflkcMGws3f3bK-fQA7XAveVZ-iaCn1ojMFhfH_-6D-kwCSddeOlr38fqquw/3hu/tQXzXsRCQOmqc87tvmfCTQ/h0/SNPcXSmlCcsUJOzbtGoeprveOKBWjpPMCD8bGVPpQ5c)
Peter, if you want to understand Senator Kyrsten Sinema, you just need to look at who’s funding her. **She opposes lowering prescription drug prices for millions of Americans?** Would you look at that — Big Pharma lobbyists bankrolled a dark money group to spend more than $720,000 on TV ads praising Sinema. **She helped gut major pieces of the Build Back Better Act?** Well, her campaign has taken nearly $1 million from corporate interests opposed to Build Back Better, including the U.S. Chamber of Commerce, the Business Roundtable, the RATE Coalition, the National Association of Manufacturers, and PhRMA. **She rejects tax increases on corporations and the wealthiest 1%?** Funny, because _multiple_ Republican billionaires, including private equity investor Marc J. Rowan and media mogul Stanley Hubbard, have cut her a check. You get where this is going. Kyrsten Sinema is raking in millions of dollars in campaign contributions by standing in the way of progress. And if we don’t stop her, she’ll use that cash to try and buy another six years in the Senate. **[Will you make a donation right now to help us replace Sinema with a Senator who will actually serve Arizonans? Whether it’s $5, $15, or $50, every dollar will support a grassroots-led coalition working to oust Sinema.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSohfz8ANHzK0uTuEgDcKJh_I8CZNOzno03o9w7WHi5gT3lllXn808G_i3Q6NxvjUKk-HtsEGkUzDOFil6tG_MP9Lx7U9_wTZ-Frgj5rgDOqxfCDwO-LYa8IjmCm4rmoYd4bNGsX8-cplC753amfaoqgBsQW8ztDiSgFbfs68UTFCsH7PmZT3k2DKvAELW_XpVn510gS2NOa7T0L7yvNidYDhrCDMiJyn6rxgk9MdnhSAZg45s-phjfbXuKZhV9II6Mogn0KSXpqT-8SrD9WS-SoLjnBf1T3Koc5rmaVoeqO2-K5UPbNlf0aX_0wYP1K0adfTTGK1kHzV1GXBXjy3qDru7vbi-z-rEFAGkKn5RlkoQUikvNgVtqRIPcr1varEu/3hu/tQXzXsRCQOmqc87tvmfCTQ/h1/uYNr2UcKJ68RoWFP9vF_5aiXhHqsB1GL_Aa5hlxUu-A)** **[Contribute $3](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSohfz8ANHzK0uTuEgDcKJh_I8CZNOzno03o9w7WHi5gSNfB7bMRaAXol3O1czYiAWRxjy5ZA3pOQEn-gBch3bXl4pSDI3vgx3XG3Rilbh3gxyEcBMerny7PJ-EWv2PcV-KXRCUYOLFLWv2JB3v5hwoycGkmqR9YLr8PCMGtCF4A0B7EfG6Mawl0f4PHSewdUcXF_i0rTYpGYLHK_tnWEjFmF96fKQTqMvYAsw6MlEdaf6n20X8xBkBoHGswuDAYTIi72gD4ZthqWEPGdiXqYilG2PSR-b7ZcFxf7bCuVqTz_bXR5g1XZftsYxI0Kcz7DQfNDuP_7EFxAgKQwtH-TUOU7lq1zDt_Ypg9k-U0as7RyXmLWLIvlVo-t_omW6q5pF/3hu/tQXzXsRCQOmqc87tvmfCTQ/h2/O2ISfbsrSSTrVdNyMe1UxTqSD9NBqcUu8R0Un1HKoug)** Senator Kyrsten Sinema doesn’t represent Arizonans in the Senate — she represents her donors, many of whom are Republicans. clean_body: When you look at Sinema’s donors, it starts to make sense. | | | Peter, if you want to understand Senator Kyrsten Sinema, you just need to look at who’s funding her. She opposes lowering prescription drug prices for millions of Americans? Would you look at that — Big Pharma lobbyists bankrolled a dark money group to spend more than $720,000 on TV ads praising Sinema. She helped gut major pieces of the Build Back Better Act? Well, her campaign has taken nearly $1 million from corporate interests opposed to Build Back Better, including the U.S. Chamber of Commerce, the Business Roundtable, the RATE Coalition, the National Association of Manufacturers, and PhRMA. She rejects tax increases on corporations and the wealthiest 1%? Funny, because multiple Republican billionaires, including private equity investor Marc J. Rowan and media mogul Stanley Hubbard, have cut her a check. You get where this is going. Kyrsten Sinema is raking in millions of dollars in campaign contributions by standing in the way of progress. And if we don’t stop her, she’ll use that cash to try and buy another six years in the Senate. Senator Kyrsten Sinema doesn’t represent Arizonans in the Senate — she represents her donors, many of whom are Republicans. But we can't wait until a primary challenger jumps in the race to act. We need to lay the groundwork now. Thank you for pitching in what you can today, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. Hi team, When you go to the ballot box on Election Day, would you like your vote to maybe count? Imagine disclaimers on the bottom of your ballot - _“Subject to Republican Approval.” _**With a Republican Secretary of State, there are no guarantees.** Conspiracies and hoaxes about the 2020 election already threatened this country once. Our best defense is electing people like Chelsea to be Ohio’s Secretary of State -- people who don’t prioritize their party over our nation. We want Ohio to send out a bright blue beacon from the Secretary of State’s office, letting any and every opponent of democracy know that we are not a state to be messed with. body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [SIGN THE CARD: Wish Ted Cruz a Crappy Birthday! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T765c807e-d1e7-40aa-b87a-df43a7b0781f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Ted Cruz’s birthday is next week and we want to make sure he has the worst birthday ever! In just the past few weeks, Ted Cruz said Dr. Fauci should be prosecuted, and attacked Big Bird for promoting COVID-19 vaccines. And let’s not forget about when he abandoned his constituents in Texas during a catastrophic storm for a trip to Cancun, and when he voted to overturn the results of the 2020 election. Need we say more?? Cruz is a sorry excuse for a Senator. That’s why we’re sending him a huge card to wish him a Crappy Birthday! [Add your name now before we run out of room >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e3e68e4-ae17-4af8-88ac-72f9747c897a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Did you see my note, friend? My team told me our December fundraising has slowed to a crawl, and we need to pick it up. When the year ends, Republicans will see exactly how much my team has raised, and they’ll use that number to gauge the strength of our campaign. With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. **If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority.** With all eyes on New Hampshire, it's critical that we have the resources to build a robust on-the-ground campaign that is ready for whatever the GOP throws our way. **[So I'm humbly asking: will you chip in $5 towards our mid-month goal before it's too late?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39677839/320921929/-913685435?refcode=e20211214_mwh-mm-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4MzNjOS0zNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uah0vIf7NgcO6DveXikP4c6dMqJGm5BVJ6qonDszfjI=)** Here's the best link to give at: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mwh-em-dec21](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39677840/320921930/-913685435?refcode=e20211214_mwh-mm-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4MzNjOS0zNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uah0vIf7NgcO6DveXikP4c6dMqJGm5BVJ6qonDszfjI=)** Thank you for being on our team! With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Maggie Hassan**
Date: Tue, Dec 14, 2021
Subject: this is hard, so please read I’ll just be blunt, everyone: Our December fundraising is falling behind, and I’m emailing to ask if you can **[chip in to help us make up ground today before we all turn our attention to the holidays.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39677841/320921931/-913685435?refcode=e20211214_mwh-mm-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4MzNjOS0zNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uah0vIf7NgcO6DveXikP4c6dMqJGm5BVJ6qonDszfjI=)** There are a lot of important issues coming to a head right now – investing in our economy, protecting safe and legal access to reproductive health care, strengthening voting rights, and taking meaningful action on climate change. These things are hard, and the progress we’ve made will come to a standstill if Republicans take back the Senate majority next year. The reality is that New Hampshire is a deeply purple state, and experts say that 2022 could be very tough for Democrats. Republicans have spent $7 MILLION and counting to defeat me, and polls show that this race is extremely tight. I’m asking you to donate $5 or more to my campaign because there is too much on the line not to. My 2016 race was the most expensive in state history – we eked out a win by a narrow 1,017 vote margin. **[In races as close as that, your $5 really can be the thing that wins this seat or hands it back to Republican control. So, please, donate $5 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39677842/320921932/-913685435?refcode=e20211214_mwh-mm-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4MzNjOS0zNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uah0vIf7NgcO6DveXikP4c6dMqJGm5BVJ6qonDszfjI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39677843/320921933/-913685435?refcode=e20211214_mwh-mm-k&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4MzNjOS0zNjVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uah0vIf7NgcO6DveXikP4c6dMqJGm5BVJ6qonDszfjI=)

clean_body: | | | Did you see my note, friend? My team told me our December fundraising has slowed to a crawl, and we need to pick it up. When the year ends, Republicans will see exactly how much my team has raised, and they’ll use that number to gauge the strength of our campaign. With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority. With all eyes on New Hampshire, it's critical that we have the resources to build a robust on-the-ground campaign that is ready for whatever the GOP throws our way. = Here's the best link to give at: = Thank you for being on our team! With every good wish, Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Maggie Hassan Date: Tue, Dec 14, 2021 Subject: this is hard, so please read I’ll just be blunt, everyone: Our December fundraising is falling behind, and I’m emailing to ask if you can = There are a lot of important issues coming to a head right now – investing in our economy, protecting safe and legal access to reproductive health care, strengthening voting rights, and taking meaningful action on climate change. These things are hard, and the progress we’ve made will come to a standstill if Republicans take back the Senate majority next year. The reality is that New Hampshire is a deeply purple state, and experts say that 2022 could be very tough for Democrats. Republicans have spent $7 MILLION and counting to defeat me, and polls show that this race is extremely tight. I’m asking you to donate $5 or more to my campaign because there is too much on the line not to. My 2016 race was the most expensive in state history – we eked out a win by a narrow 1,017 vote margin. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: 2022 Wisconsin U.S. Senate Polling Update:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
First, The Cook Political Report upgraded Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate race from Lean Republican to Toss-Up, and CNN called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable Republican Senator up in 2022.

Then, a top-rated FiveThirtyEight pollster released a new poll showing Sarah Godlewski as the only Democrat leading Ron Johnson (48–46).

Now, we're hearing he's about to announce his re-election decision very soon. We need to put ourselves in the strongest position possible to defeat Ron Johnson, and that means reaching our most important fundraising goal of the year.

Can you help us keep up our momentum by making a donation to Sarah's campaign before the end-of-year FEC deadline? Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control, and a recent poll proves what we’ve been saying all along — Sarah is the best candidate to defeat Ron Johnson.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-december21

Thanks!

— Team Sarah

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign:

Contribute >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-december21

Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States

body:
| | | [**Donate now to keep our momentum going. Our year-end fundraising deadline is under 3 weeks away and we want to start off 2022 strong.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1Opcvfo_ADjBxYG-DZSyKOqLRBy4UQbsJTmeaB0T_NG_AwkeRPyNl4aNprCNFtNm2-drgEv3VPIvBp8mr0KFNmaY1vrAFHNJAXtRNwvJsR8LkxyZbbY_l7nfcqMGIpB2mXZVS91X_IEubu0mpX7r0eVor6VVGQ9_Xcrre54nVTgF1CTwYu5DiSy68aXlGzpFIqcHGdz3aUskrs7daGuAHViqaQsnb72mqhw0kxakQLJ7kJcWSN0wUxw6XQSUmzJGa95ksDYyBjT936I4etIW6QTRzOhM1NynpxRC2ufEkQlikMlHpVThnb5E22osrCEmF8GC99NE0HMSJhVI4RQKAZQ/3hu/YaqWWnczQF-HXB7a_Kl9xg/h0/ZENFzeUP0hn1wiLSCKlbUg_MWcIt8jDRQR11mhD6Wmg)
We now have an opponent in our Democratic primary, and he’s not even a Democrat.
A few months ago I protested and testified at a Nassau County legislative hearing to speak out against an unconstitutional, right-wing bill that would have allowed active-duty and retired police officers to sue citizens for $25,000 and protestors for $50,000 if they felt threatened, discriminated against or harassed—with irrebuttable presumption, meaning a court would take their accusation as truth.
**The author of that right-wing bill registered as a Democrat on December 1st and has now entered the Democratic primary as my new opponent.**
****[**Please chip in today to keep this seat blue and in the hands of actual Democrats.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1Opcvfo_ADjBxYG-DZSyKOrypx60e9ZGKyrj-9O0Yhf-LHzc6_DOklX4GwQRvdsGONwz1xUGL6QbgqEr3q3CXaArk2-jWzcmiGNA8Kq9weoyDMwVQbEYHMI6LYm0WMjogBT5g9JfLTNkyyLFLdYlyhxmc-DlO94dtEEricORSXQa49gFC7JvGaB8rPLJtPUiqv7KJUmPWmaR8Ca0pkZGWzhkoJ6FIwDsCaBHXynVEcw2FYdmbBPwgzAIsh8PPXcQM4ALKebSCJf9nfQ4HQG15E-QtWmwTK_K0E0-26GYxPBbGMOUemuznoEZghvY4O9ChBJiO5OkzKf8gzdTH2gL8Tc/3hu/YaqWWnczQF-HXB7a_Kl9xg/h1/uZwTcsXcPd5Tmx94-uCdB_3WLlFfyf1heEFI0-w99A0)
The families of Queens and Long Island deserve someone in Congress who is fighting unapologetically for their best interests — not lobbyist interests. We’ve been there. We’ve done that. It hasn’t worked out well for any of us.
I’m rejecting corporate lobbyist money because my policies aren’t for sale. Because I’m not owned by lobbyists, I can fight for actual solutions that put our families, communities and future first.
[**Our year-end fundraising deadline is under 3 weeks away and we want to start off 2022 strong. Please chip in today.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1Opcvfo_ADjBxYG-DZSyKOp7OjKeX7WFEwxG4onwG3usOVE4pi5zJOJGtKzb7B2Dpny4feCORmXBIsnon2_5ifvNJjWUSNPC9RCxryVbe4k6p66NbfN5kTFUqNn2YzzXTu2I78usYON6UwVCZBsKOoizL4-vKbRtV6xzFneGT_5JuxfB8JCxkNxaVvrKuRWfmalASvv3nxgko1TADwH3smREVE_Np6XqbyF_ww2wYHxZfpGsIcbjkxdr2gvCld7Fv6nvsSeO273xg6W85iqTGTd8ggp3yl0Xl0SsncrjQoQ-iYMEnYwptVkMZVvxV20VvZWL6BDfJDMjTV0RjyJeXag/3hu/YaqWWnczQF-HXB7a_Kl9xg/h2/-H11mfV-dxjNblyAlkmaYGhPKip1zWI8BUATVwV1FZo)

clean_body: | | | We now have an opponent in our Democratic primary, and he’s not even a Democrat. A few months ago I protested and testified at a Nassau County legislative hearing to speak out against an unconstitutional, right-wing bill that would have allowed active-duty and retired police officers to sue citizens for $25,000 and protestors for $50,000 if they felt threatened, discriminated against or harassed—with irrebuttable presumption, meaning a court would take their accusation as truth. The author of that right-wing bill registered as a Democrat on December 1st and has now entered the Democratic primary as my new opponent. **** The families of Queens and Long Island deserve someone in Congress who is fighting unapologetically for their best interests — not lobbyist interests. We’ve been there. We’ve done that. It hasn’t worked out well for any of us. I’m rejecting corporate lobbyist money because my policies aren’t for sale. Because I’m not owned by lobbyists, I can fight for actual solutions that put our families, communities and future first. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | We are running out of time to protect our democracy, codify our rights and protect our planet. We must ensure that every step we take is a step forward and together. Thank you for building with me. — Melanie is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo | | Sent via . | | | | Take Action: OHA Circumventing Legislature Trying to Change Rules to Mandate Shots without Exemptions!

**Urgent Action: OHA is attempting to Circumvent the Legislature and Change Rules to Mandate New Vaccines without Exemptions!**

Please send your letter and help get this Call to Action out ASAP.

We have **until today at 5:00pm** to ensure you make your voice heard for Oregon schoolchildren!

My campaign manager and I have been working behind the scenes with several other grassroots group leaders on this call to action and greatly appreciate all who stepped up to help. It was sent out to 10,000 Oregonians Friday night by our friends at Stand for Health Freedom who are hosting this important call to action on their platform and we need your help to get it thousands more! _Read below for more details about what OHA is attempting to do._

As an [_editorial calling for the disbanding of the Oregon Health Authority_](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7ZaHwBN5Kwqo-2B1YPGFDE2tXny853xmP3wuvbc9aeEs570SbFvBXjfFs14nTtyM2NgF8p9fGCerwKWQcwJRv18p2AqcvRv-2FgshNf-2FTDme1QfLnEIEYQfWpkEah-2B-2BKemmDygKzFzMUUCwvl4-2BRig3AXpg-3DGod3_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6zzr03UqWQyncKxmzephFQl1aK2OEjo7iD2FPXZXhSa63Qhp3zw6tHsglV9jRyZ-2BncvOelZEtKIXuzdB1MuwSUCictn6VQP0bNkp4UHg0u2uZTCNmz5wvx-2B9MI6s-2BXzriQ94abL9dOEFmNfriJHURFkFnXWysFqc7DBMC9JjQeiJ6hLEThDcfmEMZOp4vdejh5gtFBKFok0-2FrpMUlmTyWF-2FiIQ5z3nV-2FOClNxILkyUGFuW7k7r99dBOreeniTiib8UMQumvKa6KZ0YOO5tT1uaWuGNe8lBxC0BnhbH-2FpvYNme6GVnRUQI2IK8-2FraMFv2EdQDgieKEbzTmjA7A-2FSMvPyrXBqd3PISC-2BKTK7MiL7Zm9jqSEEU7jqUbraRde128WKqo28k54nh5pTKA3uot8EGHPH1Enl9DpMu7RjUo8WNd-2FLkEFOKEe1OmvOTRDFO0NMHre98oYZR-2B-2B-2B8-2F5KppO-2BSJD0F4K7Lxr36sc-2FSIrUC4TuqFbhSAGygXWtkIY5BrB-2F-2F5Pbrld0mQjhUF-2FoJHw8aCcncpRpTF6Ido-2F0rZQTRrB01Hi43u6k9zn3qCwMwiDPO7ddo2ia1DGlbwVmWm7e5-2FdkT88XRo9Mu8nZ7ntYmU-2FkhZIJHTY6NCKawSDMZvX5S81LLO0Q46j-2FZNN3J-2FKXaW3RXYJFXbbmNdYP7OQXQ9to6JID5H5jhQW4oLfe-2FSlPlTqcSQKzODXCV6QO-2BurUXN1J6oKahlFohR-2FTf8J0SIEGzBT-2FtE3FxCGV6iLoypNTKGGD6SzF1UWsY9ZwP1XsIXYesQvmL52-2BOgTzEHdFt4keOi19-2FwNOVxjy9D7nvVmLw4hNrbqEhnkmcxdQM9uNvhSAzof1kJtbXWm5sBWcEo-3D) revealed in _The Roseburg Beacon_ last week, the OHA has a total budget exceeding $29 BILLION for 2021-2023 for our small state, up nearly 20% from the prior budget! They are a relatively newer agency for Oregon, and they are trying to dictate medical choices throughout several areas of our life that violate our God-given and constitutionally protected freedoms and informed consent to medical treatments without coercion.
---
| [SEND YOUR TESTIMONY](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7XRq58zunBTondOi6uOb26Imx93dyCnvm5hYWKJAv0XvnnuVIxrdQV-2FqdMegK8DIYHz9QF4WGtMOZwU9oCNy64Y-3Dt-XL_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6zzr03UqWQyncKxmzephFQl1aK2OEjo7iD2FPXZXhSa63Qhp3zw6tHsglV9jRyZ-2BncvOelZEtKIXuzdB1MuwSUCictn6VQP0bNkp4UHg0u2uZTCNmz5wvx-2B9MI6s-2BXzriQ94abL9dOEFmNfriJHURFkFnXWysFqc7DBMC9JjQeiJ6hLEThDcfmEMZOp4vdejh5gtFBKFok0-2FrpMUlmTyWF-2FiIQ5z3nV-2FOClNxILkyUGFuW7k7r99dBOreeniTiib8UMQumvKa6KZ0YOO5tT1uaWuGNe8lBxC0BnhbH-2FpvYNme6GVnRUQI2IK8-2FraMFv2EdQDgieKEbzTmjA7A-2FSMvPyrXBqd3PISC-2BKTK7MiL7Zm9jqSEEU7jqUbraRde128WKqo28k54nh5pTKA3uot8EGHPH1Enl9DpMu7RjUo8WNd-2FLkEFOKEe1OmvOTRDFO0NMHre98oYZR-2B-2B-2B8-2F5KppO-2BSJD0F4K7Lxr36sc-2FSIrUC4TuqFbhSAGygXWtkIY5BrB-2F-2F5Pbrld0mQjhUF-2FoJHw8aCcncpRpTF6Ido-2F0rZQTRrB01Hi43u6k9zn3qCwMwiDPO7ddo2ia1DGlbwVmWm7e5-2FdkT88XRo9Mu8nZ7ntYmU-2FkhZIJHTY6NCKawSDMZvX5S81LLO0Q46j-2FZNN3J-2FKXaW3RXYJFXbbmNdYP7OQXQ9to6JID5H5jhQW4oLfe-2FSlvOtoda19KIo7Gh80nVvPlWV-2FgFaab2qzgMC1onQzZ7k6H-2BUohtzwsdWa0OarRVcnm4UMJHaJ9A6Pi27QTHQwo2lMBw1kqHj4sz0TzrkZkeoBUle520Nr7F1VGPkGSKTss6M08VdGdp3QanJOmPl7chPpuiWwNSpXmDwmJITBfec-3D)
---
**HERE ARE MORE DETAILS ABOUT WHAT IS HAPPENING**

These proposed rule changes are basically attempting to do what SB 442 (2015), HB 3063 (2019), and SB 254 (2021) have ALL failed to do in Oregon, which, in essence, is to mandate an immunization as a prerequisite to attend school in Oregon and openly discriminate against students and families who exercise their right to decline a medical procedure through:

a. Definition changes for immunity to narrow the scope down to vaccine-induced away from acknowledgement of natural immunity, attempting to create a new definition for immunity to effectively be vaccine-induced-only with requirement to show proof of said immunity, which creates an unofficial mandate, even if they say that technically the COVID vaccine is not a "required" vaccine but showing proof of immunity is and the proof can only be from a vaccine. [[_Another new study just out shows natural is stronger/better_](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7UUC8BNoDZiHC5lvpb78F-2F2ujnPapOzkrLA-2F-2Fhxev8HQ-2FXX7WkzFh4w43iK6IkVBOE-2BRyqtJKqGGjlLx8Fi71Juk1TlZStoMwUg78973ehC-2Fqg6r4stPiSi0qeP1SLW1VbP-2BRhi-2B99UbK8im-2FnSQssDDMOchAZMM-2F-2BK8nGAzBluxwjH__XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6zzr03UqWQyncKxmzephFQl1aK2OEjo7iD2FPXZXhSa63Qhp3zw6tHsglV9jRyZ-2BncvOelZEtKIXuzdB1MuwSUCictn6VQP0bNkp4UHg0u2uZTCNmz5wvx-2B9MI6s-2BXzriQ94abL9dOEFmNfriJHURFkFnXWysFqc7DBMC9JjQeiJ6hLEThDcfmEMZOp4vdejh5gtFBKFok0-2FrpMUlmTyWF-2FiIQ5z3nV-2FOClNxILkyUGFuW7k7r99dBOreeniTiib8UMQumvKa6KZ0YOO5tT1uaWuGNe8lBxC0BnhbH-2FpvYNme6GVnRUQI2IK8-2FraMFv2EdQDgieKEbzTmjA7A-2FSMvPyrXBqd3PISC-2BKTK7MiL7Zm9jqSEEU7jqUbraRde128WKqo28k54nh5pTKA3uot8EGHPH1Enl9DpMu7RjUo8WNd-2FLkEFOKEe1OmvOTRDFO0NMHre98oYZR-2B-2B-2B8-2F5KppO-2BSJD0F4K7Lxr36sc-2FSIrUC4TuqFbhSAGygXWtkIY5BrB-2F-2F5Pbrld0mQjhUF-2FoJHw8aCcncpRpTF6Ido-2F0rZQTRrB01Hi43u6k9zn3qCwMwiDPO7ddo2ia1DGlbwVmWm7e5-2FdkT88XRo9Mu8nZ7ntYmU-2FkhZIJHTY6NCKawSDMZvX5S81LLO0Q46j-2FZNN3J-2FKXaW3RXYJFXbbmNdYP7OQXQ9to6JID5H5jhQW4oLfe-2FSlaRJF9G5ZZ8VJwotNS5GNkS4S1qlqs00aAzNd2cf51hy9kRvIFkMRABQWqrF2quB4Nd3R6YmUKMfabYGfsRghVAYzlmvvzzMCAWkvUmCAfATH6Ky5rkvAWXe1v8WW7hAgPI-2BkK-2F3iGgpQ38rVM309sdXjSUNSXJ9AMdw8le0U4QA-3D)]

b. Omission by OHA of explicit option for medical and non-medical exemptions currently allowable under Oregon state law for other vaccinations for school attendance.

c. Little transparency and happening during the holiday season: this effort is happening largely behind the Oregon legislature and the public's purview: no media coverage, only one virtual public meeting scheduled that was buried away from easy access--even members of the COVID Response Legislative Committee were unaware until AFTER a stand-alone quiet meeting by OHA happened. We are demanding another public hearing and a push back on the deadline for public comment from 5pm 12/14 to later in 2022 when the legislature can review the matter and be held at a time following the holidays when the public will be ready, researched and focused on the Democratic process.

d. There is NO epidemiological reason to force vaccinate 5-11-year-old children as the risks from Covid are lower than the risk of vaccine injury. Pfizer’s own research verifies this fact, but executives and CDC officials moved forward with the mass vaccination of children anyway (Pfizer trying to bury data now for 75 years!)

Please step up and sign your name to an easy-to-send letter to OHA and your elected officials through Stand for Health Freedom, now!

clean_body: | | | | Take Action: OHA Circumventing Legislature Trying to Change Rules to Mandate Shots without Exemptions! Urgent Action: OHA is attempting to Circumvent the Legislature and Change Rules to Mandate New Vaccines without Exemptions! Please send your letter and help get this Call to Action out ASAP. We have until today at 5:00pm to ensure you make your voice heard for Oregon schoolchildren! My campaign manager and I have been working behind the scenes with several other grassroots group leaders on this call to action and greatly appreciate all who stepped up to help. It was sent out to 10,000 Oregonians Friday night by our friends at Stand for Health Freedom who are hosting this important call to action on their platform and we need your help to get it thousands more! Read below for more details about what OHA is attempting to do. | As an revealed in The Roseburg Beacon last week, the OHA has a total budget exceeding $29 BILLION for 2021-2023 for our small state, up nearly 20% from the prior budget! They are a relatively newer agency for Oregon, and they are trying to dictate medical choices throughout several areas of our life that violate our God-given and constitutionally protected freedoms and informed consent to medical treatments without coercion. | HERE ARE MORE DETAILS ABOUT WHAT IS HAPPENING These proposed rule changes are basically attempting to do what SB 442 (2015), HB 3063 (2019), and SB 254 (2021) have ALL failed to do in Oregon, which, in essence, is to mandate an immunization as a prerequisite to attend school in Oregon and openly discriminate against students and families who exercise their right to decline a medical procedure through: a. Definition changes for immunity to narrow the scope down to vaccine-induced away from acknowledgement of natural immunity, attempting to create a new definition for immunity to effectively be vaccine-induced-only with requirement to show proof of said immunity, which creates an unofficial mandate, even if they say that technically the COVID vaccine is not a "required" vaccine but showing proof of immunity is and the proof can only be from a vaccine. ] b. Omission by OHA of explicit option for medical and non-medical exemptions currently allowable under Oregon state law for other vaccinations for school attendance. c. Little transparency and happening during the holiday season: this effort is happening largely behind the Oregon legislature and the public's purview: no media coverage, only one virtual public meeting scheduled that was buried away from easy access--even members of the COVID Response Legislative Committee were unaware until AFTER a stand-alone quiet meeting by OHA happened. We are demanding another public hearing and a push back on the deadline for public comment from 5pm 12/14 to later in 2022 when the legislature can review the matter and be held at a time following the holidays when the public will be ready, researched and focused on the Democratic process. d. There is NO epidemiological reason to force vaccinate 5-11-year-old children as the risks from Covid are lower than the risk of vaccine injury. Pfizer’s own research verifies this fact, but executives and CDC officials moved forward with the mass vaccination of children anyway (Pfizer trying to bury data now for 75 years!) Please step up and sign your name to an easy-to-send letter to OHA and your elected officials through Stand for Health Freedom, now! vs. ] | | If you are able, please help us continue to fight through this campaign with tangible action to help Oregonians now through our direct efforts to fight. Your contribution can help us continue our efforts as we face large special interests! | | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM_ mailto:info@marcfororegon.com?subject=&body= | 541-649-2411 PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 949, Bandon, 97411

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: THE Worst Commander in Chief in History
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden disrespects the military |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a22d42472a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

As a vet, I'm furious at Joe Biden and his disrespect for our military!

_One of the greatest things about President Trump was his love for our military and our soldiers. That man knows the value of those who lay down their lives for our freedom!_

Joe Biden, though, hates America. He has made our military woke and weak- and his latest disrespect has been too much!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e7ca3490e7&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area last held by Republicans in 2013. This is a targeted district by the NRCC because, with the Red Wave coming in 2022, we can take this seat!**

Surely you've heard of the "woke" generals like Milley. With guys like this, one wonders if we would even win a war anymore? Townhall reports:

_Last year, Milley should have been fired when he apologized for walking with President Trump to St. John’s Episcopal Church near the White House. In the mayhem of a riot in Washington D.C., the church was severely damaged and almost burned to the ground. By visiting, the President showed his support for religious freedom and his opposition to the lawlessness that occurred nationwide in the aftermath of the death of George Floyd in Minneapolis. Before leaving, the President was photographed holding a Bible in front of the church.

After backlash from left-wing commentators on social media, Milley apologized. In an address to the National Defense University, Milley said “I should not have been there...My presence in that moment and in that environment created a perception of the military involved in domestic politics.”

The apology was unnecessary and foolish; however, it did confirm to all Americans that Milley did not support President Trump. It served as his plea to keep the position in the Biden administration. Not surprisingly, Milley was retained by Biden as both share the same ideology and the same level of incompetence.

In June, Milley established his “woke” credentials by decrying the evils of white anger and supporting the study of this topic in the United States military. In congressional testimony, Milley defended the teaching of critical race theory at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f1e2e2a3c0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| But now, Biden as pushed this too far!

Presidents usually attend the annual Army-Navy game. President Trump attended every year- it was his way of honoring the service by the cadets and midshipmen.

Biden? He hid in the White House, afraid to face the scorn of the military!
_**Donald Trump Jr.: Joe Biden Skipped Army-Navy Game to Avoid “Let’s Go Brandon!” Chants**_
_Joe Biden snubbed the Army-Navy football game on Saturday, opting instead to remain in his home state of Delaware.

The internet couldn’t help but notice Biden’s absence at the Army-Navy game at the MetLife Stadium in Rutherford, New Jersey, which has been customarily attended by former U.S. presidents.

“Let’s Go Brandon” and “Fuck Joe Biden” chants have erupted at numerous college football games across the country in recent months as his COVID and spending policies have resulted in inflation, rising gas prices, and supply chain breakdowns.

By contrast, former President Trump enjoyed epic tributes from soldiers and spectators alike during the Army-Navy games, which he attended every year as president except for 2017._

Now, different presidents have different priorities when they get to office.

BUT EVERY SINGLE PRESIDENT SINCE 1900, EXCEPT BIDEN, HAS ATTENDED THE ARMY-NAVY GAME!

This is the reason the winner gets the "Commander in Chief Trophy".

**Biden simply hates our military. He hates our country and wants to weaken and diminish those who protect us. That's the only reasonable explanation for this!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=43fcaa0d7e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **I am a combat Army vet. My sons served as well. The military is very important to our family, and we understand the importance of defending our freedoms. **

The Socialist Democrats disagree. My Socialist opponent, Darren Soto, disagrees. Biden apparently disagrees.

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood up for our country, and stood against the Socialists. We want America First! Will you stand alongside me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=412afb2bbf&e=afa21b7626)

_The military needs allies in DC right now. They don't need Darren Soto! They need fighters, and I will fight for our military!_

Help me stand for Americans against Biden, and those who would destroy our country! [Help me stop all of Biden's agenda!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e6812e986e&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7bf788fc3c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6da3ecfa0c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=99f56cdb29&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f54fbd13ae&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=eb2ad15693) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=eb2ad15693).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Pima County Election Hearings Happened!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Be a part of history |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0b8107a148&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
_Today is the day._

My name is Mark Finchem and right now I am hosting a Pima County Election Hearing, just like the one that got the Maricopa Audit started!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9e82461584&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Yes, the Pima Audit is materializing, and we know what we find – more fraud. We know the evidence is there, we just need the resources to fully examine it!**

We will have a host of subject matter experts ready to testify and ready to get down to business. And we aren’t pulling any punches.

**From statistical and real number analysis from returned ballots, combined with robust canvassing and door knocking, we are bringing an arsenal of high-power resources to a problem that demands all of our attention.**

_But we know what happened last time. We revealed and uncovered ballot tampering and criminal activities that should result in JAIL TIME. And the media is covering it up and AG Mark Brnovich isn’t doing his job._

**This means we need to make a sound which no one can silence, and this means putting our own resources into pushing forward election integrity. And this is expensive.**

[But none of this happens without your urgent and continued support. clean_body: | Peter, Have you had a chance to see my campaign ad? It’s about the American Dream and the importance of winning this seat to protect that dream from the reckless policies coming from Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden. But in order to WIN, we’ll have to spread our message far and wide – Will you chip in to make sure we have the resources to get our ad out to other conservatives like you? My children are my motivation to run for Congress and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Failing to recapture the majority means my children and yours could miss out on the American Dream. We must reverse the reckless trajectory that Democrats are taking us on. It’s clear that Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Nancy Pelosi are making America weaker for the next generation. Our ad shows voters that they have a choice in next year’s midterm elections: we can either continue down this path or bring in a new majority that will build upon our potential. That’s why we need your help to ensure we have the resources to get our message out, Peter. Nancy Pelosi is going to try and drown us out with her millions, and we have to match them dollar for dollar. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

Friend, Every year I watch my husband travel around Colorado, listening to his constituents about what matters most to them. Michael has listened, has heard and has acted. When folks shared how massive forest fires threatened their livelihoods, he secured investments to fight the climate crisis and recover from wildfires. In response to concerns over the rising costs of raising a family, Michael expanded the Child Tax Credit and gave monthly tax cuts to working families. Addressing concerns about economic opportunity, he passed the infrastructure package, which will create scores of good-paying jobs all across Colorado. And he passed the largest single federal investment in high-speed internet expansion to help Americans compete on a global scale. Because of those wins, Colorado families can better afford to provide for their children. And as a country, we’re going to invest in the infrastructure needed to build for the future; and we’ll create good-paying jobs so that more people can live the American dream. But Michael is not done. He’s fighting to make sure that the expanded Child Tax Credit doesn’t end, and to lower the cost of prescription drugs. Meanwhile, the campaign is fighting to keep him in office and to fend off attacks against his record. That’s where you come in: Michael’s team tells me we’ve fallen a bit behind and have $20,000 to make up before the end of the quarter. **Will you pitch in before Thursday’s mid-month deadline to help Michael’s campaign close the gap? clean_body: | = Friend, Every year I watch my husband travel around Colorado, listening to his constituents about what matters most to them. Michael has listened, has heard and has acted. When folks shared how massive forest fires threatened their livelihoods, he secured investments to fight the climate crisis and recover from wildfires. In response to concerns over the rising costs of raising a family, Michael expanded the Child Tax Credit and gave monthly tax cuts to working families. Addressing concerns about economic opportunity, he passed the infrastructure package, which will create scores of good-paying jobs all across Colorado. And he passed the largest single federal investment in high-speed internet expansion to help Americans compete on a global scale. Because of those wins, Colorado families can better afford to provide for their children. And as a country, we’re going to invest in the infrastructure needed to build for the future; and we’ll create good-paying jobs so that more people can live the American dream. But Michael is not done. He’s fighting to make sure that the expanded Child Tax Credit doesn’t end, and to lower the cost of prescription drugs. Meanwhile, the campaign is fighting to keep him in office and to fend off attacks against his record. That’s where you come in: Michael’s team tells me we’ve fallen a bit behind and have $20,000 to make up before the end of the quarter. Will you pitch in before Thursday’s mid-month deadline to help Michael’s campaign close the gap? We need Michael in the Senate to keep delivering for Colorado families. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks for all your help, Susan Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

subject: Join me for a Virtual Reception with Cecile Richards and Representative Grace Meng on January 10!
body:
RSVP to join me on January 10!
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39678197/320924458/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM2ZDZmYi0zOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wicEpQARF_Fj3twpq9Hd1Sd5wAXGLDOxV19mbH68C0U=)

Dear Peter,
I wanted to reach out and personally invite you to join me for a**[virtual reception in support of my campaign for Governor of Maryland on Monday, January 10 at 5:30 PM ET](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39678199/320924460/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM2ZDZmYi0zOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wicEpQARF_Fj3twpq9Hd1Sd5wAXGLDOxV19mbH68C0U=&emci=a24ebc61-fe5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd36d6fb-395d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837). **
Since launching my campaign for Governor, I’ve been so honored to have the support of folks across the country. I’m especially thankful for the support of my friends **Cecile Richards** , former president of Planned Parenthood and co-founder of Supermajority, and **Congresswoman Grace Meng** , the first Asian-American woman elected to Congress from New York.
As President Biden often says, we are in the battle for the soul of our nation. Cecile’s work on reproductive rights and Congresswoman Meng’s tireless efforts on behalf of her constituents remind me that there’s nothing we can’t do **if we do it together.**
That's why I wanted to reach out and invite you to**[join us for a Virtual Conversation in support of my campaign for Governor of Maryland on Monday, January 10 at 5:30 PM.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39678201/320924462/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM2ZDZmYi0zOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wicEpQARF_Fj3twpq9Hd1Sd5wAXGLDOxV19mbH68C0U=&emci=a24ebc61-fe5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd36d6fb-395d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)** While these are tough times for our democracy, I'm grateful for folks like you who've stepped up.
[**Virtual Conversation with Cecile Richards and Representative Grace Meng**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39678203/320924464/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM2ZDZmYi0zOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wicEpQARF_Fj3twpq9Hd1Sd5wAXGLDOxV19mbH68C0U=&emci=a24ebc61-fe5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd36d6fb-395d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Monday, January 10, 2022 | 5:30 PM
**[RSVP Here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39678207/320924469/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM2ZDZmYi0zOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wicEpQARF_Fj3twpq9Hd1Sd5wAXGLDOxV19mbH68C0U=&emci=a24ebc61-fe5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd36d6fb-395d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)**
We need all hands on deck here in Maryland. **_[I hope you'll join us Monday, January 10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39678210/320924472/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM2ZDZmYi0zOTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wicEpQARF_Fj3twpq9Hd1Sd5wAXGLDOxV19mbH68C0U=&emci=a24ebc61-fe5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd36d6fb-395d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)_** to hear from these two inspirational women.
All the best,
Tom

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: this is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi Peter, I just wrapped up a meeting with some of my campaign staff, and as a valued member of this grassroots team, I wanted to give you an update about where things stand before our biggest fundraising deadline of the campaign.
Here's what you need to know: Mitch McConnell is hell-bent on taking back the Senate and just needs to flip one seat to pull it off – and his allies raised $85 million _this year alone_ to protect Republican incumbents and go on the offensive. Competing for every single seat matters immensely if Democrats hope to hang on to Senate control, **which is why our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) is absolutely crucial.**
You see, Sen. Grassley is more vulnerable than he's been in his entire, decades-long career. Earlier this year, polling showed more than 64% of likely Iowa voters didn't want to reelect him. NOW, new polling shows Sen. Grassley at record-low approval ratings. Democrats have never had a better opportunity to flip this seat blue – and as the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue, I have every intention of defeating Sen. Grassley and lifting up the voices of working families in the Senate.
But those tens of millions of dollars Mitch McConnell's allies have raised? They can tap into that campaign war chest at a moment's notice to destroy our momentum and protect Sen. Grassley. The Senate GOP campaign arm and Fox News have already attacked me. **We've got to build up resources to compete and show our strength, and ahead of our biggest public FEC fundraising deadline, we need to raise $50,000 over the next 48 hours to stay on track. We have a ways to go, so I would sure appreciate your support – seriously, whatever you can contribute – using this link: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39678493/320926672/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk449-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjNiNmZhYS0zYTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eX5hB8khD6FggYvztJQ29rA0tAXWqSFKeaezwx3oskA=)**
This is personal for me. Working families are _my_ family, and Sen. Grassley has failed us for far too long. It's time for a change and time for better leadership, which is exactly why I'm determined to win. Thanks for fighting by my side.

Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
