If you don’t know me, my name is Steve Scalise – I’m the Republican Whip in the House. That means it's my job to help lead our group of dedicated Conservatives to hold Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi accountable and defend President Trump's incredible legacy.

_I’m watching these close races like a hawk because even a few votes can change everything. One race was decided by just SIX VOTES._
Pelosi’s Democrats could reach thousands – even millions – of voters, and this is just phase one. [**I’m asking you for just 10 dollars. I need your help to get the word out, set the record straight, and fight back against the Liberal propaganda.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-32nyn-1pb83-4qqlpo3/)
If we don’t spring into action now, we’ll be forced to play defense all next year!
**I’m afraid I have to ask for 100% participation.**
That’s what it will take to deploy enough resources to the closest battleground districts. I know you receive lots of emails but I must insist that you respond to this important – and urgent – request.
[**Can you spare just 10 dollars? I’m hoping I can count on you.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-32nyn-1pb84-4qqlpo4/)
For America,
Republican Whip Steve Scalise

clean_body: &n; bsp; Not interested? Hey, If you don’t know me, my name is Steve Scalise – I’m the Republican Whip in the House. That means it's my job to help lead our group of dedicated Conservatives to hold Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi accountable and defend President Trump's incredible legacy. I just got word that Pelosi, The Squad, and all their radical Democrats are plotting a NATIONWIDE blitz and holding 1,000 events to reach as many voters as they possibly can. In America’s closest battleground races, Democrats are storming in to spread their propaganda. I’m DEEPLY worried. I’m watching these close races like a hawk because even a few votes can change everything. One race was decided by just SIX VOTES. Pelosi’s Democrats could reach thousands – even millions – of voters, and this is just phase one. If we don’t spring into action now, we’ll be forced to play defense all next year! I’m afraid I have to ask for 100% participation. That’s what it will take to deploy enough resources to the closest battleground districts. I know you receive lots of emails but I must insist that you respond to this important – and urgent – request. body:
You know who’s gracing the cover of Time Magazine as their “Person of the Year”? A poster child for how our rigged tax code lets billionaires pay hardly any taxes at all. Let’s take a spin through some of his greatest hits: | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39678512/320927722/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZL_WTX_E_20211214_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmJkYjBmYy0zYTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RxF_ACLqgnMP_msTGYIVvCzPwXKPbIbcoIwOLESc2A=&emci=92bdb0fc-3a5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9fbdb0fc-3a5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9027908)
---
This year, so many people have worked so hard to help our communities get through this pandemic. Doctors. Nurses. Scientists, researchers, everyone who’s gotten vaccines into arms. Educators and staff who’ve gotten kids safely into school. All the people who’ve taken care of loved ones, gone to work day after day, and pitched in to keep our country running. But you know who’s gracing the cover of Time Magazine as their “Person of the Year”? Elon Musk — a poster child for how our rigged tax code lets billionaires pay hardly any taxes at all. Let’s take a spin through some of his greatest hits:
* In 2018, he paid zero dollars in federal income taxes.
* From 2014 to 2018, he got $13.9 billion richer but only paid 3.27% of that new wealth in taxes.
* During the first year of the pandemic, he got about $143 billion richer while millions of Americans struggled to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.

When someone makes it big in America — millionaire big, billionaire big, Person of the Year big — part of it has to include paying it forward so the next kid can get a chance, too. So I’ve got a plan to make Elon Musk and ultra-millionaires and billionaires like him pay their fair share: a wealth tax on fortunes greater than $50 million. That way, the richest of the rich can’t avoid a tax bill by doing fancy accounting with their income. Let’s change the rigged tax code so The Person of the Year will actually pay taxes and stop freeloading off everyone else. I’m in this fight to make our country work for everyone — not just a thin slice at the top. But we’re only going to make big, structural change if we fight side by side. [_**If you can, chip in now to help support our campaign and grow our movement. Let’s make the rich and powerful finally pay their fair share so we can invest in all of our families.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39678513/320927723/-198736398?refcode=EMZL_WTX_E_20211214_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmJkYjBmYy0zYTVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RxF_ACLqgnMP_msTGYIVvCzPwXKPbIbcoIwOLESc2A=&emci=92bdb0fc-3a5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9fbdb0fc-3a5d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9027908) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: Are you in or out? | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, With the year coming to a close, time is running out for you to accept my offer and join my exclusive Chairman’s Club. Soon, I’m going to close the Chairman’s Club to new members, and you will have missed your opportunity to one of the few Republican Patriots I consider as core allies of this movement. So if you have been thinking of joining, now is the time. | Official Chairman’s Club Membership Offer EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | I’m looking forward to seeing you on the list, Peter. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Tonight at midnight we close the books on our mid-month fundraising drive.
#
Friends,
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here is the truth:
Tonight at midnight we close the books on our mid-month fundraising drive.
This one is important, because historically December is a tough month for fundraising. Especially in the second half of the month when people understandably tune out politics.
But that means we really need a strong first half of the month to hit our goals. Because while a lot of our supporters may be tuned out, those spending big to beat us are not. They see this as an opportunity.
So we still need about 5,000 donations TODAY to reach our goals. And there’s only one way that happens...together.
**[Please make a $5 contribution to my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen before midnight. clean_body: Tonight at midnight we close the books on our mid-month fundraising drive. Friends, In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important. Here is the truth: Tonight at midnight we close the books on our mid-month fundraising drive. This one is important, because historically December is a tough month for fundraising. Especially in the second half of the month when people understandably tune out politics. But that means we really need a strong first half of the month to hit our goals. Because while a lot of our supporters may be tuned out, those spending big to beat us are not. They see this as an opportunity. So we still need about 5,000 donations TODAY to reach our goals. And there’s only one way that happens...together. = Thank you, Mark Kelly =

body:

| |
---
| [Let's FIRE Nancy Pelosi & Defeat Jennifer Wexton](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=f1010303d9&e=fc83fb200d "Let's FIRE Nancy Pelosi & Defeat Jennifer Wexton")

| Friend,

You may have seen the headlines, but female sports are under attack across the country.

In Pennsylvania, a male swimmer is being allowed to compete with and against women and is “smashing” records set by female athletes, breaking one record set by an all-American by 38 seconds. It defies comprehension.
---
|

[UPenn female swimmer speaks trans swimmer Lia Thomas continues to smash records](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=6c87ff9e8e&e=fc83fb200d)

Jennifer Wexton supports HR 5, which I call the “Hostility Act” because it forces females to compete against males in ALL sports.

It’s unfair to force our daughters who train, practice, and play sports to compete against insurmountable odds.

In Congress, I will restore sanity to our schools and sports programs by acknowledging a simple fact Jennifer Wexton ignores: men and women are different.

In Congress, I will hold the woke nuts at the NCAA accountable.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Nine years later...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Today marks the ninth year since the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School.
#

Friends,
Today marks nine years since the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School.
Most people remember where they were when they heard the news. You probably do as well.
First, there was a shooting at a Connecticut elementary school. Then there were injuries. Then there were six dead. Then... the unthinkable...
And no matter how many years pass, it will never be possible to wrap our minds around the scene in Newtown's firehouse when 26 families were told by Connecticut's governor that if they hadn't yet been reunited with their loved ones yet that it wasn't going to happen.
It's just impossible to comprehend.
Shortly after that horrific morning, Mark and I traveled to Newtown to spend time with the families grieving such an unspeakable loss. We know personally about the wreckage left in the wake of a gun tragedy: the shock, disbelief, emptiness and heartbreak. But for us, and the entire nation, this was different.
We gathered in a living room filled with parents of some of the children killed in their classrooms, as well as family members of some of the teachers who lost their lives. After talking to every family there that day, tearing up at every picture of the innocent children who had been robbed of the opportunity to grow up, I collapsed into a chair and cried.
As the months and years pass, we know that nothing can bring solace to the families who lost loved ones that day. Those families in Newtown wake up every day to this reality, and so do the families of thousands of Americans every year who are forced into the same nightmare: one where a seat sits empty at the table and the life of a loved one remains frozen in time.
But as I write to you, I am confident of two things: first, that the work we've done together has already saved lives. And second, that the most significant of our accomplishments have yet to come. It is just a matter of time.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords
**We are dedicated to passing background checks and other critical gun safety legislation to save lives and ensure a tragedy like Sandy Hook never happens again. Are you with us? Make a donation today.**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211214-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1340_3935704_tacuvz&akid=1340%2E3935704%2Etacuvz)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1340%2E3935704%2Etacuvz) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: We are falling behind without your support = Team -- we are emailing you because we need your help during this crucial time. We are falling behind our $1,500 mid-month fundraising goal, and we need to ask you to = | ******=**** This month, we learned that Rep. Paul Gosar, a far right extremist, might be drawn into the same Congressional District as Tom. And Gosar already has the endorsement of Donald Trump. Our opponents rely on outside dark money groups to bankroll their campaigns. We are above that kind of fundraising , which is why we rely on our grassroots supporters: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = We are facing off with opponents who represent the worst of our nation. These right-wing extremists would taint the reputation of Arizona politics, so we need to step up. = \- O’Halleran Goal Team Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

It’s a huge responsibility - being the leading outside group still supporting President Donald Trump and candidates nationwide!

As you know, Peter, the vast majority of actual outside money spent supporting President Trump and Trump conservatives has come from ONLY two groups - with your Great America PAC leading the way!

We’ve now spent more than $50 million to champion President Trump and America First leaders who are determined to uphold his principles of freedom and prosperity - and we have plans to fund a huge campaign as we enter the 2022 Midterm Election year.

[](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=c93e4c1872e04656a73f7aeba906c90d&_e=I11ByCmfvwbadO-saQa7NzK0krm0fWcfTkyH0h9z_LRV7TTdbUdTJpK3pGH_ezMtrXwys6DHPjJTJfD2ynv2aS0ueIvUbJalcvNCY_9N4072ZxWnP1_mkHEO3JL4EzMguLpj8zfKjA-N8kOVg_6UIZ0ygtPrD72N_XI6DgkKgMKV0PnZiP6h8qo3Gnxwa6_xkRKNuhsX4U0vHlvlz9Sv0u7Te5iJQSUPWIbub-lAW8UK63cQDYG0NlC80OvB9Z-Wl0OT_x_P6BLzgicAq6nj-wpgGLgJePIkkMvS75TYx3reuF0BJl8zNEdKTHyneUW3r1RFtKYZl-9RWePkopbuLX4jyMhtARyElAsxoYjOGnpu6SNk3WKCtKhXaJ19YATJsvf3m4UPsfWYiiD23Cf2wfaJkUYwyxudtcBJO_OzvC8%3D)

[**And though the Biden Democrats can rely on the massive funding of globalist billionaire elites, Hollywood liberals, and left-wing special interest groups, we rely on the patriotic generosity of grassroots leaders like you.**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=c93e4c1872e04656a73f7aeba906c90d&_e=I11ByCmfvwbadO-saQa7NzK0krm0fWcfTkyH0h9z_LRV7TTdbUdTJpK3pGH_ezMtrXwys6DHPjJTJfD2ynv2aS0ueIvUbJalcvNCY_9N4072ZxWnP1_mkHEO3JL4EzMguLpj8zfKjA-N8kOVg_6UIZ0ygtPrD72N_XI6DgkKgMKV0PnZiP6h8qo3Gnxwa6_xkRKNuhsX4U0vHlvlz9Sv0phwCeZL21vcqXBZHS6p8MnjA62r6pxbJpVnkuHt-LJoFpxWHuJ9VLCL5LfpUI6U2QYC5fFg8T56F2n0lIz4g0GGcY37r_9zzoOcTDIN-1FU3cVwYwexAiRIW-dH7EqPNUd_C9nmjFM6jKuEccDiDik9PU3XXKgOmGeakSjmTFnIetIz4LSeuCHAQ1mJbfXphDtG9_ZDrpSCfjA39ivxgeY%3D)

[**You are among our key supporters, Peter - I'm extremely grateful for everything you do - and I'm asking you to continue that support today.**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=c93e4c1872e04656a73f7aeba906c90d&_e=I11ByCmfvwbadO-saQa7NzK0krm0fWcfTkyH0h9z_LRV7TTdbUdTJpK3pGH_ezMtrXwys6DHPjJTJfD2ynv2aS0ueIvUbJalcvNCY_9N4072ZxWnP1_mkHEO3JL4EzMguLpj8zfKjA-N8kOVg_6UIZ0ygtPrD72N_XI6DgkKgMKV0PnZiP6h8qo3Gnxwa6_xkRKNuhsX4U0vHlvlz9Sv0p8x0iTCQnjxPCJ7fmEoUg_OkFjYp-cdOsi9OWLP9BaSMMdVjHWQ3nEPMxBJI_aECILtB4ewKRnoaGy9d8YBTOOCToX_vkJ6T4AcL4W3tpWy21P9ob2Qd2KtX43tnyku_t8VFKSA9Xl0fFb0Gb1_pNpKpkaGNpX6Lssck3WBavgsufbS46k5Suloo2Hm1IbFIm-Q1LnDM9_drKrqT66vxVE%3D)

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: I am thinking about it. Very seriously.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail
body:
First and foremost, let me answer the question I get a lot of these days: Am I going to run for Governor of New York?
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/79?t=1&akid=136%2E39519%2EptH77-)

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign committee. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
First and foremost, let me answer the question I get a lot of these days: Am I going to run for Governor of New York?
The honest answer is, I am thinking about it. Very seriously.
I am thinking about it because I believe we can revolutionize public education in this state. We can guarantee 3-K and Pre-K, after-school programs and summer enrichment for every child who wants it in this state — just like we did in New York City.
I am thinking about it because I believe we can more effectively take on the fossil fuel industry that prioritizes their profits ahead of the very habitability of this planet for future generations — just like we have in New York City.
And I am thinking about it because I believe if we are going to do anything to move New York State forward, the wealthy simply must pay their fair share — which many in Albany refuse to even consider.
In the coming weeks, I want to talk about these issues and more. But I cannot do that, and I certainly cannot run, without your support. So I am asking:
[**Can you please make a contribution to my campaign committee today? If you believe we can and must act with urgency to end the Tale of Two States, please chip in what you can. **[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/118?source=em-211214-15&t=3&akid=136%2E39519%2EptH77-)** Thank you. Your support means the world to me. Bill de Blasio

Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=136%2E39519%2EptH77-). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize.

Peter,
Between my family back home in Missouri and my job working for you in the Senate, I’ve had a busy couple of months.

But I’ve spent what little free time I have ensuring we have the resources we need to _take back the Senate_ in 2022, and I have a critical update for top patriots like you:

**We have to raise $15,000 by December 15 at 11:59 PM if we’re going to be on track to meet our mid-month goal.**

Big tech is more scared than _ever_ , Friend - but that means these CEOs have been _stepping up_ their donations to top Democrats and giving the radical Left **record amounts of cash.**

I don’t have those kind of billionaires on my team, but I do have something even more powerful: everyday patriots like you.

I don’t have those kind of billionaires on my team, but I do have something even more powerful: everyday patriots like you. I’m doing all I can on my end, now, I need you to step up so we can meet our mid-month goal and TAKE BACK THE SENATE. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jarrin=20Jackson?=
subject: Stop the vax mandates!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Government can't force substances into your body. |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4d328adf42&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

If you want to get the vaccine, get the vaccine. I have no problems if that's your choice.

The freedom to make those kind of decisions without fear of government punishment or violence is what America is all about! It's what I fought for in the military.

Commie Biden doesn't think so. Every time his poll numbers drop again- like clockwork- he tries to amp up the draconian, unconstitutional mandates.

**The latest? Fining every private business with unvaccinated employees. **

But then something incredible happened: the American people fought back, sued Biden, and we won. Now we must win in Congress to roll this back! [We will defeat Biden, with your help!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=988bc2c2a7&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC. I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. Our PAC are America First grassroots patriots, actively FIGHTING Biden and all his unconstitutional mandates!

I was thrilled when the courts stopped Biden's nonsense.

November 29: Federal court halts CMS vaccine mandate rule in 10 states
December 1: Federal judge blocks vaccine mandate for health workers
December 7: Georgia federal judge issues injunction on federal vaccination mandate

Biden can't win these cases. He was being a dictator, doing unconstitutional things.

**But now we have to stop it in Congress.**

[Imagine what we can do with pressure on vulnerable Senators?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=b1f2d23a96&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=6d95108ec2&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **The Senate is about to pass a resolution against Biden's vaxx mandates- WITH DEMOCRAT SUPPORT:**

_The Senate is set to vote this week on a resolution to nullify President Biden's vaccine mandate for private companies, as Republicans and at least one Democrat push back on the administration's rule requiring vaccines or inconvenient testing rules for workers at large businesses.

All 50 Senate Republicans, led by Sen. Mike Braun, R-Ind., backed a challenge to the vaccine mandate last month under the Congressional Review Act (CRA). That law allows Congress to officially disapprove of an executive branch regulation via a resolution passed through each chamber.

Sen. Joe Manchin, D-W.Va., said last week he also supports the Braun resolution.

"I do not support any government vaccine mandate on private businesses," Manchin said Thursday after voting against an amendment to a government funding bill that would roll back public and private vaccine mandates. Sen. Mike Lee, R-Utah, and a handful of other Republicans forced that vote in exchange for expediting passage of the funding bill, but they got no Democrat support.

Republicans also think Sen. Kyrsten Sinema, D-Ariz., may vote for the Braun resolution. She declined to say whether she will vote for it in an interview with CNN last week. Sen. Steve Daines, R-Mont., is also pushing his Democrat counterpart from Montana, Sen. Jon Tester, to "join me in my efforts to block all of Biden's mandates."

The Braun resolution only needs a simple majority to pass the Senate, which means the bill will likely succeed. Rep. Fred Keller, R-Pa., is leading companion legislation in the House of Representatives, which his office said Friday has 206 cosponsors. But House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, R-Calif., said Friday it is unlikely the bill could come for a vote in the House with Speaker Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., in charge._

This proves that pressure works! We can stop Biden in the courts, but the BETTER option is to pressure the Swampers to do the right thing and stand up to Biden!

_**Now is the time to take on the unpopular Biden.[Now is the time to help us launch devastating attacks that will help America First candidates!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=1022e041c4&e=ba6e67b849)**_
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=680b71f00d&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| It's time to put the pressure on. We need to pressure the Swampers to stop Biden- and challenge Biden whenever possible!

**This is the way we win. Pressure the weak and challenge the Swampers.[Help us win this issue!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=aaa21ea474&e=ba6e67b849)**

Don't let Biden pass anything. Ride it out until help arrives.

[Help us elect the right people to challenge Biden and defeat his bills.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=2b91e20c36&e=ba6e67b849)

Intimidate his allies. Make it impossible for them to take away our liberties any further. [Help me beat the Swampy politicians!

Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=6fffc9ceeb&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Thank you!**

Respectfully,

Peter,

My name is Yvette Herrell. I am a proud pro-Trump Republican and conservative warrior who flipped a congressional seat from the Democrats in the last election.

The Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America – and they will try to unseat any Trump-supporting conservative who stands in their way. **And since I took this seat from the Democrats in the last election...**

**I am one of the Democrats’ TOP TARGETS in 2022.**

name: Alex Stovall
subject: Conservatives are under attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes. | Hey Peter,

My name is Alex Stovall and I'm running for Congress in Arizona’s 9th Congressional District. I’m a twenty-six-year-old black conservative and I’m the left’s worst nightmare and let me explain why...

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I’ve experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we’ve been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. name: Marcus Flowers
subject: FWD: The real ‘threat’ to Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
Earlier this year, Marcus Flowers was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because he was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39679665/320948071/-825069922?refcode=20211211_MF_allofus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk0NTY5ZS00MzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjlQZMGwjyS2hGVgLNcJNfR372DfmP_2-8lE7SxWobc=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39679666/320948072/-1322419994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk0NTY5ZS00MzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjlQZMGwjyS2hGVgLNcJNfR372DfmP_2-8lE7SxWobc=&emci=5d0d4bca-fc5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1794569e-435d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035) Team, did you see the note Marcus sent you yesterday about what happened to him at an “America First” rally earlier this year? He was [kicked out](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39679667/320948073/-1322419994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk0NTY5ZS00MzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjlQZMGwjyS2hGVgLNcJNfR372DfmP_2-8lE7SxWobc=&emci=5d0d4bca-fc5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1794569e-435d-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035) because he was perceived to be a ‘threat’ to Marjorie Taylor Greene. _**The truth is, she’s right, but not in the way she thinks. **_ Our _movement_ is a threat to the bigoted politics that her career represents. We’re a threat to the conspiracism, corruption, and authoritarianism that she and Donald Trump espouse.

We’re a threat because we’re focused on delivering roads, bridges, health care, and competence for the American people _[**It’s time to deliver on this “threat” by defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022. Can you help us do that by donating $20 or more to help our movement grow?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39679668/320948074/-1217423743?refcode=20211214_tf_threatFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk0NTY5ZS00MzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjlQZMGwjyS2hGVgLNcJNfR372DfmP_2-8lE7SxWobc=)_ Thanks for your support,
Team Flowers for Congress **\----Begin forwarded message----**
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: The real ‘threat’ to Marjorie Taylor Greene
Sent on Monday, December 13, 2021 at 10:00 a.m. Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene. The truth is, she’s right, but not in the way that she thinks. I’m not a “threat” to cause a disturbance at a political rally. And I’d never dream of harassing her or anyone else for that matter. _**But our movement -- the one we’re building together -- is most definitely a threat to her political career and that of those who practice her kind of politics.**_ **We’re a “threat” because we still believe that leaders from both parties can work together to oppose bigotry, conspiracy theories, and hatred. ** **We’re a “threat” because we are focused on delivering roads, bridges, health care, and competence for the American people. ** **And we’re a “threat” because we are ready to turn the page on the corrupt leadership styles of Donald Trump, Matt Gaetz, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, and more. ** **[But I need your help to deliver on this “threat.” So today, I’m asking you to donate $20.22 or more to help me defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39679669/320948075/-1217423743?refcode=20211214_tf_threatFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk0NTY5ZS00MzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjlQZMGwjyS2hGVgLNcJNfR372DfmP_2-8lE7SxWobc=) ** | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39679670/320948076/-825069922?refcode=20211214_tf_threatFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk0NTY5ZS00MzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjlQZMGwjyS2hGVgLNcJNfR372DfmP_2-8lE7SxWobc=)**

At 18 years old, I swore an oath to defend the Constitution - and I traveled across the globe defending our democracy.
I’m ready to bring that same passion for public service to the halls of Congress. But I need your help to make it happen.
Thanks for your support,
Marcus Flowers

Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. **This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39679671/320948077/-825069922?refcode=20211214_tf_threatFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk0NTY5ZS00MzVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JjlQZMGwjyS2hGVgLNcJNfR372DfmP_2-8lE7SxWobc=)

body:
Let me tell you why this is a big deal >>

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39679768/320950020/380302539?refcode=ufftownhall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDE3OTk3NS00NDVkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NLWZyFDJlQEt6h0I1uLi7UTSNFuIkV_UnbTXDsm8Cf4=) Peter, I just logged off the virtual stage after the United Faculty of Florida Town Hall, and I couldn't be more excited. Tonight's town hall made one thing very clear: Florida is _ready_ for something new. But, if we're going to defeat Ron DeSantis and bring something new to our state, we need a fresh voice — someone who's never wavered on the issues that matter and who will fight like hell for ALL Floridians. As a former student government leader at the University of Florida, and a former member of the Board of Trustees for UF and other colleges, I understand how to advocate for students, families, and schools. And I know what it will take to build a strong education system, a robust economy, and a better future for our state.

[**As you saw tonight, I’m more than ready to use my experience, build on my record, and bring something new to our state. But first, I need your help to win this race. Three national organizations — including EMILY’s List — and 16 local Colorado leaders have endorsed her so far. And really, we’re just getting started.

These supporters joined Dr. Caraveo’s team because they know she has the experience, ideas, and drive to truly get things done for Colorado families. **[But she can’t win without your help. They trust her as her patients and her constituents. And for good reason.

In the State House, she fought and won some big fights. She fought for lower prescription drug prices, guaranteed paid time off, and ballots that Coloradans can read and understand in their first languages.

Fellow Conservative,

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Something
important is coming up at the end of December.

Just like many other campaigns, we’re facing the December 31st Federal
Election Commission (FEC) fundraising deadline, and we are required by
federal law to report how much money our campaign raised in Q4.

But here’s the thing: Unlike other campaigns, this month’s FEC fundraising
deadline is our campaign’s first. NC-02 is a toss-up district. That means
our race will be a battleground for control of the U.S. House in 2022 — so
the press, pundits, and the Republican Party, will be looking at our
fundraising numbers to make judgments about the strength of our campaign.

To ensure our fundraising numbers are strong and competitive by the time
they become public, we set a goal of raising an additional $2,500 in
grassroots donations from emails just like this one by midnight tomorrow.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29982?refcode=em20211214-682&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=682%2E3698%2EOsSYyY ]If you make a donation of $5 — or anything you can — to
our campaign today to help us close the gap, we’ll send you an OFFICIAL
Erica Smith for Congress campaign sticker. But act fast because our
sticker stock is limited.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29982?refcode=em20211214-682&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=682%2E3698%2EOsSYyY ]Donate $5

Erica is running to represent everyday, working-class people in Congress —
not the corporate monopolies that have hollowed out NC-02 and rural
communities across the country. And because Erica doesn’t take a dime from
corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry, we’re relying on folks like
you to reach our fundraising targets and build the most powerful campaign
possible.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29982?refcode=em20211214-682&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=682%2E3698%2EOsSYyY ]Can you help us raise $2,500 by midnight tomorrow and ensure we have
the resources to build a strong and competitive campaign by making a
donation right now? Whatever amount you give, we'll send you a free
sticker.

Thanks!

— Erica Smith HQ

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211214-682-footer&t=1022&refcode2=682_3698_OsSYyY&akid=682%2E3698%2EOsSYyY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=682%2E3698%2EOsSYyY

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Peter, the MAGA threat cannot be understated.

They took the White House in 2016. They even came for our Gov. Newsom here in California. And now, they’re THIS close to winning the U.S. House of Representatives and taking down Speaker Pelosi's majority!

Peter, I hate even imagining how disastrous that would be for our country...

_They could make Trump the Speaker of the House._

_They could impeach President Biden and Vice President Harris._

_They could block every single progressive priority our country needs._

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Important ask for the DCCC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQr9Rp2F-) I want to cut to the chase:

****[The DCCC is short of their must-hit Mid Month goal, and we're just 24 hours away from the deadline. So I'm asking you personally to chip in $3 to help the DCCC close the gap to defend our House Majority. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_3z97t~)****

This is a make or break moment.

- House Republicans just broke their eighth straight monthly fundraising record in a row.
- They now have nearly $68 million at their **immediate** disposal.
- Donald Trump is pulling out all the stops to help his House Republicans defeat our Democrats nationwide.
- And Democrats are making progress in Washington, on once-in-a-generation legislation. We need to show that grassroots energy matches our successes.

Republicans think our House Majority is theirs for the taking. But here's what I know for a fact:

**Supporters like you, pitching in $3 or $10 at a time, are our best defense against the return to Republican rule. **

****[So I'm asking for your help before the DCCC's FINAL Mid Month Deadline of the year in just 24 hours.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_zQV69yqJ_)****

We must protect our majority. Can you pitch in $3 to protect House Democrats?

| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Chip in $1 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**[Chip in $35 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)**

**[Chip in $50 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**[Chip in $100 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-cgL-)**

**[Chip in $250 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/LERqs2vX3_)**

**[Or donate another amount>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Thank you for all that you do,

Adam
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46103269&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MTY0MzQ4NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46103269&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MTY0MzQ4NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

name: David McIntosh
subject: Stop Biden's Bogus "Build Back Better'!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth
body:
Breaking News: Chuck Schumer and the Democrats just announced they plan to raise the debt ceiling by $2.5 TRILLION. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=715847e6155d41f89c29ca46f2bd6e19&_e=yZeGBWF8jUD8SMO4oLytPYHjN3LqgIw0-lS4quNuivJlV3L7LxdW9a1ABqQ25K_xQ2OO8zw78-TC7KekOem8SvFyddjnPPgHYn3hqnMRU7mCjArFTI22U15nPubzpL0uUXR__RlfekHtyUExmaboH48cilSqtbhD224-rINb7OyTWTT1_8JX-tI-mYWeTMtLHP8yOvaesXkTwOSTO5y9tafBGjoilJH2Q2NDxn03eoT3QhrXgWQXLpLNPQAxgvZy)
---
Dear Friend,

**Breaking News: Chuck Schumer and the Democrats just announced they plan to raise the debt ceiling by $2.5 TRILLION.**

That means Joe Biden and the Democrats are doubling down on their strategy of more government spending, even though it is contributing to **rampant inflation** that is punishing hard-working Americans across the country.

**[Where do you stand on Biden's handling of the economy?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=715847e6155d41f89c29ca46f2bd6e19&_e=yZeGBWF8jUD8SMO4oLytPYHjN3LqgIw0-lS4quNuivK9uQJY1yjf-E8MPTqxuNn3kAVdu_46JwR9JEPo1MbESKo3KlFRv-CspJeWOlgV-8J7RLbvVGsFbTsxD815zGOyY3Y1viiQvJzFKk-voFqVxp4IsMWFmMqEnD3IyLu_Np87qf69gjxYH0oTXHurH1tbUNxaUZOdqXLzzuLw46J2HkI85caBjXQoSwlWsLGihoW6YnSo8gIgvhWS5PeMoADU)**

Despite the rising prices and falling poll numbers, Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress still want to pass Biden’s so-called “Build Back Better” bill, which will **bankrupt our country, hike taxes, and make inflation even worse.**

That’s why we need YOUR help to fight back!

**Biden’s bogus spending bill has already passed the House and now Chuck Schumer is promising that the Senate will pass it before Christmas Day.**

We cannot let that happen.

Do you agree?

**[Then please contact your Senators here and tell them to vote NO on Biden’s Bogus “Build Back Better” bill!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=715847e6155d41f89c29ca46f2bd6e19&_e=yZeGBWF8jUD8SMO4oLytPYHjN3LqgIw0-lS4quNuivILNykcbAkR72_m1dvkx3GgP6IrzuOXjWjKzCbmgJJNVltSv35QiK1uEz1734wHDr_A-ibEtW0W-m1Drbho5GJitmy7Ieev7CfGSzewoe1xcOwgJNncTChRYX3LYr_p56KNbuoe1cazYygV_udiKjLI8tGKiHe_d0fMJHmyoPJgLavjtPMA7WUp7fkry26c4OxmtikSfzovXDR_PBsLck5D)**

[**Contact Your Senators Here >>>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=715847e6155d41f89c29ca46f2bd6e19&_e=yZeGBWF8jUD8SMO4oLytPYHjN3LqgIw0-lS4quNuivIbeGlV7o23iRlogtyGnfGxJcWTR6wr2g32ph_o-Xu2IZKaxfAGXLK2UWzDnbpv4sxNA83Qu2wERDYksMkys6-CHx5TSicETEwGsFqXQzHDIKdWSXWojLl9eHXCzLtLcbxyvq4fTbzYqG-pSg5IoEvIb_tV51Us0ugRfhgA9RZjMoR-Kgx2S8uUmXD2f1TZ28jwnvpHR1laUcmdxivGDzri)
Remember, “Build Back Better” will only make inflation worse, meaning you’ll have to pay EVEN MORE for the goods and services you need.

We cannot let this bill become law: **[Please contact your Senators here!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=715847e6155d41f89c29ca46f2bd6e19&_e=yZeGBWF8jUD8SMO4oLytPYHjN3LqgIw0-lS4quNuivKkpHeqrQWecjOxl7_YZQjxG6YA3sKwDpBbqBanyDyRrUePpF4xd2-iZSqRgpda7Izvl-4csASQum96isxJXYgYCjHSfrgoEn--z8W4Pd1eoui1IpIJmje9DTRkMbx_PZ6EDAThMcT7lMeS3MmJYyRpROR_K8ec89COaVhn4Y4usDeejIN2prlhrfev-Wni5-Al93Br_df6TOZ1tZEgkoVv)**

Thank you in advance for your help.

Sincerely,

David McIntosh
President, Club for Growth

[**Contact your Senators now!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=715847e6155d41f89c29ca46f2bd6e19&_e=yZeGBWF8jUD8SMO4oLytPYHjN3LqgIw0-lS4quNuivJ-maD1yEIRoG4jiekq43GBhaAYU2sSEzTAmKdo2A7428geMjCqAbYeUKE-g-4O02GhmE6KFC1jvGhUzb-exfX-YjKxe_eeufzA4US8V79TDHfDP7MN2Xp4y2PJNwNaMup0EsofpS4g7SUf1fwZZLYzcwtSlFh7kACjXRcRf2qcrYbeMgqzmO6r7TXVnW43CM_KnKdPB0UKCxhdvoBIRf5I)

Paid for by Club for Growth

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=715847e6155d41f89c29ca46f2bd6e19&_t=dHIRfvo6tGUoGEdQtcPEY6qOeoRbfscCe2K9QztXHvMIWRJu_mGTodeFCngBSrAuurpWiFcLYhxwZS4TTkLehc-ilHBae5INl5CjqxqFIxzS5UKJQFCK4odBbO3_cBqfQc_K3FIAdadTlesRc2CSg0bLsDka4Gt7PP5WzjCCd84%3D).

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I'm honored to be endorsed by Ted Nugent, a true American patriot and fighter for our constitutional rights. | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
### I'm honored to be endorsed by Ted Nugent.

Dear Peter:

Most people know Ted Nugent for his music, and a lot of us are familiar with his conservation efforts and pro-hunting advocacy. Ted is a leader in standing up for our constitutional rights and I'm honored to receive his endorsement.

This is what Ted Nugent had to say:
> "I’m endorsing you Mike. I want you to bring back Michigan to God, family country, law and order, and real science-based hunting, fishing, trapping, conservation, truth. And I know that’s what you live, but in Michigan we’re not allowed to live science-based conservation.
>
> As Governor I know we can get back to the Michigan I was born in. The arsenal of democracy.
>
> With Mike as the Governor at the helm of Michigan it can once again be the greatest state in the nation. Right now under Gretchen Whitmer’s failed leadership, Michigan is the laughing stock of America.
>
> Mike will put an end to the abandonment of all the traditional values that made Michigan the greatest state in the nation. With Mike as a leader and with we the people, the real working conservatives behind Mike, Michigan can be the greatest state in the nation like it was when I was born here.
Will you please stand with me, Ted Nugent and the thousands of hard-working Michigan men and women working to defeat Gretchen Whitmer?

Please make a generous contribution to my campaign today. Your donation of $25, $50, $100 or more is vital to defeating Whitmer and taking Michigan back.
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=4253c3096a&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| Peter, we all know Gretchen Whitmer has been a disaster for Michigan.

But there is good news. Recent polling shows Whitmer can be beaten. With your help, that's what I intend to do.

Thank you for your interest in my campaign. Please help out today by making a generous contribution too.

See you on the campaign trail,

Michael Brown
Republican/Conservative for Governor
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=ec0e905e90&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")

Peter,

Arizona can be the state that gives control of the Senate back to Republicans. **Democrat Senator Mark Kelly knows that it will be a major failure for his party if he loses.**

As time goes on, more and more Arizonans are changing their minds about Mark Kelly.

His approval rating is under water, and our race was recently upgraded from _"leans Democrat"_ to _"toss-up."_ **Kelly is feeling the pressure, and panic has started to set in. Just look at this email he sent out:**

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bbdb9707649a41c7a0cc28dcbe210f2f&_e=V5sHg_0YpYBQBlLWJySu57g-t2-K5kMVUN5iiDA0nJDV5ZP_2q0QYBa5Oe7OEtzRwWmY9RdC_Zt0v6ytdcTO8EbcP-hTaKBpmcF-xH6Kr7VveAJAQVMNH2ZRY7U6AMPJoTdJRGYu72Ie80g5npvtgdTNE8YW-rbcWPZqAT69EGrLQR7BD-Gba2yuUhZHSOQLHbSA1jP4l7cyTjIOezsm1rNF1KDbAyMp_GDezHO9IOJbcFPon5T66CKHXhdcq9VQOkir9716YDaq0dfzHjLPfe4PzGKNeKU0YJpDF6YLX5aNV4GmXVFdyQTpSSo5pXikNQymkYQYobx84QGuLw5WKQ4sPPC4LB2_U7Uw-QrELWHI4fUNE6uLLx5TbUB5onsn0oYITrwD08oQM-unMr4tvmtHk32du51ri-RtYuiDnuS3WFugGJkjKw1rO-2bcMmeyUY4f3sisp1aYUo4WGreTTimsRuOwCDKB7ohX9rSbQM%3D)

Mark Kelly is one of the Left's biggest fundraisers, and he has already raised over $10 million. He and his supporters know what's at stake and will do whatever they can to keep Chuck Schumer in power.

Our campaign has had to set some lofty goals to be able to keep up, and right now, we have some ground to make up for our December goal. [**I know we're still a little less than one year away from Election Day,_but if we want to retire Mark Kelly_ , we need to meet or beat every monthly goal for the next 11 months.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bbdb9707649a41c7a0cc28dcbe210f2f&_e=V5sHg_0YpYBQBlLWJySu57g-t2-K5kMVUN5iiDA0nJDV5ZP_2q0QYBa5Oe7OEtzRwWmY9RdC_Zt0v6ytdcTO8EbcP-hTaKBpmcF-xH6Kr7VveAJAQVMNH2ZRY7U6AMPJoTdJRGYu72Ie80g5npvtgdTNE8YW-rbcWPZqAT69EGrLQR7BD-Gba2yuUhZHSOQLHbSA1jP4l7cyTjIOezsm1rNF1KDbAyMp_GDezHO9IOJbcFPon5T66CKHXhdcq9VQOkir9716YDaq0dfzHjLPfV2gz8boxilCoH4hqX9QCH8F3BrS8CbKoH2KD4nFvlcuHINOYPxDYRw8pEGoVyfXVPMJxUJUKNeHWs1-Uh31lXJHgm81Yw7nTTDke5FcRamC9oky2RrVM9XTkI_dsnJtLimb09NaM707fJnnkVQVmWJEhNFe4rTrgv3O3aMSnCf6zo7221PXZ9BWh1TFoppSJhNlNYDBiZxbMpiZlsh-Myo%3D)

clean_body: Democrat Senator Mark Kelly knows that it will be a major failure for his party if he loses. | Peter, Arizona can be the state that gives control of the Senate back to Republicans. Democrat Senator Mark Kelly knows that it will be a major failure for his party if he loses. As time goes on, more and more Arizonans are changing their minds about Mark Kelly. His approval rating is under water, and our race was recently upgraded from "leans Democrat" to "toss-up." Kelly is feeling the pressure, and panic has started to set in. Just look at this email he sent out: Mark Kelly is one of the Left's biggest fundraisers, and he has already raised over $10 million. He and his supporters know what's at stake and will do whatever they can to keep Chuck Schumer in power. Our campaign has had to set some lofty goals to be able to keep up, and right now, we have some ground to make up for our December goal. So here's how you can help, Peter. We need 1,500 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more right now. Even after the Republican victories in Virginia, our victory in 2022 isn't guaranteed. It just put the Democrats on high alert, and they will fight day and night to maintain their majority. Thank you, Peter! Blake Masters Republican Candidate for Senate, Arizona | | Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Timothy=20Barr?=
subject: Timothy Barr Endorsed by Congressman Andrew Clyde
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/072416eb86a1/timothy-barr-endorsed-by-congressman-andrew-clyde?e=061a1ea0d5)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,

As you may have heard, I have received the endorsement of House Freedom Caucus member and staunch conservative fighter, Congressman Andrew Clyde. Please read Congressman Clyde's statement below:
---
|
---
|
* * *
_Recently, a handful of establishment politicians in Atlanta decided to draw my home county of Jackson out of the 9th District. This means my family, my business, my church, and much of my personal community now reside in Georgia's 10th District. As he is my constituent, maybe Speaker Ralston thought I was too conservative, but I've never caved to career politicians and I won't start now. Not only am I running for re-election in Georgia's 9th District but I am going to work tirelessly to ensure the 10th District retains a Freedom Caucus member.

Thus, I am joining Congressman Hice in endorsing Timothy Barr for Congress. There are over a dozen candidates in that race, so there are many choices, but I want someone who has a proven conservative record. Timothy Barr does. In the State House, he withstood the pressure of establishment politicians including threats to take his office and remove him from his committees. I've been on the frontlines in Washington and I can tell you we desperately need conservative fighters like Jody Hice, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Lauren Boebert. I need the 10th District to send us reinforcements, and I'm confident Timothy will join the Freedom Caucus and stand in the gap with us.

My endorsement of Timothy has undoubtedly placed another target on his back, but I am certain he can stand the heat. So, please join me and Jody Hice in supporting Timothy Barr!_

_FIGHT AND WIN,
Andrew Clyde
9th District Congressman & Now 10th District Voter_
* * *
---
| I am honored to have the endorsements of both Congressman Hice and Congressman Clyde, but we can't win without your support. [Would you consider making a donation to our campaign today](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=64ce0ec0a3&e=061a1ea0d5)[?](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=934fba6d0e&e=061a1ea0d5)

I'm ready to join the fight for freedom as the 10th District's next congressman. Together, we can stand for liberty!
---
|

For Freedom,
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=e6500f8854&e=061a1ea0d5)
---
| | [](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=6414add4e0&e=061a1ea0d5)
---
| | [](mailto:team@votebarr.com)
---
|
---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
Timothy Barr for Congress, Inc.
824 S Milledge Ave Ste 101
Athens, GA 30605

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=cfa662e05a&e=061a1ea0d5&c=b86e9c7df3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=cfa662e05a&e=061a1ea0d5&c=b86e9c7df3).

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The 8th Most Absent Member of Congress
body:
You would think that during an election season, an incumbent politician would at least PRETEND that he was fit for the job.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kToojRndSzLk892ybnxXLUGQ/JZ15leyUfv6xNBb763hjU3kQ)
Patriot,

You would think that during an election season, an incumbent politician would at least PRETEND that he was fit for the job.

But my opponent, Do-Nothing Dan Webster, has risen in the rankings, and is now the **8th most absent member of Congress!**

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kToojRndSzLk892ybnxXLUGQ/JZ15leyUfv6xNBb763hjU3kQ)
[**Chip in to support my campaign to help me defeat this RINO!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kToojRndSzLk892ybnxXLUGQ/JZ15leyUfv6xNBb763hjU3kQ)

We’ve seen it all too often – politicians clinging to power for no reason at all.

They don’t perform, they show now boldness, **they have no fight left in them**.

I have been fighting for years, and when I make it to Congress, expect me to amp it up and fight with all I have to stop the Communists who are infecting Washington.

But to do that, [**I need your help**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kToojRndSzLk892ybnxXLUGQ/JZ15leyUfv6xNBb763hjU3kQ).

December is a historically bad month for fundraising – and I have to put up BIG numbers to close out the last fundraising quarter of the year as strong as possible.

[**Will you chip in today?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kToojRndSzLk892ybnxXLUGQ/JZ15leyUfv6xNBb763hjU3kQ)

**Before the New Year, I have to raise $38,600 to meet my fundraising goal.**

Any amount will help – [**so give whatever you can**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/kToojRndSzLk892ybnxXLUGQ/JZ15leyUfv6xNBb763hjU3kQ).

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Team Mo Brooks
subject: NEW POLL ALERT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_poll_email_december_14th&n=1)
---

| Peter, You can’t make this up folks! A new poll shows that Mo Brooks is the favored candidate in the race of the U.S. Senate. The poll was done by President Trump’s pollster, John McLaughlin, and shows that Mo Brooks is a conservative fighter--that's why President Trump endorsed him, why the conservative grassroots are with him, and as this poll shows, why he's going to win this race. In case you need further proof of the survey, here is just one of the survey questions and the answers. [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm4hg_kwWgtMjbNN4IryXDPv9m9u-gFNESp0BrmG6BF2A&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_poll_email_december_14th&n=2) The poll results speak for themselves, but now we need YOUR help to keep the momentum going. Can you help us bridge the fundraising gap between our Trump-endorsed, conservative campaign, and our opponent, the professional lobbyist, hand-picked and supported by the D.C. Establishment?

[**Chip in $5, $10, $25, or $100 today, to help us keep the momentum going!**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm4hg_kwWgtMjbNN4IryXDPv9m9u-gFNESp0BrmG6BF2A&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_poll_email_december_14th&n=3) With folks like YOU, President Trump, Senator Rand Paul (R-KY), U.S. Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX), Mark Levin, Club for Growth, the National Association of Gun Rights by our side, we know this is OUR race to win.

[**_But we simply_**** _CANNOT_**** _neglect his opponents’ fundraising advantage._**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm4hg_kwWgtMjbNN4IryXDPv9m9u-gFNESp0BrmG6BF2A&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_poll_email_december_14th&n=4) You see, he doesn't have a family fortune to fund his campaign, unlike some of his opponents. He doesn't have ties to Liberal Elites or Shady Special Interest Groups that will cut him a check at a moment’s notice.

**Mo is dependent upon the tens of thousands of grassroots conservatives just like you chipping in $10, $20, or whatever they can, when they can, to help put America First again.** **[Can you help us fight back?](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm4hg_kwWgtMjbNN4IryXDPv9m9u-gFNESp0BrmG6BF2A&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_poll_email_december_14th&n=5)** We need to keep up this momentum and lead to help Save America. For America, Team Mo Brooks
---

---

subject: Keep Mississippi Red!
body:
December is almost halfway through, and that means the *MOST CRITICAL* deadline of the year is approaching quickly. Fellow Republican,

December is almost halfway through, and that means the **MOST CRITICAL** deadline of the year is approaching quickly. If we want to stay on track to **protect our state** from those sleazy liberals, we MUST make sure we meet **our mid-month goal.**

The Mississippi Dems have raised a _concerning_ amount of money this quarter, and with 2022 just weeks away, staying ahead in this fight is more important than ever.

[Please contribute today to ensure we meet our mid-month goal and **protect our strong conservative state!**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=fc7ef42d0c824362ba637f5e497a09e8&_e=tJKyKAC3dZchXAPB2VA2-0O5yRC2tCNXD6wrmH43jaWAAWOr-OybtPCh9UA7FHN4X1VSuGKx0J0HvdeswaYST4zdV09NQ5OIPr-bUDA984vAILiq7FVeKoEQm68fPlQlu0xmtoZ_7mEsqbDRdQcjD11cMdhUBcpqxxAHCFvH0odBqfE6vUgrqRgaKgVfQPNDFCOJt-Lk_uCiu6I7icHU8DIAI2XWb1ZDvuoxBNRmx9gBsTYsNxYYLTAEIzZP5RwtsNNX4_ErmFoti5MzEOwDJxjfy7FRmVna7JI1m29qN4n_z4aEIPwFEvp2oBa5NmCP) [**PROTECT MISSISSIPPI**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=fc7ef42d0c824362ba637f5e497a09e8&_e=tJKyKAC3dZchXAPB2VA2-0O5yRC2tCNXD6wrmH43jaWAAWOr-OybtPCh9UA7FHN4X1VSuGKx0J0HvdeswaYST4zdV09NQ5OIPr-bUDA984v4nA2u8xMuLS9-BOmX0WxQxrZ8JQuFkE0981QevwgOvSWJZWarxy8HLuBC4e1Oaw8HeRVoliNCqTasgk_iZtYqzo57T_OTxPloFtFtgeYVOsf8mxE7cg_gTHMzNCeB_Xe-eili1cfKDuwoiJN2Djy3YQ8_Jglv5RZs70hJys6zQpv-pNj5uNYCfXlWMA9D5Se9R2K35EqI-WGkAFjxulVt) Thank you, MS GOP [Click here to unsubscribe.](http://links.msgop.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_s=fc7ef42d0c824362ba637f5e497a09e8&_t=80LpfIsd3lul21_xVBNNMaI5ImzLWwegjEJy6hA4xxv9_B1xY6Ddk1gcnYUfUiQUEnheu_7qrosP1oEDAd4jKQpHwSyM7-MqzRi4_bPiZtYezT1SF1bKiagV9kPncIWcGcgdb1o0PIBD0zu4y4F1bxcLjmDJWY02MneNNNxbGQI%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled conservative because I want to Make Idaho Free Again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
December is a wonderful time of year when we get to celebrate and reconnect with friends and family. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/campaign-update-12-14-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=9b12302067&e=823fa8e224)
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| | December is a wonderful time of year when we get to celebrate and reconnect with friends and family. It is also the time of year when we analyze our campaign fundraising efforts, and friends, **we need your help!** The establishment is working overtime to defeat our campaign and undermine our message of Freedom and Liberty. As I'm sure you know by now, I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled conservative because I want to **Make Idaho Free Again!** **_President Trump has endorsed my run for Idaho Governor_** because I stand for **America First** policies including individual liberty, election integrity, a strong and secure border, school choice, energy independence, reducing taxes and regulations, and supporting American businesses. Back in May, when I was serving as Acting Governor, I issued an Executive Order that prohibited any level of government from mandating masks. This order [**banned mask mandates**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=74c9132d28&e=823fa8e224) in Idaho's public schools in order to protect our children from unnecessary mandates that inhibit their ability to learn. Mandates have no place in a free society! Unfortunately, Brad Little decided to reinstate the mandates I had banned, even though those mandates served no useful purpose. As Senator Rand Paul said recently, _"I don't think it's been about science for a long time. It's really been about conditioning the American individual to submit to government."_ I'm running for Idaho Governor to restore the principles of **individual liberty** , **state sovereignty** , and **traditional conservative values**. These are foundational principles of the American republic, which we must stand up for and defend. I strongly believe in these principles and I know you believe in them too. **Will you put _America First_ by **[**DONATING**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=65fea99aef&e=823fa8e224)**today?** Will you help us replace leftists and RINOs with true conservatives willing to do whatever it takes to protect your Liberty? Right now, establishment cronies and even democrats are pouring money into Brad Little's campaign in hopes of defeating our efforts and pushing Idaho to the left. They want MORE lockdowns, mandates, and government intrusion into your life. They REJECT America First policies and are working overtime to DEFEAT true conservatives! We must not ever give up the fight and allow these leftists and RINOs to win! We need YOUR help to reach our fundraising goals and restore the freedoms and liberties we have lost. clean_body: December is a wonderful time of year when we get to celebrate and reconnect with friends and family. | | | | | | Dear Friends, | | December is a wonderful time of year when we get to celebrate and reconnect with friends and family. It is also the time of year when we analyze our campaign fundraising efforts, and friends, we need your help! The establishment is working overtime to defeat our campaign and undermine our message of Freedom and Liberty. As I'm sure you know by now, I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled conservative because I want to Make Idaho Free Again! President Trump has endorsed my run for Idaho Governor because I stand for America First policies including individual liberty, election integrity, a strong and secure border, school choice, energy independence, reducing taxes and regulations, and supporting American businesses. Back in May, when I was serving as Acting Governor, I issued an Executive Order that prohibited any level of government from mandating masks. This order in Idaho's public schools in order to protect our children from unnecessary mandates that inhibit their ability to learn. Mandates have no place in a free society! Unfortunately, Brad Little decided to reinstate the mandates I had banned, even though those mandates served no useful purpose. As Senator Rand Paul said recently, "I don't think it's been about science for a long time. It's really been about conditioning the American individual to submit to government." I'm running for Idaho Governor to restore the principles of individual liberty , state sovereignty , and traditional conservative values. These are foundational principles of the American republic, which we must stand up for and defend. I strongly believe in these principles and I know you believe in them too. Will you put America First by ? Will you help us replace leftists and RINOs with true conservatives willing to do whatever it takes to protect your Liberty? Right now, establishment cronies and even democrats are pouring money into Brad Little's campaign in hopes of defeating our efforts and pushing Idaho to the left. They want MORE lockdowns, mandates, and government intrusion into your life. They REJECT America First policies and are working overtime to DEFEAT true conservatives! We must not ever give up the fight and allow these leftists and RINOs to win! We need YOUR help to reach our fundraising goals and restore the freedoms and liberties we have lost. I am asking you to please donate , , , or even today to help Make Idaho Free Again and to replace a career politician with a proven conservative leader. | "DONATE NOW!" | Together, we will save Idaho! | Sincerely, Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor | P.S. Please if you are able, to see our unique merchandise, and us on social media, and to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 by Janice for Idaho, All rights reserved. name: Rachael Hudicka - State Director
subject: APPLICATION STATUS: PENDING
body:
Become a Republican Leadership Initiative Fellow

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_v2_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend \-- **_Are you a natural born leader?_** **_Are you ready to show your Conservative support?_** **_Do you want to join a team of fellow leaders working to WIN in 2022?_** If your answer to ALL of these questions is a resounding **YES** , then Friend, you are the perfect candidate for the Republican Leadership Initiative Fellowship. | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8XjJBZzwzEB0R7ehhI4t7gzdOzA1rW1ARWBKRrWZFfC8zKM-wKIB4JtCKtTdC2eiVjWKKpTXPUBFoqqKvSf9bA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_v2_3&n=2 "Apply Today >>") [Apply Today >>](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8XjJBZzwzEB0R7ehhI4t7gzdOzA1rW1ARWBKRrWZFfC8zKM-wKIB4JtCKtTdC2eiVjWKKpTXPUBFoqqKvSf9bA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_v2_3&n=2)
---
As a Republican Leadership Initiative Fellow you’ll work alongside experienced GOP operatives. During this **exclusive six week program starting on January 5th**, you will have the opportunity to:
* Master cutting-edge campaign technology
* Develop crucial leadership skills
* Build a dedicated volunteer network

Upon completion, our leadership fellows will be prepared and equipped to interview for staff positions before the upcoming critical midterm election.
_This is a virtual, statewide training program_ \-- no matter where you are you can participate! Fellowship training will occur on every Wednesday with exciting guest speakers and new topics each week.
[**_Submit your resume and APPLY TODAY!_**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8XjJBZzwzEB0R7ehhI4t7gzdOzA1rW1ARWBKRrWZFfC8zKM-wKIB4JtCKtTdC2eiVjWKKpTXPUBFoqqKvSf9bA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_v2_3&n=3)
Thank you,
Rachael Hudicka
Wisconsin State Director
Republican National Committee
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_v2_3&n=4).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_v2_3&n=5) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_v2_3&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rli_fellow_v2_3&n=7), software for leaders.

---
| Dear Friend, Over the weekend, we all followed the news about **the Eastman Memo, which pushed for a coordinated attack on our democracy.** The memo—which laid out a detailed plan to illegally overturn a democratic election—was circulated among a group of senators leading up to the January 6 insurrection. Mike Lee was one of those senators. Not only was he handpicked to receive this information— **Mike Lee chose to sit by idly** while radical actors threatened the institutions and values we as Americans hold dear. Mike Lee did not stand up for what was right. **We deserve a senator who is willing to stand up for our democracy** , not one who enables attacks against it. I am prepared to safeguard our American democratic ideals as your next U.S. senator. But first, I need your help to unseat Mike Lee.
---

I’ve had my social media accounts censored multiple times and local ANTIFA chapters have threatened to harass our public events and scare away my supporters. **Despite the threats, we’ve still managed to take this race from "Lean Dem" to a "Toss-up"!**

But it’s come at a significant cost. **If we don’t raise $15,000 before our final mid-month deadline this Wednesday** , we won’t have the resources we need to fight back.

name: JohnFetterman.com (via VPP)
subject: BREAKING new poll with Dr. Oz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Here’s what you need to know:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4419?t=6&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w) Friend, a brand-new poll just dropped – and it shows John Fetterman up 2 points against Republican candidate Dr. Oz in the race for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania. 👀 [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4419?t=7&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w) **Here’s what the poll means:** Among likely Pennsylvania voters, John Fetterman is ahead of Dr. Oz, meaning we’re leading this race to replace Pat Toomey and flip this ultra-competitive Senate seat blue in 2022. _But with only a two-point difference, Dr. Oz’s self-funded campaign has the resources to pull ahead._

[We need all hands on deck if we’re going to hold — and increase — our lead over Dr. Oz and the other candidates in the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seat of 2022. Can you make a donation of $5 or more right now to help fund our momentum so we can beat Dr. Oz?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4420?t=8&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w) _How much we can raise while it's still early will play a massive role in building a campaign that can go the distance in the general election._ | [RUSH $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4420?t=9&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
---
**Here's what we know:** John Fetterman is the *only* Democrat in this race who has run and won statewide in Pennsylvania before. And with a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, we can't risk the possibility of Republicans + Mitch McConnell regaining power.

**But here's what else:** As soon as Republicans, including Dr. Oz, see these poll numbers with John in the lead, they're going to flood this race with even more cash. We know this from the last time this seat was up in 2016, when it became the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.

[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to fight back against the attacks that are sure to come our way from our GOP opponents? As Republican super PACs and GOP mega-donors prepare to spend millions to try to buy this Senate seat, John is counting on you to step up in a big way by making a donation to our campaign right now.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4420?t=10&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
The great news about this latest poll is that John is in the lead. But that doesn’t mean we can relax. We have to look ahead and build the kind of campaign that can go toe-to-toe against the GOP in the general election – _and win._

**We know Republicans are going to pour corporate and super PAC money into this race as soon as they see John leading the field – heck, Dr. Oz has already funneled nearly $2 MILLION of his own money into TV ad buys – but we can fend off their attacks if we raise enough from grassroots donors now.**

John doesn't accept a cent of corporate PAC money. [But that means we're relying on grassroots donors like you from all across our country. Your donation will be immediately put to work building a campaign that can win not just the primary, but the general election, too.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4420?t=11&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4421?t=12&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4422?t=13&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4423?t=14&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4424?t=15&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4419?t=16&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
Thank you, 🙏

Team Fetterman HQ

P.S. Not only is John in the lead in this primary, but he's also our *single best shot* at defeating the GOP front-runners in this race and successfully flipping this seat. **We know we're going to face a flood of attacks from Dr. Oz and other Republicans as soon as they see John’s in the lead,** [ so please donate $5 or more if you can today. ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4420?t=17&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=18&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1018%2E878179%2E1ueE0w)
