name: Dr. Roger Marshall
subject: Your vaccine appointment is coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow patriot, My name is Dr. Roger Marshall and I’m one of only four doctors in the U.S. Senate.

Like millions of other Americans, my family and I made the highly personal choice to get vaccinated. Having practiced medicine for nearly 30 years, medical decisions are between you, your family, and your doctor. Period.

But let me be clear, **nobody should force you to get the vaccine if you don’t want it**. Vaccines should NEVER be mandatory — and I’m leading the fight to block ALL of Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates.

Last week, **I attempted to block funding of the federal government** until Democrats stopped enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandates. And I’m not going to stop fighting against the destructive mandates Biden is attempting to enforce.
**_
[I’d like to know if you would support another attempt to defund the government if it meant blocking the enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandate.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8e8e348e24914a09a5c1650a1e91fb69&_e=L0UPMdmk-X4xhAKiZGFj_Ooxad6wHdhvTzQKUsN2ExvHujKG1PK6AJs0JRStY8E2eXuouxpCFVEa-74qvJ-DG_w-iegTOklo0LMGjChzFA1YpoXOUus-r9YaT87dBzlvK10H2VStsrj_a3bpNChtXW30GWauxpmg0ynwsKsyRyGprQVgNSeUjXCNuwnytwQHWq36XjhnEkQact2ua4qjVKGYYG9WGsI8R8SqwGf8PxUcm24beHChMV92idvXN9huGteF3oxkv1S-NAo0VbtFb-6iflIWNgq_P3t1nLzxsrtoI_VUtA2IaITAUOdExQNc0cDbc0QXpNT7cVPaGE_wc8qDVitTRHtjlKq41wMWMQw79Ntq4_ERvw2zTgUanmjALuUa3Q0DePsJDbdN2d6h5jMORPf7dHbcYhiRO3rmbdu1UYoY04QN5CFaQ9z825YOF38BVIXe1Btdg0JH3FslpkmV_uQwO7n4Nry3iWj-Ujfn0xmwxfVVbubz2LQL65QC)_

** [** BLOCK THE MANDATE BY SHUTTING DOWN THE GOVERNMENT?

clean_body: | Fellow patriot, My name is Dr. Roger Marshall and I’m one of only four doctors in the U.S. Senate. Like millions of other Americans, my family and I made the highly personal choice to get vaccinated. Having practiced medicine for nearly 30 years, medical decisions are between you, your family, and your doctor. Period. But let me be clear, nobody should force you to get the vaccine if you don’t want it. Vaccines should NEVER be mandatory — and I’m leading the fight to block ALL of Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates. Last week, I attempted to block funding of the federal government until Democrats stopped enforcement of Biden’s vaccine mandates. And I’m not going to stop fighting against the destructive mandates Biden is attempting to enforce. Biden’s unconstitutional mandate is a threat to our entire economy, and it’s up to each of us to stand together to stop its enforcement. -. Thanks, Dr. Roger Marshall United States Senator for Kansas If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom's New Mandate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Groundhog's Year](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooXSrfDNZQsC1R_z1CFcWynqQGcs8_zh6Wg3g5L4diMRA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_14&n=1) In many ways 2021 has felt like a repeat of 2020. But unlike Bill Murray’s iconic character, who improved as he lived Groundhog’s Day over and over, Gavin Newsom has learned absolutely nothing. Case in point: yesterday he reimposed a statewide mask mandate, despite [data showing](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=lIvDrPfHv47LvRjGMNY-DqbVKBzAvIuJgiYxcmuidNg0BCGpCuqcvlpc_0p_DyQ4H1XeaJ8QAj0k0OvHXPU9YUOOjlhZwOl9AAn7bqTSbJmVsnLwkESYTmcdI0LMLhqMDP5hlbYIckS50WVzqXv1Wg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_14&n=2) that counties with mandates have fared no better than counties without them. That's what I discussed [this Sunday on Fox News](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharNoAypA_KLEu__eREFefYK_vkdM24GFgyRiB29BHpyO2g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_14&n=3). California has been the most coercive state in every way – business shutdowns, school shutdowns, church shutdowns; mask mandates, vaccine mandates, vaccine passports – and gotten nothing in return. Newsom latest edict, of course, is an exercise of "emergency powers." Recently, he was asked when the emergency will end. He responded "we’ll know it when we experience it.” Our Governor just vacationed in Cabo and went on a book tour; I think we’ve experienced it. Meanwhile, we've just learned California is illegally paying six figures to a “Superintendent of Equity” who lives and works as a life coach in Philadelphia. He happened to be in the wedding of our state schools chief who hired him. I’ve reported this to the Governmental Operations Agency, which is reviewing [my letter](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharPXhlNn0jhNPoqX0BCoCMYAh4ZOgR4i_mOeI1qHgRt6XA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_14&n=4). It’s a reminder that even before the insanity of Newsom’s one-man rule, our Capitol was already a place of madness. clean_body: | Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: In many ways 2021 has felt like a repeat of 2020. But unlike Bill Murray’s iconic character, who improved as he lived Groundhog’s Day over and over, Gavin Newsom has learned absolutely nothing. Case in point: yesterday he reimposed a statewide mask mandate, despite that counties with mandates have fared no better than counties without them. That's what I discussed . California has been the most coercive state in every way – business shutdowns, school shutdowns, church shutdowns; mask mandates, vaccine mandates, vaccine passports – and gotten nothing in return. Newsom latest edict, of course, is an exercise of "emergency powers." Recently, he was asked when the emergency will end. He responded "we’ll know it when we experience it.” Our Governor just vacationed in Cabo and went on a book tour; I think we’ve experienced it. Meanwhile, we've just learned California is illegally paying six figures to a “Superintendent of Equity” who lives and works as a life coach in Philadelphia. He happened to be in the wedding of our state schools chief who hired him. I’ve reported this to the Governmental Operations Agency, which is reviewing . It’s a reminder that even before the insanity of Newsom’s one-man rule, our Capitol was already a place of madness. Kevin Kiley Legislator Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

name: Morgan Harper
subject: That’s not going to gain traction with the voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This message shows why this race is so important to everyday Ohioans
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211214-453-footer-ak&t=2&akid=453%2E90090%2E4VvBaV)
We’re in this campaign to fight for a better Ohio, and we can flip this seat blue — but only if we unite working people around a bold vision for our state.
That’s why we were so humbled to get this DM on Twitter after I spoke on The Damage Report.
_“I just saw Morgan on The Damage Report and just wanted to say I’m excited to see how her campaign goes, and I hope she does good things for Ohio. She has an uphill battle in Ohio, and she’s going to have to get out and speak to the public more than any other candidate if she has a chance at winning._ _**I’ve been personally struggling living in Ohio.** I’m raising two young girls and I no longer see Ohio as a safe environment for my children. **I hope she can change that.**_ _Please keep your followers updated on what they can do to help. I want to make a difference but I want to make sure I support the right candidate and help out where I can.”_
---
This is why I’m in this race. We have to give people something to vote for — especially our progressive, young Democratic base. And to answer what you can do to help, **[the most powerful thing you can do for our campaign to succeed is to chip in $5 today.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18353?t=3&akid=453%2E90090%2E4VvBaV)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18359?refcode=em20211214-453&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=453%2E90090%2E4VvBaV)**
**Folks in Ohio realize that for years, we’ve been screwed by a rigged economic system.**
While so many are rejecting traditional politicians, we’re facing a primary with Tim Ryan, who’s built a career in Washington for 20 years and in that time has overseen the economic destruction of our state.
That’s not going to gain traction with the voters. We want people who are actually going to stand up and fight for us. Our far-right opponents have been exploiting that by trying to divide us based on what we look like or where we come from, **but we’re presenting an alternative to the failed status quo and radical far-right.**
Ohio needs someone who will do whatever it takes to get political and economic power back on the side of everyday Ohioans. **[I’m the only candidate in the race who will do just that. If you’re with me, chip in whatever you can to keep fueling our statewide campaign today.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18353?t=23&akid=453%2E90090%2E4VvBaV)**
Together.
Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18353?t=24&akid=453%2E90090%2E4VvBaV)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211214-453-footer&t=25&refcode2=453_90090_4VvBaV&akid=453%2E90090%2E4VvBaV)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=453%2E90090%2E4VvBaV)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: Small state, HUGE movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Wow, folks:

[1]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island

Around 200 people joined us last night in front of the State Capitol for
our daily community gathering at #SleepOutRI, and nearly 100 of them slept
outside overnight, demanding immediate action to end our state’s crisis of
homelessness.

Our group of activists is growing because despite the terrible conditions
and cold weather, there are still many unhoused Rhode Islanders —
including children — who don’t have access to safe and dignified shelter.
Governor McKee simply has not done enough to help our neighbors find
shelter this winter.

Governor McKee and the rest of the corrupt establishment have a
responsibility to take action immediately, but it’s clear they’ll only
budge when we make them. They have the resources to deliver life-saving
support and are refusing to use them, which is why we need your
help.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/sleep-out-petition-202112/?t=1006&akid=322%2E43343%2ER_E54s ]Can you sign this petition to Governor McKee, Speaker Shekarchi, and
Senate President Ruggerio to make sure that we have safe and dignified
housing for all?

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/sleep-out-petition-202112/?t=1007&akid=322%2E43343%2ER_E54s ]ADD YOUR NAME

Our message is getting louder, but we need to crank up the pressure, and
one of the best ways to do that is by supporting our campaign’s work on
this urgent issue.

Thanks for your help,

Team Matt and Cynthia

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/445?t=1001&akid=322%2E43343%2ER_E54s ]www.mattandcynthiaforri.com | [ mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com ]info@mattandcynthiaforri.com |
[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/446?t=1002&akid=322%2E43343%2ER_E54s ]Privacy Policy

Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia

[4]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=322%2E43343%2ER_E54s
